name: No days off
subject: It’s Trisha’s birthday, but she’s going to spend it in misery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
We risk losing all the progress we’ve made if we don’t get caught up today.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00197HJAKStQArrDZo01pB_dOI_zC1t-5ZN2qpKUqFoCBrvrhFxkZj81MpmLc72zehos4wrJSWNosnrGBgkN9U_IQMxEbNlY_TGeEWYVARbu8ZrFRFN44XY8x3Q4NjS4d9sSo8VFn_4_7H9QeAIaPOR3jgjHHIBsYFrbrqPTOUyHk2AnbXsnWsjOU7K5KdeEfpxF77ufQohtxrMplwWIuRLCTSuPshnNLGq&c=vAO7mgcWsevcr99psuD33kzShQw-FjMzbq8v6UmErqYHY9nPr8ltdw==&ch=Rywu6rFMeqyqo8RLBuCLuOg-iTxYWeAR8az9j5kx2eodMMz-rXommw==)
---
|

Peter,
Today is Trisha's birthday. And we wish there were better news to tell Trisha today so she could relax on her big day, but here's the truth:
Grassroots donations are falling off yesterday and today, and we are at risk of missing our mid-month, and possibly quarterly, goals to defeat Lauren Boebert this election.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00197HJAKStQArrDZo01pB_dOI_zC1t-5ZN2qpKUqFoCBrvrhFxkZj81MpmLc72zehos4wrJSWNosnrGBgkN9U_IQMxEbNlY_TGeEWYVARbu8ZrFRFN44XY8x3Q4NjS4d9sSo8VFn_4_7H9QeAIaPOR3jgjHHIBsYFrbrqPTOUyHk2AnbXsnWsjOU7K5KdeEfpxF77ufQohtxqP7zMhk1-IO59bikWDg3G8&c=vAO7mgcWsevcr99psuD33kzShQw-FjMzbq8v6UmErqYHY9nPr8ltdw==&ch=Rywu6rFMeqyqo8RLBuCLuOg-iTxYWeAR8az9j5kx2eodMMz-rXommw==)
---
To defeat Lauren Boebert and elect Trisha, we need to maintain strong fundraising every single day through to the election. As you can see, we took a hit this weekend and we need to get back on track.
Thankfully, Trisha was raised on hard work and persistence, so she won't rest today until we get things where we need to be.
But that means Trisha will likely be working the phones even beyond our usual scheduled call time--potentially staying in the room from 9 am today until 10 pm this evening (later for donors on the West Coast). A miserable day of non stop dialing for dollars.
So we're coming to you today with a last-ditch request before we report our situation to Trisha: [Can you chip in just $5 (or more if you can do it right now) to help us do our part to meet our mid-month goal and make this an extra special birthday for Trisha?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00197HJAKStQArrDZo01pB_dOI_zC1t-5ZN2qpKUqFoCBrvrhFxkZj81MpmLc72zehoCh8t4AfcOgI7pmjaAVcEQwdGf8iRxTbQb-FObw1Xd8qmccM_JzkfVDjSdwM1nX3wd7dTY4ZF7KPGOBBI-jumOu1wXKtHQ4i_6q_B_0A1hphGiXCB6VJjhtSGWnYaNgcBuRCa4_aewVLN5ljQSr4-eq94KdBS1StfQqpx-g7ptUqwG5Bh0kz1ug==&c=vAO7mgcWsevcr99psuD33kzShQw-FjMzbq8v6UmErqYHY9nPr8ltdw==&ch=Rywu6rFMeqyqo8RLBuCLuOg-iTxYWeAR8az9j5kx2eodMMz-rXommw==)
---
| [DONATE](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00197HJAKStQArrDZo01pB_dOI_zC1t-5ZN2qpKUqFoCBrvrhFxkZj81MpmLc72zehos4wrJSWNosnrGBgkN9U_IQMxEbNlY_TGeEWYVARbu8ZrFRFN44XY8x3Q4NjS4d9sSo8VFn_4_7H9QeAIaPOR3jgjHHIBsYFrbrqPTOUyHk2AnbXsnWsjOU7K5KdeEfpxF77ufQohtxqoQEZ1huXKcY-g0aCB9C0y&c=vAO7mgcWsevcr99psuD33kzShQw-FjMzbq8v6UmErqYHY9nPr8ltdw==&ch=Rywu6rFMeqyqo8RLBuCLuOg-iTxYWeAR8az9j5kx2eodMMz-rXommw==)
---
Lauren Boebert is extremely vulnerable right now, and we may not get another opportunity to defeat her than we will this election. She survived re-election by a mere 546 votes. And when Trisha took her on in 2024, Boebert ran behind Trump in every single county while Trisha performed better than Kamala Harris in every county.
Boebert can be beaten--Trisha just needs our support to do it.
That's why these goals matter, and why Trisha would work through her birthday to make sure we hit them. We're asking for your help so she doesn't have to do that today.
[If everyone reading this email gave $5 or more, we would meet our mid-month goal of $10,000 raised today. Can you help wish Trisha a happy birthday by chipping in to get us to our goal today?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00197HJAKStQArrDZo01pB_dOI_zC1t-5ZN2qpKUqFoCBrvrhFxkZj81MpmLc72zehoCh8t4AfcOgI7pmjaAVcEQwdGf8iRxTbQb-FObw1Xd8qmccM_JzkfVDjSdwM1nX3wd7dTY4ZF7KPGOBBI-jumOu1wXKtHQ4i_6q_B_0A1hphGiXCB6VJjhtSGWnYaNgcBuRCa4_aewVLN5ljQSr4-eq94KdBS1Stf8g_bSPEUqVY82DbWT17j1g==&c=vAO7mgcWsevcr99psuD33kzShQw-FjMzbq8v6UmErqYHY9nPr8ltdw==&ch=Rywu6rFMeqyqo8RLBuCLuOg-iTxYWeAR8az9j5kx2eodMMz-rXommw==)

clean_body: We risk losing all the progress we’ve made if we don’t get caught up today. | | | | | == | Peter, Today is Trisha's birthday. And we wish there were better news to tell Trisha today so she could relax on her big day, but here's the truth: Grassroots donations are falling off yesterday and today, and we are at risk of missing our mid-month, and possibly quarterly, goals to defeat Lauren Boebert this election. | == To defeat Lauren Boebert and elect Trisha, we need to maintain strong fundraising every single day through to the election. As you can see, we took a hit this weekend and we need to get back on track. Thankfully, Trisha was raised on hard work and persistence, so she won't rest today until we get things where we need to be. But that means Trisha will likely be working the phones even beyond our usual scheduled call time--potentially staying in the room from 9 am today until 10 pm this evening (later for donors on the West Coast). A miserable day of non stop dialing for dollars. So we're coming to you today with a last-ditch request before we report our situation to Trisha: == | == Lauren Boebert is extremely vulnerable right now, and we may not get another opportunity to defeat her than we will this election. She survived re-election by a mere 546 votes. And when Trisha took her on in 2024, Boebert ran behind Trump in every single county while Trisha performed better than Kamala Harris in every county. Boebert can be beaten--Trisha just needs our support to do it. That's why these goals matter, and why Trisha would work through her birthday to make sure we hit them. We're asking for your help so she doesn't have to do that today. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Thank you for stepping up to help a candidate like Trisha who works so hard to fight for us. Sincerely, Team Trisha | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: Haley S.
subject: I wanted you to hear it from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I'm not trying to be alarmist, but here's the truth

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1641%2E49239%2EmKa84n)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10447?t=2&akid=1641%2E49239%2EmKa84n)
---
Null, I just got out of an emergency meeting with my finance team, and I need to be honest with you:
**Fundraising has been brutally slow this month.** We’re pacing well behind where we need to be, and with GOP megadonors already flooding this race with dark money, we cannot afford to fall short.
That’s why we’ve set an urgent $175,000 mid-month goal. I know. It’s ambitious, but it's necessary. **[Will you rush $5 right now to help us hit this goal and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10448?t=3&akid=1641%2E49239%2EmKa84n)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10449?t=4&akid=1641%2E49239%2EmKa84n)
---
I don’t mean to sound alarmist, but I do want to be clear: **This is one of the most important moments our campaign has faced so far.** MAGA Republicans are circling this seat. And if we fall behind now, I’m worried we won’t have the resources to fight back.
So I’m personally asking: **[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford so we can hit this goal, stay on track, and win this race?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10448?t=5&akid=1641%2E49239%2EmKa84n)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10448?t=6&akid=1641%2E49239%2EmKa84n)
---

---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10451?t=8&akid=1641%2E49239%2EmKa84n)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10449?t=9&akid=1641%2E49239%2EmKa84n)
---
Thank you for your urgent support,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10452?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1641%2E49239%2EmKa84n) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10447?t=11&akid=1641%2E49239%2EmKa84n)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: Friend, a 3-month fundraising blackout starts Jan 14
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | Friend — This is important. And I need to level with you. **Virginia law bans legislators from fundraising during the General Assembly session.** That means starting January 14th, I am legally barred from raising a single dollar for three months — right as Trump’s MAGA machine ramps up for the 2026 midterms and beyond. But here’s the truth we cannot ignore: **The stakes are high — and my district is a FRONTLINE SWING SEAT.** If we lose it, Democrats lose our majority. If we lose it, Trump’s allies get one step closer to controlling Virginia — and helping him seize Congress in 2026. _We cannot afford to go into this blackout underfunded._ Before the clock strikes midnight on January 13, we must build the resources to stay competitive, defend our progress, and push back against Trump’s agenda. ****[**Friend, can you donate TODAY to help us keep this seat blue and protect Virginia from MAGA extremism?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6P3FRkFikFXLI0eap87016mevaSsugUYPBO5DGR-jEt9MUFK-vTWpICaFS7KuRvP1BL6ByWWQXY9Y9P961aM8Gslzo4a3QJq_3ayzpxq78wE8uE7NHbgU28IuuntUE6ZtjhnNPsbLF3kK62I8hw6PsMSAVBWiIrmKgopdRKnllJJ_h_u5jyxrNOw1yS7PuWu1W6CAVk0G6DqddPGV-hD9LOC_gIR3SfRYBXuIO-6zjFFKr06hYZpBjp2g9fjsNsf3XFyB2ylnbsxgDV0XACHKWbQyzEeuq6Gskf2kFtR5eZb/4mg/qgOXvrV-TW-AnbTD2Q3LQA/h0/h001.2QYShr05UyffFYdqVglffqKzMabwDPSDv0d7oIJj9Ac)****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: Shared Humanity and Mutual Benefit
body:
Life is not a solo sport; neither is leadership
---
| | | | | |
---
| | **💥****Shared Humanity and Mutual Benefit****💥**
---
Life is not a solo sport; neither is leadership or innovation. We all need the equipping, encouraging, and emboldening that comes with strong, trusting relationships. All too often our rugged independence, a positive characteristic in many situations, causes us to neglect such relationships and try to solve our problems on our own. In doing so, we lose an important force multiplier that comes with friendships, partnerships, and collaborations based on shared humanity and mutual benefit.
In an adversarial environment, it is easy to see life as a zero-sum game. If someone wins, that means someone equally loses. There is only a fixed portion of benefits and rewards, and everyone is a competitor. This outlook prompts stagnation and limitation. Finding pathways for shared humanity and mutual benefit, on the other hand, prompts advancement and acceleration. It is a way to turbocharge innovation and break down barriers.
A powerful example of this concept came from my 14-month deployment to Iraq (May of 2020 to July of 2021). Because of my position as America’s Senior Defense Official and Defense Attaché, I represented our nation’s military to the Iraqi government. Despite the challenges of COVID-19 and severe security concerns, my position required me to leave our compound on a regular basis to meet with senior Iraqi leaders. Specifically, my calendar included a weekly meeting with the intimidating Iraqi Chief of Defense (CHOD), General Abdul Amir Yarallah.
Yarallah was a long-term, highly decorated member of the Iraqi Army. He was known as a stern leader, true warrior, and ruthless authoritarian. His bushy mustache rivals Tom Selleck’s, adding to his rugged look and tough demeanor. More intimidating was his close affiliation with the Iranian aligned militia groups that hated the American presence in Iraq.
These militias launched mortars at American-controlled facilities, hurled rockets at the showcase Iraqi Air Force base to chase away American contractors supporting the Iraqi F-16 program, ran drugs, extorted businesses to raise militia funds, and carried out ruthless assassinations. As Yarallah took his position as the CHOD shortly after I arrived at my deployment, I knew my challenges in dealing with him could be significant.
I sat down with the key leaders of my team, which included my very experienced cultural advisor, to figure out how to approach this problem. During that brainstorming session, we came to two primary conclusions.
First, we needed to find ways to connect with Yarallah at the personal, human level. One of the greatest ways to do so would be to highlight our shared experiences in the battle against ISIS. Iraqis and Americans had fought, bled, and died together fighting this common threat to humanity for the last several years. He had been on the front lines of this conflict, and the more we could connect through this commonality, the better we could move past some of the natural animosity.
Second, we needed to find ways to explore common interests and objectives. After all, he wanted to succeed in his new position, and that meant improving the sustainable capabilities of his proud military force. In many ways, the United States wanted the Iraqi security forces to improve their sustained military capabilities as well. This overlap provided a wealth of commonality we could explore for mutual benefit.
In the end, we needed to be emotionally intelligent and strategically savvy to connect with Yarallah and work together as human beings. We needed to be savvy enough to strategically understand the overlap of interests where we could explore the fertile ground of mutual benefit. On our side, we also used the growing connection to pull his circle of objectives slightly closer to ours to increase the overlap.
As a result of this mindset, our sessions with Yarallah were productive and professional. There were certainly times of tension, most notably when Yarallah sternly reminded me that we had recently killed his best friend – militia leader Abu Mahdi al-Muhandis. Yet, we were able to work through these issues because we had a reason and connection to do so.
There are stakeholders all around us, and the vast majority don’t have the level of innate hostility towards you or your cause as General Abdul Amir Yarallah had with us and ours. In fact, there are many stakeholders who enjoy significant overlap with you and your organization in their common objectives. In each of these cases, a bit of emotional intelligence and strategic savvy can allow you and your team to expand your efforts through win-win solutions that harness shared humanity and mutual benefit. Doing so will allow you to LEAD WELL!

* John

P.S. Not to get political, but here in the United States there should be plenty of shared humanity and mutual benefit in an environment that is not characterized by Iranian-supported rocket and mortar attacks, kidnappings, and assassinations that should allow for productive, professional engagement within our government. Someday ... inshallah (to borrow an Arabic phrase I heard often from Yarallah).
| | | | **Teichert in the Trenches**
---
| Washington, DC
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

clean_body: Life is not a solo sport; neither is leadership | | | | | | | | 💥Shared Humanity and Mutual Benefit💥 Life is not a solo sport; neither is leadership or innovation. We all need the equipping, encouraging, and emboldening that comes with strong, trusting relationships. All too often our rugged independence, a positive characteristic in many situations, causes us to neglect such relationships and try to solve our problems on our own. In doing so, we lose an important force multiplier that comes with friendships, partnerships, and collaborations based on shared humanity and mutual benefit. In an adversarial environment, it is easy to see life as a zero-sum game. If someone wins, that means someone equally loses. There is only a fixed portion of benefits and rewards, and everyone is a competitor. This outlook prompts stagnation and limitation. Finding pathways for shared humanity and mutual benefit, on the other hand, prompts advancement and acceleration. It is a way to turbocharge innovation and break down barriers. A powerful example of this concept came from my 14-month deployment to Iraq (May of 2020 to July of 2021). Because of my position as America’s Senior Defense Official and Defense Attaché, I represented our nation’s military to the Iraqi government. Despite the challenges of COVID-19 and severe security concerns, my position required me to leave our compound on a regular basis to meet with senior Iraqi leaders. Specifically, my calendar included a weekly meeting with the intimidating Iraqi Chief of Defense (CHOD), General Abdul Amir Yarallah. Yarallah was a long-term, highly decorated member of the Iraqi Army. He was known as a stern leader, true warrior, and ruthless authoritarian. His bushy mustache rivals Tom Selleck’s, adding to his rugged look and tough demeanor. More intimidating was his close affiliation with the Iranian aligned militia groups that hated the American presence in Iraq. These militias launched mortars at American-controlled facilities, hurled rockets at the showcase Iraqi Air Force base to chase away American contractors supporting the Iraqi F-16 program, ran drugs, extorted businesses to raise militia funds, and carried out ruthless assassinations. As Yarallah took his position as the CHOD shortly after I arrived at my deployment, I knew my challenges in dealing with him could be significant. I sat down with the key leaders of my team, which included my very experienced cultural advisor, to figure out how to approach this problem. During that brainstorming session, we came to two primary conclusions. First, we needed to find ways to connect with Yarallah at the personal, human level. One of the greatest ways to do so would be to highlight our shared experiences in the battle against ISIS. Iraqis and Americans had fought, bled, and died together fighting this common threat to humanity for the last several years. He had been on the front lines of this conflict, and the more we could connect through this commonality, the better we could move past some of the natural animosity. Second, we needed to find ways to explore common interests and objectives. After all, he wanted to succeed in his new position, and that meant improving the sustainable capabilities of his proud military force. In many ways, the United States wanted the Iraqi security forces to improve their sustained military capabilities as well. This overlap provided a wealth of commonality we could explore for mutual benefit. In the end, we needed to be emotionally intelligent and strategically savvy to connect with Yarallah and work together as human beings. We needed to be savvy enough to strategically understand the overlap of interests where we could explore the fertile ground of mutual benefit. On our side, we also used the growing connection to pull his circle of objectives slightly closer to ours to increase the overlap. As a result of this mindset, our sessions with Yarallah were productive and professional. There were certainly times of tension, most notably when Yarallah sternly reminded me that we had recently killed his best friend – militia leader Abu Mahdi al-Muhandis. Yet, we were able to work through these issues because we had a reason and connection to do so. There are stakeholders all around us, and the vast majority don’t have the level of innate hostility towards you or your cause as General Abdul Amir Yarallah had with us and ours. In fact, there are many stakeholders who enjoy significant overlap with you and your organization in their common objectives. In each of these cases, a bit of emotional intelligence and strategic savvy can allow you and your team to expand your efforts through win-win solutions that harness shared humanity and mutual benefit. Doing so will allow you to LEAD WELL! John P.S. Not to get political, but here in the United States there should be plenty of shared humanity and mutual benefit in an environment that is not characterized by Iranian-supported rocket and mortar attacks, kidnappings, and assassinations that should allow for productive, professional engagement within our government. Someday ... inshallah (to borrow an Arabic phrase I heard often from Yarallah). | | | | Teichert in the Trenches** | Washington, DC | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | You've received this email because you've subscribed to our newsletter. |

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is the work of a lifetime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I have a humble request to make today.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98500?refcode=em20251215-9819&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9819%2E614464%2EqIU6Vt)
Peter, I have spent my working life trying to make people's lives better, and it has been more than worth it. **[Now, I am running for the U.S. Senate to continue that work, but our toss-up race is getting closer, and I need your help to win. Split a donation between our campaign and Heartland Patriots today to say you’re with me.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98500?refcode=em20251215-9819&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9819%2E614464%2EqIU6Vt)**
I’m proud of what we have achieved together: expanding Medicaid. Getting raises for public school teachers. Investing in our clean energy economy.
The trust that North Carolinians have placed in me has meant so much. It gave me the opportunity to serve my home and allowed us to make real progress.
**I didn’t plan to go to Washington, but I got in this race for the U.S. Senate because that progress is on the line, along with so much more. For our state and for all Americans.**
I will not sit by and watch while extreme politicians tear away the rights that so many fought for so long to secure. I will do everything in my power to protect our country. **I know that this is the work of a lifetime.**
And it is work that I cannot do alone, so I’m humbly asking you to stand with me.
**[Peter, I am asking you to invest in our work by splitting a contribution between our campaign and Heartland Patriots today. National Republicans are rallying around my far-right opponent to try to defeat me, and I can’t overcome them alone. We can’t let Michael Whatley gain any more ground.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98500?refcode=em20251215-9819&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9819%2E614464%2EqIU6Vt)**
I know that we can win together, just like we have before.
Gratefully,
Roy Cooper

subject: It’s Trisha’s birthday, but she’s going to spend it in misery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:

| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bKqt4ZMUzI8tRhSl9F4RJ1TSRMS0qVks6HaSJkwtFBn4dD6yCHYZkf22PsYXblyurcOnbPsVpaankHH0d5fdTKAnYzIGjBZUd9lWx-WUYhxW0OfwGF2J1TBsEX_4PwERsDDp6ce6pHQef7C2PFo3BD9Xl0qCHEZS93k67m0wBtQ46pi6bM5ODKAkR2VQQeXEfC3OB6WVgEqDyts9h-cYZLefBQusH5HX&c=77sWZ9kcMBwSj1UoHyL-tkWBW858dPuCL0yVVzUJzYnDgZimlk1Stg==&ch=fy9u0kyQhtH-9MzJ2ZCb4lSCGGtQi41eJGZGMheRHWshNYtLkMC5qg==)

Peter,
Today is Trisha's birthday. And we wish there were better news to tell Trisha today so she could relax on her big day, but here's the truth:
Grassroots donations are falling off yesterday and today, and we are at risk of missing our mid-month, and possibly quarterly, goals to defeat Lauren Boebert this election.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bKqt4ZMUzI8tRhSl9F4RJ1TSRMS0qVks6HaSJkwtFBn4dD6yCHYZkf22PsYXblyurcOnbPsVpaankHH0d5fdTKAnYzIGjBZUd9lWx-WUYhxW0OfwGF2J1TBsEX_4PwERsDDp6ce6pHQef7C2PFo3BD9Xl0qCHEZS93k67m0wBtQ46pi6bM5ODKAkR2VQQeXEfC3OB6WVgEq-UvV4-Lj-O_YQxBoxwtQ7&c=77sWZ9kcMBwSj1UoHyL-tkWBW858dPuCL0yVVzUJzYnDgZimlk1Stg==&ch=fy9u0kyQhtH-9MzJ2ZCb4lSCGGtQi41eJGZGMheRHWshNYtLkMC5qg==)
---
To defeat Lauren Boebert and elect Trisha, we need to maintain strong fundraising every single day through to the election. As you can see, we took a hit this weekend and we need to get back on track.
Thankfully, Trisha was raised on hard work and persistence, so she won't rest today until we get things where we need to be.
But that means Trisha will likely be working the phones even beyond our usual scheduled call time--potentially staying in the room from 9 am today until 10 pm this evening (later for donors on the West Coast). A miserable day of non stop dialing for dollars.
So we're coming to you today with a last-ditch request before we report our situation to Trisha: [Can you chip in just $5 (or more if you can do it right now) to help us do our part to meet our mid-month goal and make this an extra special birthday for Trisha?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bKqt4ZMUzI8tRhSl9F4RJ1TSRMS0qVks6HaSJkwtFBn4dD6yCHYZkf22PsYXblyuXvIXjaGrAdBYxaYu_FGeAocvnxCCQTvzWddikgM5fWZU8s50ooG0IK3zDXtMzoBwZH078L8ldcjflzA_d4p8GcIbjqq0H5uwEK13GSjeRF9DwrUbMESbiC3VLyqVHhdgujZGZiqDGFfaWXpxGCp3LZtSdiBmlY3L3P1emMK1i7WQ021xL1Zd-g==&c=77sWZ9kcMBwSj1UoHyL-tkWBW858dPuCL0yVVzUJzYnDgZimlk1Stg==&ch=fy9u0kyQhtH-9MzJ2ZCb4lSCGGtQi41eJGZGMheRHWshNYtLkMC5qg==)
---
| [DONATE](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bKqt4ZMUzI8tRhSl9F4RJ1TSRMS0qVks6HaSJkwtFBn4dD6yCHYZkf22PsYXblyurcOnbPsVpaankHH0d5fdTKAnYzIGjBZUd9lWx-WUYhxW0OfwGF2J1TBsEX_4PwERsDDp6ce6pHQef7C2PFo3BD9Xl0qCHEZS93k67m0wBtQ46pi6bM5ODKAkR2VQQeXEfC3OB6WVgEp1o9YLlZ7I7YGd17a5yQ_A&c=77sWZ9kcMBwSj1UoHyL-tkWBW858dPuCL0yVVzUJzYnDgZimlk1Stg==&ch=fy9u0kyQhtH-9MzJ2ZCb4lSCGGtQi41eJGZGMheRHWshNYtLkMC5qg==)
---
Lauren Boebert is extremely vulnerable right now, and we may not get another opportunity to defeat her than we will this election. She survived re-election by a mere 546 votes. And when Trisha took her on in 2024, Boebert ran behind Trump in every single county while Trisha performed better than Kamala Harris in every county.
Boebert can be beaten--Trisha just needs our support to do it.
That's why these goals matter, and why Trisha would work through her birthday to make sure we hit them. We're asking for your help so she doesn't have to do that today.
[If everyone reading this email gave $5 or more, we would meet our mid-month goal of $10,000 raised today. Can you help wish Trisha a happy birthday by chipping in to get us to our goal today?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bKqt4ZMUzI8tRhSl9F4RJ1TSRMS0qVks6HaSJkwtFBn4dD6yCHYZkf22PsYXblyuXvIXjaGrAdBYxaYu_FGeAocvnxCCQTvzWddikgM5fWZU8s50ooG0IK3zDXtMzoBwZH078L8ldcjflzA_d4p8GcIbjqq0H5uwEK13GSjeRF9DwrUbMESbiC3VLyqVHhdgujZGZiqDGFfaWXpxGCp3LZtSdiBmlY3L05nGnpLVJgyY8y3HjZ4h6g==&c=77sWZ9kcMBwSj1UoHyL-tkWBW858dPuCL0yVVzUJzYnDgZimlk1Stg==&ch=fy9u0kyQhtH-9MzJ2ZCb4lSCGGtQi41eJGZGMheRHWshNYtLkMC5qg==)

clean_body: We risk losing all the progress we’ve made if we don’t get caught up today. | | | | | == | Peter, Today is Trisha's birthday. And we wish there were better news to tell Trisha today so she could relax on her big day, but here's the truth: Grassroots donations are falling off yesterday and today, and we are at risk of missing our mid-month, and possibly quarterly, goals to defeat Lauren Boebert this election. | == To defeat Lauren Boebert and elect Trisha, we need to maintain strong fundraising every single day through to the election. As you can see, we took a hit this weekend and we need to get back on track. Thankfully, Trisha was raised on hard work and persistence, so she won't rest today until we get things where we need to be. But that means Trisha will likely be working the phones even beyond our usual scheduled call time--potentially staying in the room from 9 am today until 10 pm this evening (later for donors on the West Coast). A miserable day of non stop dialing for dollars. So we're coming to you today with a last-ditch request before we report our situation to Trisha: == | == Lauren Boebert is extremely vulnerable right now, and we may not get another opportunity to defeat her than we will this election. She survived re-election by a mere 546 votes. And when Trisha took her on in 2024, Boebert ran behind Trump in every single county while Trisha performed better than Kamala Harris in every county. Boebert can be beaten--Trisha just needs our support to do it. That's why these goals matter, and why Trisha would work through her birthday to make sure we hit them. We're asking for your help so she doesn't have to do that today. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Thank you for stepping up to help a candidate like Trisha who works so hard to fight for us. Sincerely, Team Trisha | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: Team Walz
subject: A Hardee’s drive-thru
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251215-289&t=1&akid=289%2E34582%2EHLIadG)
Peter,
Normally, when someone is going through a fast-food drive-thru, they’re eagerly awaiting a delicious burger and some crispy french fries. Not Mike Lindell though. When he’s going through a drive-thru, **he’s getting his phone seized by the FBI**.
You read that right.
Mike Lindell’s conspiracy theories caught up to him in 2022 in a Mankato Hardee’s drive-thru, when his phone was seized in relation to a federal investigation into his acts to undermine the 2020 election.
**We can say this for sure: Governor Walz has not had his phone seized by the FBI in a Hardee’s drive-thru. Have you?**
**[If you’re with Tim, and haven’t been surrounded by FBI agents in a fast food drive-thru because you’re being federally investigated — chip in $5 to keep someone who has from becoming governor of Minnesota.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251215.bZkSnr&amount=5&refcode=em20251215-289&t=2&akid=289%2E34582%2EHLIadG)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251215.bZkSnr&amount=5&refcode=20251215-289&t=21&akid=289%2E34582%2EHLIadG)**
Our apologies if we made you hungry reading this,
Team Walz

**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251215-289&t=22&refcode2=289_34582_HLIadG&akid=289%2E34582%2EHLIadG)**

name: Lily Tang
subject: I never got to use a toilet seat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lily4Congress Committee
body:
I owe my life to the United States of America. | | | [](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=8d2be1b2b1ba4fa6bed8f66348f746b1&_e=QtbxlvfYJ_AHmV-Hya4uRZY349Sku8KR1ggF2OwsMPC7eH3mCUMDJA8CrbMqShfpTIq735MxcRPaI4K3MAa5v3IGt-e0etUGtCBgVlQ02Bo-xRF840aRdE-VLR4kbJEJKHctKOixc6zT7yEpzU47GRGcu5ZTPnZJsUjIle_PuCQ2NysHiW7R3Tp0BUVEkTa8tcEcfeKrWKPsRjayepDXfpXbUMz3it56721ki_KfTTSs6ABVPd5UfWOk06utbD8rQA1qjNasXnD1YT2PklHLLH-64CAncpC6iVcFOHXyYb7lIfCCEFj6DxJ77w7RqamUpY7oZ5D3tDI0m2x1TsSztjQUUv_Kj1wYTw01WGG0KR3vT2aI-JosI55_LkAogWj8u4qm1P5tp2A3IBVmarbeJKzmPh2cx9krCVbEXIaCW6E%3D)
---
I never got to use a toilet seat. Instead, we had to share a hole in the ground with 8 other families. I was raised on food rationing coupons in the Sichuan province of China during Mao’s Cultural Revolution. I was only a child, yet I worshiped him like a God. I had no other choice. I was brainwashed. We all were. Eventually, I was able to escape from China and flee to the United States.
---
[](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=8d2be1b2b1ba4fa6bed8f66348f746b1&_e=QtbxlvfYJ_AHmV-Hya4uRZY349Sku8KR1ggF2OwsMPC7eH3mCUMDJA8CrbMqShfpTIq735MxcRPaI4K3MAa5v3IGt-e0etUGtCBgVlQ02BpRIPkbfONXIw8W2xzj_HKYzy60ObOQ3jovOAl8nPQVWHsBS3-cloI_mIcY3D4rqNTixccoOTE6nJ760v8gJwVn0XF6Ct5q992j7DZ-3CFuT4BJjv6HD1KEYd7DNonPyfq5Z-HtLUFTzP5bo0BE8rUQHZzasNqjP8EIfxjPjo3577vnvmPFQeZ_nxPM_M0C0gSVfTxsdZUl_c1CYHsjthTDJBKllCMPP-HYil7W1Sk1Mje3pcbz36tSlZKf7va7xXqX0BiJX1JexVS4VcJHuxSTKAInaLSAJaMzHXlNjIFh_7qvyrcafA23t8iwe4Zxtss%3D)
---
I spent the next 20 years uninstalling everything Mao’s regime had programmed into my brain, only to discover the very same evil was now being promoted in America and celebrated by the radical left. Then it hit me. I wasn’t just a product of the American Dream - I was also a survivor of Communist rule. [My name is Lily Tang Williams, and I’m the Republican running for Congress in New Hampshire's 2nd Congressional District.](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=8d2be1b2b1ba4fa6bed8f66348f746b1&_e=QtbxlvfYJ_AHmV-Hya4uRZY349Sku8KR1ggF2OwsMPC7eH3mCUMDJA8CrbMqShfpTIq735MxcRPaI4K3MAa5v3IGt-e0etUGtCBgVlQ02BpeGH72iptlMG9Sxyj_tAZ-SuDphrIvSPx2SD-f6ZvEkzb42b66IuNLvJPr_K1mRaUWAcHpwqpnZIEOxu9UrMk3uA0T62_CoLnNrvWhi-P7CkPEzD5SD3hBIGjh0LyEC5cixp8TkWIZamMLSSdq2LwpyxyHgRQXztDy_EqYUzxFV20C00nSY2u0-iPdK_E_oehhhJxny_wYLo-ThaUfk76oWFYMFpHAZtDKPENpHOzBo1fwGCQaj3UhMOw0CfbniGdtsn14BfJYoLeOwE4uLWdfkNSEREHG0MyfvyvZaHHM0tTHRtU7-v1NgS22VsrmjSo%3D)
---
[ **SUPPORT LILY'S CAMPAIGN** ](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=8d2be1b2b1ba4fa6bed8f66348f746b1&_e=QtbxlvfYJ_AHmV-Hya4uRZY349Sku8KR1ggF2OwsMPC7eH3mCUMDJA8CrbMqShfpTIq735MxcRPaI4K3MAa5v3IGt-e0etUGtCBgVlQ02BqHEjRHYX-dynqi-ARqUH67cJPDzN51rArmGLxFybE_OQMOWGg_Q5O8EjU0RZcPwLXrcyn-gIJYtYcDxcQfj4kfyqoxXm5IAEt4_b6k3_f7oO5So0brSdIoFg8UdQOb70crlFQNEesQn0YS6j-JI0ovLHoUs56CTKj8zjIDMuKmLpxhHzzoEJDniipmY0nFLbIs0uqF__6tPqXKPRaWlnWa5WjsAetutRCa0KnqKZBabuQCcT6CEsgtegn4mKNsror9RHA8doL4t39CMZv913mFz_8wfKYcvZnep1_4e9CYlPHX48CQgWWi5uinwq4eFV4%3D)
---
My story, my voice, and my campaign endanger everything the Democrats have built their party on - _I don’t fit their mold_. [And now they’re preparing to spend millions to browbeat me into silence & end my candidacy.](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=8d2be1b2b1ba4fa6bed8f66348f746b1&_e=QtbxlvfYJ_AHmV-Hya4uRZY349Sku8KR1ggF2OwsMPC7eH3mCUMDJA8CrbMqShfpTIq735MxcRPaI4K3MAa5v3IGt-e0etUGtCBgVlQ02BopNHfgtiBZZbDibgSOGwtw8ESXMLdTxeW3JQWIGR5JwuAaPz6S_NJ5T0R7H5rj7y2kMOkUnBlbeR9XTS9dw9AHOw6NGO-Cm5ecTFcpBn_R22jz9P_vBuDt4mqBAbnftTtQBUldiYgS1Sahu1mwtUAnWb95jHFlq8h4Raghk7o-1XjfZT8_LPhGcyaL-lcVnIHh4tKeAVDPstbHltuEeTbicW-DDgahvc8hhaBbakFfIUcwFYBWJi1qn3nZO0Gl5zdmwSIMKWxzkdGwbgjocDtopIe-FxK4V0OTRzu86a74tF-zl4cFiO7WSmBbeQUHWZU%3D) That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help today. My candidacy & our country truly do depend on it. I hope you’ll do what you can to save both today. Help me make history, Patriot.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: We must act.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team -
Once again, my heart breaks that another school has to experience the pain and tragedy of gun violence.
Less than 48 hours ago, a gunman opened fire at Brown University in Providence, Rhode Island — killing 2 students and injuring at least 9 others. As details continue to emerge, I’m grateful for the first responders on the scene and pray for the victims, survivors, and their families.
This shooting came on the second day of final exams. Students should only have to worry about studying — not hiding from gunfire.
Guns are the leading cause of death for young people in America. More than car crashes and cancer. Gun violence is a crisis and we cannot ignore it.
Americans are tired of waiting around for our leaders in Washington to decide that our children's lives matter. We must use every tool at our disposal to take on the gun lobby and keep our communities safe.
At GIFFORDS, we will continue fighting for change and will not rest until we have a future free from gun violence.
One life lost to preventable gun violence is one too many. We must act.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords

**Please take a second to read this...**
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/61660?c0=giffords-em-q42025.9aQs58&refcode=em251215-1-b&t=1&akid=11116%2E3935704%2ET8GD1q)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=11116%2E3935704%2ET8GD1q) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Running out of time…
body:
---
Derek, In just a few weeks — for the last time this year — we will be required to report what we’ve raised this month. The truth is, _everyone_ will be watching that number. The amount we raise will tell a story: A lot of contributions will show the strength of Democrats’ opposition to Trump and his agenda heading into next year’s midterms. _They’ll show we aren’t done fighting_. **There is nothing Donald Trump and his Republican cronies would like more than for us to take our resounding victories this year as permission to take our foot off the gas.** Derek, we need to show Republicans that we’re not slowing down and we’re not giving up. The best way we can do that is by reporting the strongest possible end-of-year fundraising results. [**Can you pitch in $7 to the DNC to help show Republicans that we are far from done? Your donation will help us build the infrastructure we need to win up and down the ballot and across the country in 2026.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251215_5521_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5521_22930333_Hbqypv&akid=5521%2E22930333%2EHbqypv) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251215_5521_fr&refcode2=5521_22930333_Hbqypv&akid=5521%2E22930333%2EHbqypv)**

name: Voter Survey [Voter Action Project]
subject: Firing nonpartisan officials?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NYT: Trump Fires BLS Commissioner, Claiming Weak Jobs Numbers Were ‘Rigged’ [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NYT_Trump_BLSChiefFired.png]
President Trump was angry about weakness in the labor market this year, previously saying without evidence that the data were “rigged” and then firing the bipartisanly Senate-confirmed Department of Labor official responsible for pulling together the numbers each month.
The president had fired the official after the bureau released monthly jobs data showing surprisingly weak hiring in July and large downward revisions to job growth in the previous two months. The report was widely interpreted as evidence that Mr. Trump’s policies were taking a toll on the economy.
The firing could further erode trust in government statistics and make it more difficult for policymakers, investors, and businesses to make critical economic decisions.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on this news. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should Trump be firing nonpartisan officials for releasing data that doesn't align with his own political outlook?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=121525_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=121525_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121525_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121525_1&amount=20]

name: Lauren Toncich, Turning Point USA
subject: Only days left
body:
My name is Lauren Toncich — and for the past seven years, I’ve helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event.

| | |
---
| | Hi Friend,

My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event.

Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable.

I've never emailed you directly before.

But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room...

Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdsqg09a6fj9u1f7ka01eg6erb5nf5o4hv6n1ang_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c3j64ob0cjh2bs)
---
_Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. _
---
At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: _Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. _

**And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. **

**This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. **

It will be our first AmFest without Charlie.

This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards.

Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures.

He believed they needed to _FEEL_ the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world.

Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: _" Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" _

Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash...

But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction.

_And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. _
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zan06i6av877v9mjo5bbmbj95prcb07emnhjpmu0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c3j64ob0cjh2bs)
---
This year's AmFest?

_I 've never seen more students eager to be part of it. _

**Nearly 6,000 are registered. Another 2,200 are on the waitlist. **

**And we only have a few days left to get them in. **

Friend, these students aren't looking for entertainment...

They're looking for courage, purpose, and a movement to belong to.

They're stepping onto hostile campuses. They're getting flak from Leftist professors.

Many are leading Turning Point chapters in places where they're told to sit down, shut up -- or worse.

**They want to stand for America... _They just need a chance to stand with others who will, too. _**

And when they get to AmFest, it's not just the main stage that changes their lives.

Behind the lights and cameras, they sit in smaller breakout rooms -- face-to-face with staff and speakers who show them exactly how to lead.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8hbjmjjn1ermucjcobv5ui0qqhbvnj7df4ecquo_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c3j64ob0cjh2bs)
---
They learn how to organize. How to launch and grow chapters. How to push back against the Left -- strategically and fearlessly.

They're trained to fight -- and win.

Because inspiration is just the beginning. We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into.

**Friend, that 's where you can make a difference. **

**Every $50 you give today helps sponsor a student to attend AmericaFest. And today, your gift will be MATCHED -- dollar-for-dollar. **

That means:

🔥 $50 sends TWO students
🔥 $100 sends FOUR
🔥 $250 sends EIGHT, and more.

**[You can be the reason a future leader walks into AmFest this December-- instead of staying home wondering if they're alone in this fight.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z147tlk3s3bbcfk8rlo4tqcndlah3tbei0a88nfo_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c3j64ob0cjh2bs)**
---
[ **Sponsor a Student for AmFest
****& Double Your Impact**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1jbh2mvefmcrgo3pvve6ek72r5eb3sbad4jvgto_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c3j64ob0cjh2bs)
---
Every year, I see it firsthand:

Students walk in with doubts, with fears, with barely enough money to afford the flight.

They walk out with confidence, connection, and a new sense of calling.

I've seen them go home and start chapters. I've seen them run for office.

Many tell me -- even years later, that this one event changed everything.

_So no -- I'm not just asking you to sponsor an "event." _

**I 'm asking you to help change the trajectory of a young patriot. **

[**A young patriot who could be the next leader, the next fighter, the next firebrand that helps save this country.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1knj3c91lpuc3c6t903o4e1no5gh65tuajr0g1o_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c3j64ob0cjh2bs)
---
[ **Sponsor a Student for AmFest
****& Double Your Impact**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh8i74a0m62od9q6k1r6k63vq4i1dfne16so9lt0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c3j64ob0cjh2bs)
---
Friend, I know what Charlie would want right now.

He'd want every seat filled. He'd want AmFest to echo with boldness and fire.

He'd want us to fight like he's still backstage -- still calling for more sparks.

Most of all, he'd want every student who made the trip to believe they were part of something bigger than themselves.

To walk in searching for purpose -- and leave filled with it. .

Let's make sure every young patriot who wants to fight for this country gets their chance -- and gets to Phoenix this December.
---
| | **For Charlie, **

**Lauren Toncich **
Vice President of Events
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdqdraat5psvrsjn8k5o6v1bo35cb29vrqfdeck0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c3j64ob0cjh2bs)
---
[**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zttjjbpfa1j8p2sqqvg1nvhj10p757gfsjippa08_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c3j64ob0cjh2bs) **P.S.** This is our first AmericaFest without Charlie. But it will be the most important one we've ever hosted.

Help us fill the room he loved -- with students ready to carry his mission forward.

clean_body: My name is Lauren Toncich — and for the past seven years, I’ve helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event. | | | | | Hi Friend, My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event. Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable. I've never emailed you directly before. But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room... Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team. Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. It will be our first AmFest without Charlie. This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards. Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures. He believed they needed to FEEL the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world. Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: " Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash... But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction. And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. This year's AmFest? I 've never seen more students eager to be part of it. Nearly 6,000 are registered. Another 2,200 are on the waitlist. And we only have a few days left to get them in. Friend, these students aren't looking for entertainment... They're looking for courage, purpose, and a movement to belong to. They're stepping onto hostile campuses. They're getting flak from Leftist professors. Many are leading Turning Point chapters in places where they're told to sit down, shut up -- or worse. They want to stand for America... They just need a chance to stand with others who will, too. And when they get to AmFest, it's not just the main stage that changes their lives. Behind the lights and cameras, they sit in smaller breakout rooms -- face-to-face with staff and speakers who show them exactly how to lead. They learn how to organize. How to launch and grow chapters. How to push back against the Left -- strategically and fearlessly. They're trained to fight -- and win. Because inspiration is just the beginning. We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into. Friend, that 's where you can make a difference. Every $50 you give today helps sponsor a student to attend AmericaFest. And today, your gift will be MATCHED -- dollar-for-dollar. That means: 🔥 $50 sends TWO students 🔥 $100 sends FOUR 🔥 $250 sends EIGHT, and more. Every year, I see it firsthand: Students walk in with doubts, with fears, with barely enough money to afford the flight. They walk out with confidence, connection, and a new sense of calling. I've seen them go home and start chapters. I've seen them run for office. Many tell me -- even years later, that this one event changed everything. So no -- I'm not just asking you to sponsor an "event." I 'm asking you to help change the trajectory of a young patriot. Friend, I know what Charlie would want right now. He'd want every seat filled. He'd want AmFest to echo with boldness and fire. He'd want us to fight like he's still backstage -- still calling for more sparks. Most of all, he'd want every student who made the trip to believe they were part of something bigger than themselves. To walk in searching for purpose -- and leave filled with it. . Let's make sure every young patriot who wants to fight for this country gets their chance -- and gets to Phoenix this December. | | For Charlie, Lauren Toncich Vice President of Events Turning Point USA P.S. This is our first AmericaFest without Charlie. But it will be the most important one we've ever hosted. Help us fill the room he loved -- with students ready to carry his mission forward. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| Peter,
MAGA judges just tore Democracy to shreds in Arkansas.
In a jaw-dropping ruling, the Arkansas Supreme Court detonated 74 years of precedent and handed the state Legislature a loaded gun to use against voters. With this decision, the court blessed a system where lawmakers can erase the will of the voters and undo any constitutional amendment.
The people speak, and MAGA politicians hit delete--hell on earth.

This is the MAGA playbook. When they can't win elections, they capture courts, install judges, and use them to crush democracy and lock MAGA rule into law. Arkansas is the proof.
And if we don't stop this now, it will spread.
In November, Defend Our Courts helped protect Pennsylvania's Supreme Court from a MAGA takeover. MAGA didn't just lose that election, they got wrecked. It was a blowout. Voters showed up, the court held, and democracy survived.
Now we're taking that same winning strategy to Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan in 2026, where control of the courts could decide abortion rights, fair elections, and the future of our democracy.
But here's the hard truth: we're facing three court fights at once. To hit MAGA with the same force we brought in Pennsylvania, we need three times the resources, and we need to start now.

body:

Mark Kelly’s most important supporters aren’t the people who write the biggest checks.
#

Friend —
Mark Kelly’s most important supporters aren’t the people who write the biggest checks.
They’re the people who were there when it mattered most.
People like you.

Your support has been critical in helping Mark combat MAGA extremism.
You helped us flip this seat in Arizona in 2020 and re-elect Mark in 2022. And now, it’s helping Mark fight back against his most serious challenge yet — threats of arrest and execution from the President of the United States. Seriously.
---

But here’s something we thought you should know: Out of all the people who read these emails, less than 25% of them have made a donation to support his work.
Today, we’re asking you to join them.
---

Mark’s average online donation is around $27. Most people chip in much less than that. But with so much at stake this November, all that matters is that you’re helping us support critical races and elect Democrats up and down the ballot.
We’ll put it right to work helping Mark not only defend himself against these dangerous attacks, but to go on offense hold Donald Trumo and his Administration accountable

# **Erika Kirk and Candace Owens to meet privately Monday**
Erika Kirk **[announced on X Sunday](https://substack.com/redirect/8465c907-4555-4f42-8000-9f1f896e5ed8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that she and commentator Candace Owens will meet for a private, in-person discussion on December 15, marking the first direct conversation between the two after weeks of mounting tensions over conspiracy theories surrounding Charlie Kirk's death, with both women agreeing to pause "public discussions, livestreams, and tweets" until after the meeting.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8465c907-4555-4f42-8000-9f1f896e5ed8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Erika expresses emotional toll of online speculation:** At a recent CBS town hall, Erika told people making unfounded claims to "Stop. That's it. That's all I have to say. Stop," and on Fox News' "Outnumbered" she condemned those "making hundreds and thousands of dollars every single episode going after the people that I love because somehow they're in on this," expressing outrage at attacks on her family and the Turning Point USA community.
* **Former friends now on opposite sides of heated controversy:** The relationship between the two women, who had earlier history of collaboration and personal friendship, has deteriorated sharply in recent months, placing them on different sides of a sensitive moment, though their decision to meet privately shows signs of "a mutual desire to speak directly while reducing misunderstandings and avoiding further speculation" as Erika focuses on preserving her late husband's legacy since his September assassination.

# **Actor Rob Reiner and wife found with throats slit after family argument**
Legendary director Rob Reiner, 78, and his wife of 36 years, Michelle Singer Reiner, 68, **[had their throats slit](https://substack.com/redirect/82c90bf9-4bef-4457-9e7f-e294089d5853?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a heated argument with a family member inside their Los Angeles home and were found Sunday afternoon by their daughter Romy, according to TMZ.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/82c90bf9-4bef-4457-9e7f-e294089d5853?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Daughter identifies family member as suspect:** Romy immediately told police the killer was another family member who "should be a suspect" because they're "dangerous," with sources earlier telling The Post that the couple's 32-year-old son, Nick Reiner, is being eyed as a person of interest in the investigation.
* **Couple had three children together:** Rob Reiner, director of "The Princess Bride," married photographer Michele Singer in 1989 and had three children together--sons Jake and Nick, and daughter Romy--and additionally has a daughter, Tracy Reiner, from his first marriage to actress and filmmaker Penny Marshall.

* * *
# **First victim of deadly Brow University shooting identified as Republican club VP**
The first victim of Saturday's deadly Brown University shooting has been **[identified as Ella Cook,](https://substack.com/redirect/cfb48d99-3467-445f-8634-d4de08ddfa3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** a sophomore student and vice president of the school's College Republican club, with the news shared during a service at the Cathedral Church of the Advent in her hometown of Birmingham, Alabama.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cfb48d99-3467-445f-8634-d4de08ddfa3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ella Cook/ LinkedIn
* **Priest remembers Cook as "tremendous bright light":** A priest at Cook's parish described her as a "tremendous bright light" who brought peace and faith to all those around her through her frequent service at the church, with Cook survived by her parents and two siblings.
* **Former student praises Cook 's kindness amid controversy:** Former Brown student Alex Shieh, who dropped out last semester, said Cook was "one of the only people who dared to associate with him" after he came under fire for sending a DOGE-inspired email to thousands of administrators, writing "Everyone at Brown who knew Ella, regardless of their politics, found her to be friendly and kind."
* **Two dead, nine injured in finals review session shooting:** Cook was one of two students gunned down during a finals review session at Brown University on Saturday afternoon, with the other student not yet publicly identified, while nine others were injured--including North Carolina student Kendall Turner who remains in critical condition, with eight others stabilized and one discharged.

* * *
# **Trump predicts "Golden Age" manufacturing boom within six months**
President Trump projected Sunday that America will experience an unprecedented **[manufacturing revival](https://substack.com/redirect/3681f842-1911-4ec2-9205-548addfd8144?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** driven by his tariff policies, promising thousands of new factories and plants despite recent lackluster economic indicators.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3681f842-1911-4ec2-9205-548addfd8144?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Optimistic timeline set:** Speaking at a White House Christmas reception, Trump cited Toyota's $10 billion U.S. investment commitment while declaring factories from Germany, Japan, and Canada will flood into America to avoid tariffs, predicting visible results within six months to a year that represent growth "the likes of which this country has never seen."
* **Economic headwinds persist:** The rosy forecast comes as unemployment ticked up from 4.3% to 4.4% in September, manufacturing activity declined for nine consecutive months through November per the Institute for Supply Management, and the Federal Reserve cut interest rates by .25% to 3.5%-3.75% amid soft job market conditions and inflation concerns.
* **Implementation uncertainty:** Some economists attribute economic turbulence to tariff policy unpredictability as the administration frequently revised its protectionist approach throughout the year, though officials signal major adjustments are complete following "Liberation Day" tariffs--yet a Supreme Court decision expected by June could undermine the legal foundation for Trump's tariff agenda.

Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent reinforced Trump's confidence, telling Fox News he anticipates "substantial acceleration in the economy in the first, second quarter" with price improvements already visible.

clean_body: "Play the video!!" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "Play the video!!" | | | Dec 15 | | | | | | | | | | | | GOP Rep. Eli Crane responded to pearl-clutching Democrats attacking ICE agents by playing a video in the middle of a hearing revealing muslim migrants admitting they prefer Sharia Law to American law. "Play the video!" Sharia Law is the Islamic legal code that includes medieval punishments for homosexuality, oppression of women and amputation for the crime of theft, many such punishments are carried out in Islamic countries around the world today. Erika Kirk and Candace Owens to meet privately Monday Erika Kirk that she and commentator Candace Owens will meet for a private, in-person discussion on December 15, marking the first direct conversation between the two after weeks of mounting tensions over conspiracy theories surrounding Charlie Kirk's death, with both women agreeing to pause "public discussions, livestreams, and tweets" until after the meeting. | | ---|---|--- Erika expresses emotional toll of online speculation: At a recent CBS town hall, Erika told people making unfounded claims to "Stop. That's it. That's all I have to say. Stop," and on Fox News' "Outnumbered" she condemned those "making hundreds and thousands of dollars every single episode going after the people that I love because somehow they're in on this," expressing outrage at attacks on her family and the Turning Point USA community. Former friends now on opposite sides of heated controversy: The relationship between the two women, who had earlier history of collaboration and personal friendship, has deteriorated sharply in recent months, placing them on different sides of a sensitive moment, though their decision to meet privately shows signs of "a mutual desire to speak directly while reducing misunderstandings and avoiding further speculation" as Erika focuses on preserving her late husband's legacy since his September assassination. "Too old to live"? Terrifying medical AI hits American doctor's offices | | ---|---|--- What happens when an AI computer thinks you 're "too old to save"? That's the terrifying reality happening in exam rooms across America... As machines (not doctors) are deciding who gets care ... and who doesn't. A new jaw-dropping video takes you behind the scenes and exposes EVERYTHING. P.S. AI makes mistakes 45% of the time. And most of the time your doctor is NOT required to tell you he 's using AI. Before your next exam, Actor Rob Reiner and wife found with throats slit after family argument Legendary director Rob Reiner, 78, and his wife of 36 years, Michelle Singer Reiner, 68, during a heated argument with a family member inside their Los Angeles home and were found Sunday afternoon by their daughter Romy, according to TMZ. | | ---|---|--- Daughter identifies family member as suspect: Romy immediately told police the killer was another family member who "should be a suspect" because they're "dangerous," with sources earlier telling The Post that the couple's 32-year-old son, Nick Reiner, is being eyed as a person of interest in the investigation. Couple had three children together: Rob Reiner, director of "The Princess Bride," married photographer Michele Singer in 1989 and had three children together--sons Jake and Nick, and daughter Romy--and additionally has a daughter, Tracy Reiner, from his first marriage to actress and filmmaker Penny Marshall. First victim of deadly Brow University shooting identified as Republican club VP The first victim of Saturday's deadly Brown University shooting has been a sophomore student and vice president of the school's College Republican club, with the news shared during a service at the Cathedral Church of the Advent in her hometown of Birmingham, Alabama. | | ---|---|--- Ella Cook/ LinkedIn Priest remembers Cook as "tremendous bright light": A priest at Cook's parish described her as a "tremendous bright light" who brought peace and faith to all those around her through her frequent service at the church, with Cook survived by her parents and two siblings. Former student praises Cook 's kindness amid controversy: Former Brown student Alex Shieh, who dropped out last semester, said Cook was "one of the only people who dared to associate with him" after he came under fire for sending a DOGE-inspired email to thousands of administrators, writing "Everyone at Brown who knew Ella, regardless of their politics, found her to be friendly and kind." Two dead, nine injured in finals review session shooting: Cook was one of two students gunned down during a finals review session at Brown University on Saturday afternoon, with the other student not yet publicly identified, while nine others were injured--including North Carolina student Kendall Turner who remains in critical condition, with eight others stabilized and one discharged. Trump predicts "Golden Age" manufacturing boom within six months President Trump projected Sunday that America will experience an unprecedented driven by his tariff policies, promising thousands of new factories and plants despite recent lackluster economic indicators. | | ---|---|--- Optimistic timeline set: Speaking at a White House Christmas reception, Trump cited Toyota's $10 billion U.S. investment commitment while declaring factories from Germany, Japan, and Canada will flood into America to avoid tariffs, predicting visible results within six months to a year that represent growth "the likes of which this country has never seen." Economic headwinds persist: The rosy forecast comes as unemployment ticked up from 4.3% to 4.4% in September, manufacturing activity declined for nine consecutive months through November per the Institute for Supply Management, and the Federal Reserve cut interest rates by .25% to 3.5%-3.75% amid soft job market conditions and inflation concerns. Implementation uncertainty: Some economists attribute economic turbulence to tariff policy unpredictability as the administration frequently revised its protectionist approach throughout the year, though officials signal major adjustments are complete following "Liberation Day" tariffs--yet a Supreme Court decision expected by June could undermine the legal foundation for Trump's tariff agenda. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent reinforced Trump's confidence, telling Fox News he anticipates "substantial acceleration in the economy in the first, second quarter" with price improvements already visible. name: NH GOP
subject: 🚨Grassroots Alert: Democrats Scramble as Warmington’s Past Resurfaces
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee, Chairman Jim MacEachern
body:
Spread the message: Opioid Lobbyist Cinde Warmington advocated for, defended, and profited from the opioid crisis, and that disqualifies her.

| | | | | [|
---](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=442bc1e023&e=f3aa6419cd)
| | | | | |

Friend,
Liberal Opioid Lobbyist Cinde Warmington hasn’t even launched her campaign for Governor yet and she’s already in damage control mode.
**Her long history of advocating for, defending, and profiting from policies tied to New Hampshire’s opioid crisis has disqualified her before this race even begins.** Granite Staters see it. Democrats see it. And that’s why the Democrats’ Washington machine is already firing up.
Here’s what happens next.
When Democrats can’t defend a record, they don’t change the candidate.They change the funding.
Big Pharma money is coming.Washington money is coming.Outside special-interest money is coming.
And it’s all designed to do one thing: drown out the truth.
Opioid Lobbyist Cinde Warmington can’t run on her record, so Democrats will try to buy a new one.
This is the moment when grassroots voices matter most. Before the ads start. Before the narrative gets rewritten. Before outside interests try to paper over a record Granite State families already rejected once.
Opioid Lobbyist Cinde Warmington’s problem isn’t messaging. It’s her record.And that record disqualifies her from ever being Governor of New Hampshire.
Stay engaged. Stay informed. **Spread the message far and wide to your friends, family, neighbors, and social media pages: Opioid Lobbyist Cinde Warmington advocated for, defended, and profited from the opioid crisis, and that disqualifies her from EVER being Governor.**
For New Hampshire,NH GOP
---
| | | | | | | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/nhgop/warmington-scrambling-and-disqualified?e=f3aa6419cd)

subject: madder than a wet hen in a tote sack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/Pj1fmLlyvHUg8Fe6mVqnvDVGCoch3qHgmtT_Lixpx2hOsdVmDqZuhBh07RHlnRCvWHZi3X6FXEIt7F7rakWhBlAQVffnxAibs6-zLHgWxHvtbEPLNFrykx88vVeITHTrFWrtDszZJVjTrayEBZcDJ4Rhy4KBg337M4WhO4ITkgb_ebX_rVDNdoSbzlFKpBVFJ73TYayOlAWre9tQg0Fy1AeL0Q7KlApxlEEDaorODnvKks7eyLsOUBXJBvqQXgJbH5-uQFQ2IjDrp8BtkNVv1hHtAPsLnQlTmXG0LN6Ml02zk7EUdaSTKyV0NaMo9ZwYkPh5MOZ1AVsrCP_z-tSjrawW6qtltKF4XylVhsWsmc6HQHNtB7-tI2M_Q0yVQ-ecJMCD4o_eBLLx8KfV_QY1ETfbuqssrHmURqyVn1OLtFAPq8yO_HGwsczZAkDP3vJ5r_ok7eaayfN8v-DOQ7yivsKsbBl2AWfB_XgQGmX_o3AhSxUWJXihTI25LJzg-0_jjpccKFyGjd09tAauRrD3J2MMBisJkrrkOMZeEM6j_IWsoet6QdutLs0fwcOFZ1Lc0AoYLUuiBbtwIjlTqyFZ4x8WSiaokuW6kssGja9_fz9MCPhFbJva0CJ01JEP1uZ0xj2M0nsrFDeP37Wv6nTD5bHgNrfKocmwL21xpo0dyFJCkEnPVOX1oH6xiGWI1tvYDgJ8FjipQM6HZhAyEyyIEikfylAd7L4JzuTifhmqIU_ygi2fu3ec6N8_vQmDf2l0LEn3wI1eIc0ZbwWBCxTlmF4M3afOe-DabYIs6Ozq7xmrnsvxV2OJZK3MXHhOhFsvjDrNVW6EtnExUoD5OBOVwERq-ynwWD8/mlRv73ZSeAVQrXXeFeQmRX9d_T090Aak/15)The way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack.
This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior.
Whether it's...

* Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory
* Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement
* Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities

It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING.
_But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place._
Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact.
After seeing that, I knew I had to step in.
**_[So my good friend Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I got to talking. clean_body: way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack. This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior. Whether it's... Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING. But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place. Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact. After seeing that, I knew I had to step in. Do you reckon you could be one of those Conservatives? we all step up and work together I think we'll be able to keep these Democrats at bay and continue to deliver wins for good, hard workin' Americans. But I can 't do it without you, Peter. Thanks for hearing me out, John N. Kennedy A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise: I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. name: Lauren Toncich, Turning Point USA
subject: I’ve never written one of these before
body:
| | |
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event.

Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable.

I've never emailed you directly before.

But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room...

Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team.

At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: _Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. _

**And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. **

**This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. **

It will be our first AmFest without Charlie.

This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards.

Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures.

He believed they needed to _FEEL_ the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world.

Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: _" Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" _

Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash...

But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction.

_And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. _
