clean_body: | | | | | Hi Peter, My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event. Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable. I've never emailed you directly before. But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room... Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team. Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. It will be our first AmFest without Charlie. This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards. Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures. He believed they needed to FEEL the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world. Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: " Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash... But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction. And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. This year's AmFest? I 've never seen more students eager to be part of it. Nearly 6,000 are registered. Another 2,200 are on the waitlist. And we only have a few days left to get them in. Peter, these students aren't looking for entertainment... They're looking for courage, purpose, and a movement to belong to. They're stepping onto hostile campuses. They're getting flak from Leftist professors. Many are leading Turning Point chapters in places where they're told to sit down, shut up -- or worse. They want to stand for America... They just need a chance to stand with others who will, too. And when they get to AmFest, it's not just the main stage that changes their lives. Behind the lights and cameras, they sit in smaller breakout rooms -- face-to-face with staff and speakers who show them exactly how to lead. They learn how to organize. How to launch and grow chapters. How to push back against the Left -- strategically and fearlessly. They're trained to fight -- and win. Because inspiration is just the beginning. We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into. Peter, that 's where you can make a difference. Every $50 you give today helps sponsor a student to attend AmericaFest. And today, your gift will be MATCHED -- dollar-for-dollar. That means: 🔥 $50 sends TWO students 🔥 $100 sends FOUR 🔥 $250 sends EIGHT, and more. Every year, I see it firsthand: Students walk in with doubts, with fears, with barely enough money to afford the flight. They walk out with confidence, connection, and a new sense of calling. I've seen them go home and start chapters. I've seen them run for office. Many tell me -- even years later, that this one event changed everything. So no -- I'm not just asking you to sponsor an "event." I 'm asking you to help change the trajectory of a young patriot. Peter, I know what Charlie would want right now. He'd want every seat filled. He'd want AmFest to echo with boldness and fire. He'd want us to fight like he's still backstage -- still calling for more sparks. Most of all, he'd want every student who made the trip to believe they were part of something bigger than themselves. To walk in searching for purpose -- and leave filled with it. . Let's make sure every young patriot who wants to fight for this country gets their chance -- and gets to Phoenix this December. | | For Charlie, Lauren Toncich Vice President of Events Turning Point USA P.S. This is our first AmericaFest without Charlie. But it will be the most important one we've ever hosted. Help us fill the room he loved -- with students ready to carry his mission forward. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 |

name: Graham Platner
subject: Susan Collins, Chuck Schumer, and AIPAC are trying to bury us before we even get started
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3]
Peter,
Janet Mills just entered the race against Susan Collins. So you’re about to get a million fundraising texts and emails from Mills and her campaign (if you haven’t already).
I’m new to this whole politics thing, but I’ve begun to learn how this works: After you donate to any establishment Democrat, Chuck Schumer and the DNC turn around and use your email address and phone number to put their thumbs on the scale – propping up their choice, even when that person is not the strongest candidate in the race.
It’s all part of the corrupt system in Washington. Corporations buy candidates through corporate PAC checks. Special interest groups like AIPAC pour millions into Super PACs. And Chuck Schumer and the DNC buy loyalty by sending millions of texts and emails to funnel money to milquetoast candidates, even when they don’t have the best chance to win.
I’m not the choice of corporations, AIPAC, Chuck Schumer, or the DNC. And that’s exactly why I’m the Democrat who is finally going to actually defeat Susan Collins and turn Maine blue.
Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the country. We have an opportunity to replace her with a Democrat who will actually support Medicare for All and call what’s happened in Gaza a genocide.
But I’m going up against Susan Collins, AIPAC, and the entire DC establishment. If I’m going to be able to defeat Susan Collins and flip this Senate seat blue, I am counting on folks like you to chip in now to our campaign.
Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate for Democrats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Graham Platner and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3&amount=25]
This is a pretty pivotal moment in our campaign, so no amount you can afford is too small. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3]
In solidarity,
Graham Platner

name: JB Pritzker
subject: Let’s make this the GOP’s worst bet.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Let me cut to the chase.
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251215_1_pritzker.U4ti1K&refcode=em20251215-1&t=1&akid=4030%2E582294%2EHJI3xa)
JB Pritzker here.
Let me cut to the chase: **New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — _and Republicans know it._**
Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power.
They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero.
_We can’t let that happen._
Chris Pappas is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves.
I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and _I want him in the Senate._
I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: **_This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks._**
The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in:
**[If you can, please make a $5 donation right now to help Chris Pappas win in New Hampshire and put Democrats on the path to a Senate majority.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251215_1_pritzker.U4ti1K&refcode=em20251215-1&t=2&akid=4030%2E582294%2EHJI3xa)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251215_1_pritzker.d0HU4g&amount=5&refcode=em20251215-1&t=21&akid=4030%2E582294%2EHJI3xa)**
Thank you for standing up,
JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251215-1&t=22&refcode2=4030_582294_HJI3xa&akid=4030%2E582294%2EHJI3xa)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Manchester, NH 03105
United States
clean_body: Let me cut to the chase. JB Pritzker here. Let me cut to the chase: New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — and Republicans know it. Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power. They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero. We can’t let that happen. Chris Pappas is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves. I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and I want him in the Senate. I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks. The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in: Thank you for standing up, JB Pritzker Governor of Illinois New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

subject: This deadline could make or break my reelection campaign.

body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=3MIzbTUvRwHYn4qjTxvTnVdfXfplnUDGW814Ak6oJYMFd0n23tYoVSvD6UDATxikZUVWghytT2NEcosEh3zyNPxcpTs99pEdzGh%2FDo5mRSacdfsdFdpAWuTzUubnMnd7ohVXAJYSLxrOuVT1Zg%2Bcrg2w6C%2Fn%2Fsr%2BVAG8i%2BRxEPWRRc4feRH%2FkCXrpMmVHsU4ZhGBwLtZEiweVLBvxYpHunGDkcZkDXMXJ1PyV%2FId%2FI%2FviXv1MjQ9BXwsnZ1rjHyqVr9PPyAjwWAewKJS1jWnXGSnU9C34KudngHGAAubpMxRAf3vKLMszISTjQiVL8HqiOwKTBayTkBJB5iJu5xVEgWycBuZEN2qWm8LAT02n7Csim1MmnxqW%2FdJDLkBOpeNfVFjwFllu4trkAaxyEsC4wMwMCuUQa%2F2XOimMmJXnFYpkAGJyUXhGPZZeJkVzldp]

# [#]
Democrats are building momentum.

We saw this in November across the country, and we saw this earlier in the month in Tennessee’s special election when Republicans narrowly avoided a huge upset.

This is good news. But it’s too early to celebrate, especially here in our district.

Because while Democrats are turning out in higher numbers across America, our district here is shifting red.

And with Republicans feeling immense pressure to maintain their House majority, there’s no doubt that they’ll double down on attacks where they see any signs of vulnerability.

Recently, Mike Johnson reinforced the national Republicans’ efforts with $6 million — money that will fuel attack ads against me to hurt my reputation and discourage voters with misinformation.

This is the time to show the strength of our grassroots advantage and prepare to fight back. The December Federal Election Commission (FEC) end-of-quarter deadline is the most critical opportunity to do that, which is why I’m asking for your help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-dec25?amount=]

What we raise by the filing deadline will be publicly available for everyone to see early next year, and it’ll be what our opponents use to gauge my reelection campaign.

I’ve set an ambitious goal for the month to send a strong message, and I need your help to stay on target this week.

Can you chip in $ toward our $5,000 weekly goal and let Republicans know our district is not up for grabs? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-dec25?amount=]

Thank you,

Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

name: Gabriel Uy
subject: DNC Launches Battleground Leadership Project & Blue Match
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Good morning,

Following a historic 2025 election cycle, the DNC is excited to [announce](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e89bf571c3&e=d6c5c7d7ec) today two major initiatives to ensure our party has the talent pipeline we need to run and win battleground coordinated campaigns in 2026: Battleground Leadership Project and BlueMatch.
* [https://www.notus.org/democrats/dnc-programs-staff-down-ballot-campaigns-battleground-leadership-project-blue-match](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6f831fda6d&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* [https://meidasnews.com/news/dnc-launches-battleground-leadership-project-ahead-of-2026-midterms](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2fb784c63d&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

Battleground Leadership Project Strong talent leading campaigns is essential to winning elections. That’s why the DNC is making a six-figure investment to recruit, place, and train Coordinated Campaign leadership in targeted states in Q1 2026. This proactive hiring push will ensure battleground states have high-quality, experienced leadership in place early in the first quarter, setting teams up for success to design, scale, and execute winning programs in 2026. _BlueMatch _ Since the November 2025 election, the DNC has seen a 76% increase in the number of new applicants to our DNC Talent Bank – indicating a significant interest from staff to work on Democratic campaigns in 2026. That’s why the DNC is launching BlueMatch, a new service to connect this talent with Coordinated campaigns and state parties staffing up for the midterms. Starting in January, states will be able to submit job descriptions and receive batches of resumes from the DNC talent bank to review, interview, and hire for critical positions in the upcoming election cycle. How You Can Support To ensure we can staff 2026 campaigns across the country with the strongest talent, we’re asking partners to promote the DNC talent banks with your networks. If you know talented staff who want to work on campaigns or state parties in 2026, encourage them to submit their resumes to our job banks (and feel free to use the attached graphic):
* General 2026 Talent Bank: [https://win.dnc.org/DNCTalentBank](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7a14c8b614&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Job Bank for Coordinated Campaign Directors: [win.dnc.org/StateCoordinatedDirector](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a7e5903e5a&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Job Bank for Organizing Directors: [win.dnc.org/StateCoordinatedOrganizingDirector](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=19eb14006d&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

Thank you for being a partner in this work and your support to ensure our Party is investing in our talent pipeline!
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2c539a6d44&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---

Patriot,

I am inviting you to be a part of Turning Point PAC’s latest expansion.

As part of our plans to ensure our America First movement wins in 2026, 2028, and beyond, **Turning Point is launching our official Arizona PAC!**

Our first challenge is ousting Governor Katie Hobbs. She has been an absolute disaster for the people of Arizona and our America First movement.
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Now, she needs to go.

TPPAC AZ is throwing our support behind Andy Biggs, a true America First patriot who can defeat Katie Hobbs and help us take back Arizona from the Democrats.

Here’s why you should be concerned...

Arizona WILL determine the next President of the United States.

If we lose here, we will lose the presidency!

Turning Point PAC Arizona needs your immediate support to raise $47,000 this month to fund ballot chasers.
**AZ PAC OFFICIAL LAUNCH** **Goal:** $47,000
**Deadline** : 11:59 p.m. December 31, 2025
**Suggested Donation: $26**

**[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** **Why should you care about Arizona?**

Winning in Arizona is key to our plan to secure an America First future.

Arizona is a key battleground state in the 2028 election. It’s also a state where _conservatives outnumber Democrats_.

However, the Democrats are currently in control of the state and won’t give it up without a fight. They are already spending MILLIONS in Arizona to stop any chance of us winning.

**So, while you may not live in Arizona, the outcome of this election will still impact your quality of life.**

If you want to see our America First movement continue in 2026, 2028, and beyond, the first step is to [ensure that an America First candidate like Andy Biggs wins](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) the Arizona governorship.

[Please donate $100, $50, or even just $26 today to help TPPAC AZ secure a resounding victory for Andy Biggs! ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate Any Amount](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
For Arizona and the future of our country,

Tyler Bowyer
Executive Director
Turning Point PAC

P.S. Aside from being the best husband, father, and leader he could be, Charlie’s top priority was making Representative Andy Biggs the next Governor of the Great State of Arizona.

Andy Biggs is 100% committed to...

👮🏻♂️Public Safety & the Rule of Law
🦅Securing the Border and Ending Human Trafficking
📈Economic Growth through less regulation and lower taxes
⚡️Smart Energy Policy that prioritizes nuclear and natural gas
🌳Common Sense Environmental Policies that favor homeowners
🏠Defending the American Dream

**That’s why, with your help, TPPAC AZ is _going BIG for Biggs_!**

[You can help fund doorknockers, volunteer training, and voter registration efforts in Arizona by donating today](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

[ ](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=69e8da9d5d6c46c39d0d3d3e6914a39a&_e=w9eBwu_UOsFkaMWom7lt6UmvebyRYoasSv9AYuQ3trinDHdONYv-eWyQEsIaEbeab5EsaO_UU5rNK1Dn9t0rQ2n2rKkEFTTBj842ZOkXlOH1Z-Wi2qfRFBSwh5pjQJUksAqlTrpr41hQSatgDBcJDuRvxHHRCcBFeMxTZx1CcTmJvH6lTEZ8vA992Yiv1zpQQGCemoT5BGgkge2cMSd19C8MFJd3RNtLPdk3Eu4y7Phe-L_jkxmYSOT7sl82snK0YdQIgsGJ3heLTH7bjOJq9sbrvdiw9KGFrIQgoeuAA-BHJZ11IoRXlx-H5GC2WV1XvaNJSrWgIq-vv6Ju5j8ISCfxok2wpTEG5rF_70uWxHWSELtRXlglL14xKCt8JRXE5iQZLvJV3HGkA-uVs0J20Iz1jSNJOnuNkltoBZDwDXJs5gJHiTYowMYAio5d6mvcTtctWuiGmTgO-qOoPV7bDH7ApDfz690JFJgPHTkbCCDFvxV27LutLoGiHwbk207a_9hS_G_dOoBGezQq2g-brzba5RlLptngmtlTXrsB-HClZEdcva6YPptfLq3mHgokYGdqWJZOvNUGTfgyVKKSWw%3D%3D)
Against all odds, the hidden recording has been revealed, carrying Armstrong’s anxious warnings and shattering NASA’s carefully built defenses.

This urgent audio sparks global panic, rewriting the story of space exploration in real time.

The consequences are snowballing—trust devastated, reputations on the line, and a wave of uncertainty sweeping the world.

[Don’t miss the alarm-inducing truth before the authorities make one last attempt at lockdown.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=69e8da9d5d6c46c39d0d3d3e6914a39a&_e=w9eBwu_UOsFkaMWom7lt6UmvebyRYoasSv9AYuQ3trinDHdONYv-eWyQEsIaEbeab5EsaO_UU5rNK1Dn9t0rQ2n2rKkEFTTBj842ZOkXlOH1Z-Wi2qfRFBSwh5pjQJUksAqlTrpr41hQSatgDBcJDuRvxHHRCcBFeMxTZx1CcTmJvH6lTEZ8vA992Yiv1zpQYVWF2J8c1hkTUs505uJizSUtatlCkTw0_oRuEDhqrJIGX9b7CPQ2Uj_VnW2PDyuWbn4EdtNqZ1FkrP18KFMKTYbc9ipM5JCicFPYUk2TiyfpCUbzld62BM4AUDtWy924kuEvjxNzUjBakQbAEkdcjNeMJ_rwP98KiI-Mq9nrGSBnR2YoCGVkPVdISB6kK242ijt0cMtNQAq23zB65rarJowlLYh0Q5kYO6vL9OFtDp2SbLL712WGix5gBm1f4tY6K5833Q7xughUHdxMZkLx6Chw_C9ultju-BwlWOHLeP6YcLBz9EsqELz4T-AsRCm85sh6uuF5ZwtDckT5ZhaGjV_A2lJp8wolAf1HcImJO0N1Hb4rutLYh-EpyRfQtPe__ziHjR-oaEuutEvsxxQS3Q%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | | NASA obsessively locked away Armstrong’s secret tape—knowing the fallout could be explosive. Against all odds, the hidden recording has been revealed, carrying Armstrong’s anxious warnings and shattering NASA’s carefully built defenses. This urgent audio sparks global panic, rewriting the story of space exploration in real time. The consequences are snowballing—trust devastated, reputations on the line, and a wave of uncertainty sweeping the world. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. I never got to use a toilet seat. Instead, we had to share a hole in the ground with 8 other families. I was raised on food rationing coupons in the Sichuan province of China during Mao’s Cultural Revolution. I was only a child, yet I worshiped him like a God. I had no other choice. I was brainwashed. We all were. Eventually, I was able to escape from China and flee to the United States.

name: Mike Rounds
subject: Right now is when I need your attention most.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rounds for Senate**
body:
Right now is when I need your attention most. Democrats have fought hard to gain serious ground this year. We watched them win special elections and increase their polling numbers. We can’t stroll into the New Year while the Democrats are sprinting past us. We need to pick up the pace now, or we risk allowing the Left back in charge of Congress. |
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f9111a2457c1411d99bc5394d3cc6f19&_e=DFLn1GzRk3dYTl641om_0BTNrsR903ED1c3J9P2_bD7NyThBOozrOEtT85m9E22vfymdo77DbRW9fMK2tVmBmKfg6bOMSIbtNAfCYvBjHLayor_mATrZuLPIj2xBt0_85cjUX7Zfh7vIo7g53OXHFRONeKFWjwHcPUA9lrHKi0Z9IwjLjTGoSYVBMaDqMiUTRm4Dv_LIEkcuJBAO9uePi2nrvoMDTOEVzexsQPVoFEfJl22JcMJlCTWQqIZ4FqLx-CzrIrHrDhKSnL9jgN-OEQBIUaY8zUQKtBcpBffNM6nZk5zPSbEecN1cPM81qoB5ecZPW0BqO8GejmFnNV7O-THC3KmUXuVB2vpqv4uYbEkMrbRqwJHgeYA2AJjoQlAIl_fFsR-c11Bg5lejojTi-5o5WDVqIQXztc2RBN_PDp9AAYmpRk5MYKjbamqUMMEBQVb9j1KohtrIui-t-lyrzXl9gA7HZNwFHfJoUMUeyNRfPoEKND4h7-XDE3afcKnjcIJXDTvWD4QSWyFmBD455xGT38eRuqknxpVRZKqXfgVpeKIbvL4e3P0FrZBA8Evx_etowTXm9dgP_10UobPuqlxtiybeFtULsRn0Uz5y_WKRRICuVpb5pHu92tn3UmqGPEDWehUm1Z0WJ5qsoKVq-zT2RiVpinjUSGaSqpX2TVk%3D)

Fellow Conservative, we are in the final stretch of 2025 -- just hours away from our mid-month fundraising deadline and two weeks away from our final fundraising deadline of 2025.

Right now is when I need your attention most. Democrats have fought hard to gain serious ground this year. We watched them win special elections and increase their polling numbers. [**We can't stroll into the New Year while the Democrats are sprinting past us.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f9111a2457c1411d99bc5394d3cc6f19&_e=DFLn1GzRk3dYTl641om_0BTNrsR903ED1c3J9P2_bD7NyThBOozrOEtT85m9E22vfymdo77DbRW9fMK2tVmBmKfg6bOMSIbtNAfCYvBjHLayor_mATrZuLPIj2xBt0_85cjUX7Zfh7vIo7g53OXHFRONeKFWjwHcPUA9lrHKi0Z9IwjLjTGoSYVBMaDqMiUTRm4Dv_LIEkcuJBAO9uePi2nrvoMDTOEVzexsQPVoFEejZqMpHtgavRngYvMuVyhsgPkfrQeOKiEY_ga-EH3fo7sV_h9OhDmy5IoUuTmOmaKvl9WMqfYTtwA_crcNjn17Z4NmXZDavDXO3A7IHoHKAvNjt8wwryX7lR2_kT1QebtYGU0Z7RNoHcQ7E5FfvsWKj9vh-h6Bs0F7tvcvLCcqRUB-kzv32ySKe8nM8RpiPDw0WjUJkmdGHtm9UVw-04QUzY5a8UL8w_3d2nu4zEj5UI9ZtotKCjHqZ-7-xY6HcCcqbil0uaOm55DTaay7yMNhrnzrvjc-qf7UjzuzZuMRPBnc6fxBo_6RGswbY8dpzF4LxAGXa-P5GBl2r-xtFAreZ0Vvy8cXrv33qU3LCNcw57PK_iUiQ8-EhJVdTPZJA-O6WLv_dU3Aei9CvK4dKkJN1I0cFmYx2_bqgZOvR2q58unZOwG0QzCJO1PNb1vHTt4%3D) We need to pick up the pace now, or we risk allowing the Left back in charge of Congress.

[**Fellow Conservative, will you answer my call to step up and join me today?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f9111a2457c1411d99bc5394d3cc6f19&_e=DFLn1GzRk3dYTl641om_0BTNrsR903ED1c3J9P2_bD7NyThBOozrOEtT85m9E22vfymdo77DbRW9fMK2tVmBmKfg6bOMSIbtNAfCYvBjHLayor_mATrZuLPIj2xBt0_85cjUX7Zfh7vIo7g53OXHFRONeKFWjwHcPUA9lrHKi0Z9IwjLjTGoSYVBMaDqMiUTRm4Dv_LIEkcuJBAO9uePi2nrvoMDTOEVzexsQPVoFEeWJSbxxJkIpsiXSSTazVlpQw-HABCuIsGGvYezNPErthw4vzchUIbzjtM9gd2gYT31b6U5yvqZ0r5W3WRr4d2Kvc-nBttL6LcgettJQ2d72twIqemdi1lAyCuV55-jZ8OSUzVyEJWb7ru8hzd3AfAuCJFyl_Ya3hWJDmDwEWdN0u9kM-nNhG1uJHz0s7cpYQKXf9-j5qzxTEqnqFpfFdtn-06Hneb6a3bO05yFffJrBsOcdO01Wf3LwtcHgOixhuuyI1pSRZ4rjdFpPRPWRUY8ucnUUeVNzCP4PTSS3KjR6Z8AlKx0mIDY6w2plorCFLjaRws39BufF0_zArUg05e9VgueZc_Uon7gpSOWwV_uZihmqkrr5UQLdVUym2TUPYQ2IBUnlcKmuJDQMpekyQkR-_Y9WMLMm3qUauRrIYjkiHHSOCl4eqACIOFbPaKPdcQ%3D) Our fight is impossible without a strong group of Conservatives banding together. Please chip in any amount you can, even if it's just 5 bucks, to help.

| [**CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT**
](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f9111a2457c1411d99bc5394d3cc6f19&_e=DFLn1GzRk3dYTl641om_0BTNrsR903ED1c3J9P2_bD7NyThBOozrOEtT85m9E22vfymdo77DbRW9fMK2tVmBmKfg6bOMSIbtNAfCYvBjHLayor_mATrZuLPIj2xBt0_85cjUX7Zfh7vIo7g53OXHFRONeKFWjwHcPUA9lrHKi0Z9IwjLjTGoSYVBMaDqMiUTRm4Dv_LIEkcuJBAO9uePi2nrvoMDTOEVzexsQPVoFEdyVxbtQoSwLzB7CoulXg9T_X6Pm24r4KUrlMFdUJtmokozs4AYU9Ccce3oT1PcYZCRBunTG9rX69SNgWuVzg-CYTK1jumIzR9b2fHpRdfIvdjj7d8-C4igKMCmTPrFY2eKBIzD9Dlfr-lz4ELa4FVnDcr0emGtN3LqlKf1vV9j7VilhRbiuRhUPH70bqpb1CYwTKeNxm3KB5xvTDsTeVT6QQiqgu2e4lG3fU1H_OIFj980LAYnwQoIMphFmjEplS9JsdhVHeeJDhbKFJFpNd5FIjZUuXzHJKfuWOlmStH0rjXoE0hCLMh6ayVYmAWXeB3dAxYAMU7lnb8StTNJ5dwDoBsF_QT_Kt3a12BxDWWLj9LDc_idbfcSvLt6BOupz9FPA7qKNOxePEkFSPyaIgxwDBqHil1ea-NSgJecQCwyCKox4FlwImSThw49GsanfKM%3D)
---

I deeply appreciate your support.

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: TAKE ACTION: OCN's 2026 legislative priorities are here!
body:
Peter,
I'm following up on Eliza's big announcement — the 2026 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon [https://olcveducationfund.org/2026-legislative-session/] are here! This year we're prioritizing securing landmark wildlife and habitat conservation funding with 1.25% for wildlife, a bill that ensures polluters pay for harming our climate, and protecting investments in Oregon’s climate, natural resources, clean energy, conservation, and wildlife agencies.
Without your strong support, these bills won't make it across the finish line come session. Please take a moment now to send your legislators a message about our priorities here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tponcAOETE2WZW9d_LA_-Q2?contactdata=v394uAYBWv9Bq9yIoWfilh6vZsH3qa8B8Sl5oJigfrvIquObi2bz9WNWFjVne3MoiKkTwrRWvjQrqmBZz8784W91uZSea6uSY3Jt9ugCgkwDGyusdn5I+/lZMM1Uc6GV] . To have a greater impact, join our 2026 Legislative Action Team [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Fwl_cbbF30eStSYh4CbNtg2?contactdata=v394uAYBWv9Bq9yIoWfilh6vZsH3qa8B8Sl5oJigfrvIquObi2bz9WNWFjVne3MoiKkTwrRWvjQrqmBZz8784W91uZSea6uSY3Jt9ugCgkwDGyusdn5I+/lZMM1Uc6GV] , a robust community of climate activists ready to lend their voice to the cause.
Join the team! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Fwl_cbbF30eStSYh4CbNtg2?contactdata=v394uAYBWv9Bq9yIoWfilh6vZsH3qa8B8Sl5oJigfrvIquObi2bz9WNWFjVne3MoiKkTwrRWvjQrqmBZz8784W91uZSea6uSY3Jt9ugCgkwDGyusdn5I+/lZMM1Uc6GV]
We need you,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Britney_signature-removebg-preview.png]
Britney VanCitters (she/her)
OLCV Political & Organizing Director
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tponcAOETE2WZW9d_LA_-Q2?contactdata=v394uAYBWv9Bq9yIoWfilh6vZsH3qa8B8Sl5oJigfrvIquObi2bz9WNWFjVne3MoiKkTwrRWvjQrqmBZz8784W91uZSea6uSY3Jt9ugCgkwDGyusdn5I+/lZMM1Uc6GV [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tponcAOETE2WZW9d_LA_-Q2?contactdata=v394uAYBWv9Bq9yIoWfilh6vZsH3qa8B8Sl5oJigfrvIquObi2bz9WNWFjVne3MoiKkTwrRWvjQrqmBZz8784W91uZSea6uSY3Jt9ugCgkwDGyusdn5I+/lZMM1Uc6GV]
Hi Peter,
The 2026 legislative session is right around the corner, and I’ve already begun meeting with legislators and partners to make sure we’re ready to advance pro-climate and pro-environment legislation. I’m excited to share the Oregon League of Conservation Voters’ (OLCV) and the Oregon Conservation Network's (OCN) 2026 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon [https://olcveducationfund.org/2026-legislative-session/] .
While we anticipate another year of defending hard-won progress, we’re also stepping forward with a powerful, proactive agenda that will protect Oregon’s climate, wildlife, and communities. Below are our top priorities for this session:
1.25% for Wildlife: Landmark Wildlife & Habitat Conservation Funding
Oregon is home to nearly 300 species at elevated risk of extinction and 11 habitats of greatest conservation need but our state lacks stable funding to protect them. This bill would raise the statewide lodging tax from 1.5% to 2.75%, dedicating the additional revenue to imperiled fish, wildlife, and habitat recovery efforts. These investments are essential to safeguarding Oregon’s rich biodiversity and natural legacy.
Make Polluters Pay: Climate Superfund
This bill holds major global polluters - like ExxonMobil, Chevron, and dozens more - accountable for ever-worsening climate disasters. Oregonians have already paid billions of dollars for past harms caused by the largest polluters, and will need to invest billions more into future climate adaptation. The funds will be distributed 30% to wildfire mitigation and the rest directed towards climate resilience programs, with 40% prioritized for environmental justice communities. Oregon has already spent billions responding to climate disasters; this bill ensures polluters, not communities, pay for past harms.
Natural Resource Agency Budgets
Protecting investments in Oregon’s climate, natural resources, clean energy, conservation, and wildlife agencies are essential, especially with continued federal uncertainty. Budgets are always a top priority, and 2026 is no exception.
I hope you’ll take a moment this session to message your legislators and urge them to support OLCV & OCN’s 2026 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon [https://olcveducationfund.org/2026-legislative-session/] .
Take action on these priorities [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tponcAOETE2WZW9d_LA_-Q2]
Together,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Eliza.png]
Eliza Walton (she/they)
OLCV Coalition Director
P.S.: Another great way to support our work this session is by making a gift of any amount! Your contribution is what allows us to pass strong pro-climate and pro-environment legislation. We can’t do it without you. [https://secure.everyaction.com/YnnBhNxoe0-gdDf_E1iL8Q2]
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ReVeUSnqh0mAa9rjhFdl7A2?unsubscribedata=rmBwUIGZSy3Zmstb%2B4attZCbiNEqUgNdQ1OL%2FJgSbTEcorWO4wqRWMdbVWkdMpAGdUVsjlPKrWrya5JV6rasHRE%2BMHx60eiCFIyQVtsuRbcPhKGADHm5%2BJdzsPEwixsaHSetU5P1w7lEGs7BcRcxFNPrMGsLmfcu%2BDN6NA3iStIpcn0L2zit0jkb0mR1cS4lZoVCmTupEWhGPS91SY966Is%2By2%2FFJBx8Tv14D8wb%2Brr7kA93ITfWC%2Fle8uObf3euoHmHdKqR12G1quLpFNkusRuhGoYFwUqJaevMTufZxnxkm8nCBoS8P409%2B3LZBS61w0Bw%2B5%2BiipJx%2FHzxdvllBMAOXzwfCxaO7aFpbtWKOCp5MorauIpmF7uCni8%2F6BygxQFjY22%2Fnrd22Bk6YhnRjNCm%2FNcei31UANNXZoATgew%3D .

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The moment is here, and the work starts today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240539%2E444211%2Ea58gcQ)
Tonight marks our [**mid-month fundraising deadline,**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251215-1.QvDAXt&refcode=ema20251215-240539&t=3&akid=240539%2E444211%2Ea58gcQ) and what we raise before midnight will set the tone for the year ahead.
In the last few months, I’ve been talking to folks all across Texas—in small towns, big cities, and neighborhoods that rarely get attention. And everywhere I go, I see the same thing: people are stepping up. They’re running for office, organizing their communities, registering voters, and refusing to sit on the sidelines.
For the first time _since at least 1974_ , Democrats are running for **every single Congressional, State House, and State Senate seat on the ballot.** That didn’t just happen. It’s the result of tenacious organizing all across the state, including in the places written off as too red, or too tough, or too rural.
That’s Powered by People. We write no one off, and we take no one for granted. Every county, every community, every person is worth fighting for. That’s how we helped fill the ballot with a Democrat in every one of these slots for the first time in 50 years; it’s how we produced a turnout rate of 79.5% with young voters in our program in 2024; and it’s how we’re going to help Democrats win in 2026.
**Your support today makes that possible. Every dollar makes us stronger, increases our impact, and makes it more likely that we are going to win.**
[**Can you chip in $3 before tonight’s midnight deadline? 2026 is going to be the most important midterm election in Texas history. Let’s make sure we have the resources to win.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251215-1.QvDAXt&refcode=ema20251215-240539&t=4&akid=240539%2E444211%2Ea58gcQ)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251215-1.QvDAXt&refcode=ema20251215-240539&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=240539%2E444211%2Ea58gcQ)**
Thank you,
Beto

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20251215-240539-footer&t=24&refcode2=240539_444211_a58gcQ&akid=240539%2E444211%2Ea58gcQ)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

Last Friday, I published my first op-ed in _[Newsweek](https://substack.com/redirect/c918f73a-7014-4624-a21c-0409afdba41c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) , _and I'm thrilled to share it with you.

I've been thinking a lot about the operator economy we're entering--an era where the people who succeed in business aren't just smart, but disciplined and mission-driven. No group in America is better prepared for this moment than our veterans. We've led teams under pressure, built systems that work, and solved problems when the stakes couldn't be higher. Veterans are uniquely positioned to run companies, and that's why I believe the next decade will belong to them.

As I write in my piece:
> Every company hires for talent. What most lack are skilled operators: people who don't just work hard, but work with purpose.
> That's where veterans come in...
> Each year, about [200,000 service members](https://substack.com/redirect/48bb8944-86b7-4e71-878c-476c64b73298?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/aa67d55b-45b7-4d01-a89e-3834509fe0e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)transition out of the military into civilian life. Many leave with no clear next step.
> Fortunately, there's a massive opportunity hiding in plain sight. Nearly [40 percent of U.S. small](https://substack.com/redirect/03f01002-f7ee-47bd-96e4-3c649633efe1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[businesses are owned by baby boomers](https://substack.com/redirect/82bbac65-07c5-4e76-8c48-155d9df2966b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) heading into retirement. Thousands of profitable, well-run companies need new leadership at the exact moment veterans are stepping forward with unmatched operational experience.
_
_You can read the full piece on _[Newsweek](https://substack.com/redirect/c918f73a-7014-4624-a21c-0409afdba41c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[.](https://substack.com/redirect/c918f73a-7014-4624-a21c-0409afdba41c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Thanks for all your support. Hope you like it and share!

The stakes couldn’t be higher: **The path to a Democratic House majority runs straight through Oregon’s 6th district, making this seat a MUST-HOLD in 2026.**
But if you need more convincing before sending in a donation to defend OR-06, here are just THREE reasons why I’m asking for your support today:
1️⃣ **I’m doing everything in my power to ensure every American’s voice is heard, and to defend our communities from Trump and the GOP’s attacks.** While Trump is sending troops into our cities, I’m meeting with constituents, standing up to stop Republicans' cuts to health care, and fighting to end the GOP shutdown.
2️⃣ **Republicans have a RAZOR-THIN Majority, and are spending MILLIONS to target OR-06 and defeat me.** They’ve already come within single digits of flipping this seat TWICE — and are willing to do whatever it takes to bring a strong Democrat like me down.
3️⃣ **Flipping the House in 2026 is our BEST chance to rein in Donald Trump’s authoritarian administration.** _That starts with defending must-hold districts like OR-06 to enable Democrats to go on the offensive._
[_**With my final mid-month fundraising deadline of 2025 just hours away, I can’t think of a better time to join our fight. So what do you say? Can I count on you to chip in $6 before midnight to keep OR-06 blue, help Democrats take back the House, and finally put a stop to the MAGA agenda?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121328034/589094642/1477919608?amount=6&refcode=email_121525_question&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTk3NTBjOC1kZGQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OZdM4z5ZvwOFpmG8huxHSaHevHe-M4X1ue5wx46l40=)

clean_body: Sorry to be so direct, but I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t important. = = | | = The stakes couldn’t be higher: The path to a Democratic House majority runs straight through Oregon’s 6th district, making this seat a MUST-HOLD in 2026. But if you need more convincing before sending in a donation to defend OR-06, here are just THREE reasons why I’m asking for your support today: 1️⃣ I’m doing everything in my power to ensure every American’s voice is heard, and to defend our communities from Trump and the GOP’s attacks. While Trump is sending troops into our cities, I’m meeting with constituents, standing up to stop Republicans' cuts to health care, and fighting to end the GOP shutdown. 2️⃣ Republicans have a RAZOR-THIN Majority, and are spending MILLIONS to target OR-06 and defeat me. They’ve already come within single digits of flipping this seat TWICE — and are willing to do whatever it takes to bring a strong Democrat like me down. 3️⃣ Flipping the House in 2026 is our BEST chance to rein in Donald Trump’s authoritarian administration. That starts with defending must-hold districts like OR-06 to enable Democrats to go on the offensive. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for your support, Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: The next generation of organizers
body:
Obstacles and uncertainty will always be there, but we will always prevail as long as we organize. | | | Peter, we’re facing immense challenges, but our spirit of resistance and our vision for a just future are stronger than ever. **United We Dream, our members, and immigrant youth are forging a path forward, and we’re looking to movements of the past to guide us.** During our Digital Conference, members and organizing staff united in the face of adversity to share our vision for immigrant justice. We also learned more about our collective history and the fight for civil rights in the 1960s. It was a reminder that every generation will face obstacles and uncertainty, but we’ll always prevail as long as we organize. Together, we’re empowering young people to unapologetically advocate for their families and communities. _That will always be our mission._ [**If you support United We Dream’s work to educate and empower the next generation of organizers, please make a donation toward our End-of-Year campaign today. During these uncertain times, every dollar makes a difference.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvvSptAA5-xC0ZLMh3sw_H8hyCmECnODiQzfTWOA-yBF-uv6JyDyWxSA_aFwIiFeuKDWap9sf1Df0tpiuzQ7iJVjhKQkF1JwQPlf9ExvAfiglnQXBthamFVWmZcqae34QsxIHfGE6uQV_fh9Ou-kUFu8ovnk8htpF_WDwpJer8U9zzJgnPWiBMMHrNhDESpRze4IgfbIYsmYK7zJ_1oEqstMpec1Rd2Fbv6JJ6oS8rAoNt1otV4ZxeF4S8l4LJGGFaY6_kSUDReZ39QGT_KvuOCIkfyUeIDhsViAjJIROTrqEV-Ls-i29OZkDwPuyHL0XT5Jys-N6vay7T-3DDNf30zS27KOUf0DURb4DKSs0AfD9LEkUiwigtxqnAgTtWzGBLgAuJaxil-Ti_D-RY7ub7bQBQDB0UgAIAx-Ffulqwpu9PuFNyJgEHxdhp5JBM9SZQ/4mg/e8keUfpSTPejr1lpOegDLQ/h0/h001.R_2zAo1bNht2Og_ervWDUgtcDdpV8VRkB3wexDqqWaY) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $25](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvvSptAA5-xC0ZLMh3sw_H8hyCmECnODiQzfTWOA-yBF-uv6JyDyWxSA_aFwIiFeuKDWap9sf1Df0tpiuzQ7iJVtrFVLoj36mtF3ECcUcK04bLedxzx3HTHAyOAnbjdE75a88KkjutcyogkRNvQ10saTNL_8yQndfTPZPdhCaVTh8qHwnI-OciOlIgNnQ2tRnRUzLHfeQ-zuop4vXXST5cMynxOaDk6R4L4elDmtMKF-E_Jd_8a_mvLPT4O5Zjb-c9bVM8rCxkPAlnQmofl6Q-8RB8vD5nTuTslMRiZaBMgcY5zXDfIGYVRSk-b6BoMuWtfxaj62-O2UubBwQ1dfsxr5ArHIUvnOdSLS0O-yNX3suQ5IDWOfvfG6Mm7mamcvjUW1xhl2K373a7DDw5znT6A8oWGxvxcOoCTjAUxbL6AC8WD0obN85MAMDQnSoKgG7qoIhHQzFCDxRFC05A6hb1c/4mg/e8keUfpSTPejr1lpOegDLQ/h1/h001.VyHUZ60fYKy-ndCHhSlzCXAkQog4I7ZqB-oRGPrgm30)

clean_body: | | | Trump’s DHS Secretary is corrupt. ** , enough is enough. DHS Secretary Kristi Noem has turned her agency into a rogue operation, and she thinks she can just lie to Congress about it? Spoiler alert: she can't! Under Noem's watch, we've seen absolutely horrific stuff: immigrants being abused, due process thrown out the window, and people literally disappearing, snatched by masked thugs acting like they're above the law. She's even sanctioned the cruel deportation of people to brutal foreign prisons! It’s tyranny, plain and simple. Democratic Rep. Delia C. Ramirez called her out, saying Noem "lie[s] with impunity" and delivering a clear threat: Resign, get fired, or "YOU WILL BE IMPEACHED." Sign the petition to help make sure she gets the boot. We have the power to stop this corrupt, lawless behavior. | What started as her cruelty to puppies and animals has become sadistic inhumanity to fellow human beings. Noem has overseen the abuse and deportation of combat veterans, the parents of soldiers, children undergoing cancer treatments, legitimate asylum seekers, and otherwise good neighbors who may have made a minor administrative mistake - not the worst of the worst.Not even close. They have even detained US citizens because of the color of their skin. ** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: The political world is in shock. A seemingly minor misstep by President Trump has set off a chain reaction that’s shaking Washington to its core.| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | The political world is in shock. | A seemingly minor has set off a chain reaction that’s shaking Washington to its core. Behind closed doors, lawmakers are whispering about impeachment ... while powerful insiders scramble to contain the fallout. What started as a small oversight could now — and the future of America as we know it. Some say this could be the turning point of a generation. subject: My decision.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121330286/589103380/1412513779?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.15_OTS-Mark-Kelly-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDZlYzJlMC1kZmQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1S8kR4nJNirEbAMFDfPV9EXI2B-Nutv2ze__F60HAnQ=) Hey folks, it’s Mark Kelly. Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate. I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something. So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too. I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help. We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do. **[I’m asking you to split a donation between Off the Sidelines and me, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121330287/589103388/67485243?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.15_OTS-Mark-Kelly-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDZlYzJlMC1kZmQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1S8kR4nJNirEbAMFDfPV9EXI2B-Nutv2ze__F60HAnQ=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Off the Sidelines PAC will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121330288/589103394/67485243?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.15_OTS-Mark-Kelly-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDZlYzJlMC1kZmQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1S8kR4nJNirEbAMFDfPV9EXI2B-Nutv2ze__F60HAnQ=)

I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. | = Hey folks, it’s Mark Kelly. Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate. I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something. So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too. I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help. We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Off the Sidelines PAC will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you. Mark © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: Hope to see you Thursday! MassGOP Christmas Party & Straw Poll 🎁
body:
Make your voice heard & celebrate the year...
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ed4ifvMYKf6_EeMbSUwBRw8I-Qa0ZzMVFseBgM-5XylPmbFi_LnsG6kBsqp0S-eRx3ZRuZ1TkFUHVws7q4VVkYZ2VtlMi0f6kr4UEEhE7dvVsYr2_TeLDdMWDhWZIQG00IfeLVpresqt9jDtrzxDbA==&c=RvLQK315Ri1klIK_kol-PS65U7qIaG9Gk0hMvX2A2fQSS1HRlzBFXA==&ch=UdMb6sPpNjTWxJqJCEGb-1ejdfet3SCn3DW-_IgL2Wbg4ycxbq3JOQ==)
