| Dear Peter,
As we approach the close of the year, I warmly invite you to join the Massachusetts Republican Party for a festive evening celebrating the season and our collective wins this year.
This Thursday, December 18, in Boston, the MassGOP will gather to reflect on our shared successes, enjoy good company, and look ahead to the opportunities before us in 2026. Please, join us! The evening will also feature a straw poll for Governor, to be conducted in person. Your personal invitation and RSVP details are included below.
---
| [RSVP NOW: SECURE YOUR STRAW POLL BALLOT IN ADVANCE](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ed4ifvMYKf6_EeMbSUwBRw8I-Qa0ZzMVFseBgM-5XylPmbFi_LnsG-jglyNz0UtWiON8D9JCU3IGwE9RObwqkpc_xwTH0fdE7Xap4w1T8jF3pQGx3zBKARC8QCOJlnyyNz0l5tjogxmI_z8Xhm2H-TnJxV3HscgbNUd88GXSYvmBLpJR3G2jKjH8DzuxTQPMqLQyoSljIgs0Yoj8OrB5LA==&c=RvLQK315Ri1klIK_kol-PS65U7qIaG9Gk0hMvX2A2fQSS1HRlzBFXA==&ch=UdMb6sPpNjTWxJqJCEGb-1ejdfet3SCn3DW-_IgL2Wbg4ycxbq3JOQ==)
---
| |
---
| If you are able to make an additional contribution, or have not yet contributed this year, your timely support is critical. Positioning Republicans for success in 2026 is a shared priority, and your generosity strengthens our collective efforts: [https://secure.winred.com/massachusetts-gop/christmasparty25](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ed4ifvMYKf6_EeMbSUwBRw8I-Qa0ZzMVFseBgM-5XylPmbFi_LnsG-jglyNz0UtWiON8D9JCU3IGwE9RObwqkpc_xwTH0fdE7Xap4w1T8jF3pQGx3zBKARC8QCOJlnyyNz0l5tjogxmI_z8Xhm2H-TnJxV3HscgbNUd88GXSYvmBLpJR3G2jKjH8DzuxTQPMa0mDPvx5Qv1-uW2PdfwoWw==&c=RvLQK315Ri1klIK_kol-PS65U7qIaG9Gk0hMvX2A2fQSS1HRlzBFXA==&ch=UdMb6sPpNjTWxJqJCEGb-1ejdfet3SCn3DW-_IgL2Wbg4ycxbq3JOQ==)
I look forward to seeing you there to celebrate the holiday season, our accomplishments in 2025, and the promising work ahead in 2026.
Warm regards,

name: Ollie (Chris' dog!)
subject: We can’t get caught with our tail between our legs!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
My mom’s first public fundraising deadline is coming up on December 31st.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251215-917&t=1&akid=919%2E294397%2EzQsEEy)
Hi, it’s me, Ollie, again!
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251215_1_ak.uX78Kq&amount=10&refcode=em20251215-917&t=3&akid=919%2E294397%2EzQsEEy)
Yes, I’m back in your inbox. At this point, I basically run the campaign’s communications department. 🐶💼
Today, I have an important update to share. **My mom’s first public fundraising deadline is coming up on December 31st.**
When I say public, I mean _everyone_ gets to see it... my mom’s opponent, right-wing special interests, even my fellow furry friends.
Think of it like this: When that report drops, they’ll sniff through every number to see whether our grassroots team is strong, or whether they think we’re looking a little vulnerable.
We can’t get caught with our tail between our legs! But we’re going to need a boost if we want to look our strongest by December 31st.
So I’m asking politely, earnestly, and with maximum floppy-eared charm: [**Will you chip in today to help my mom, Judge Chris Taylor, show real strength heading into this public deadline?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251215_1_ak.uX78Kq&amount=10&refcode=em20251215-917&t=4&akid=919%2E294397%2EzQsEEy)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251215_1_ak.uX78Kq&amount=10&refcode=em20251215-917&t=23&akid=919%2E294397%2EzQsEEy)**
Thanks for backing my favorite human.
Tail wags,
Ollie 🐾
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251215-917&t=24&refcode2=919_294397_zQsEEy&akid=919%2E294397%2EzQsEEy)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=919%2E294397%2EzQsEEy)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=919%2E294397%2EzQsEEy)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)
Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

name: Finance Team @ Roy Cooper HQ
subject: Only what you need to know
body:
Can you help?
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=174%2E124072%2Emt6jNI)
**Here’s where things stand about halfway through December, Peter:** → The end of this month marks our final end-of-quarter filing deadline of 2025 → Far-right PACs and dark money groups aligned with our extreme opponent have already poured hundreds of millions of dollars into this U.S. Senate race, which experts think could be the very first to cost more than a BILLION dollars → We set a $1 million online fundraising goal for December to keep up against the GOP — but midway through the month, we’re not halfway to our goal **[Falling short of this target in a public filing month would give our MAGA opponent the opportunity to pull ahead. We can’t let that happen. Can you rush in a donation before midnight to help stay on track?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2693?t=7&akid=174%2E124072%2Emt6jNI)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2694?t=8&akid=174%2E124072%2Emt6jNI)

Thanks,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=174%2E124072%2Emt6jNI)**

PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: An 88-year-old veteran had to rely on a viral GoFundMe to survive the medical debt our system dumped on him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1431%2E251025%2ExudcWP ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1431%2E251025%2ExudcWP ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

This is a bit of a longer email, but I hope you’ll give me just 30 seconds
to explain. 🙏 What I’m about to share says everything about what’s broken
in our politics, and how we can fix it together.

You may have seen this story:

[ A ]A post from Abdul that says 'Medical debt is evil.' He's quoting a post
that says 'Army veteran Ed Bambas, 88, just received more than $1.7M after
a viral video revealed he’d been working full-time at a grocery store to
cover his lost pension and his late wife’s medical bills. He can finally
retire. '

An 88-year-old veteran had to rely on a viral GoFundMe to survive the
medical debt our system dumped on him. After reading that, the only thing
that came to mind was what I posted: Medical debt is evil.

It is a uniquely American cruelty — the idea that you should have to win
the lottery to pay for healthcare, or hope your hardship becomes “viral”
enough that strangers will help relieve you of the financial burden.

This should not be happening in the richest, most powerful country in the
world. But it is, and here’s why:

The reason this keeps happening is both corporate Democrats and
Republicans have accepted millions from Big Pharma and health insurance
lobbyists, the very industries that profit from medical debt. They defend
this broken system because the system funds their campaigns.

You saw the GoFundMe. I saw the GoFundMe. Pharma CEOs saw it, and so did
the politicians who take their checks.

And yet nothing changes.

Because in Washington, stories like this aren’t treated as evidence of a
broken system. They’re treated as background noise — the cost of doing
business in a political order built to protect corporate profits above all
else.

That’s the corrupt status quo we’re running to upend.

Peter, I’m the
only candidate in this race who supports Medicare for All.

And once I’m elected, I’ll be the first non-MAGA doctor in the U.S. Senate
— someone who actually understands how our healthcare system works and how
to fix it.

But the pharmaceutical industry won’t back down without a fight. You can
bet they’ll spend whatever it takes to prop up candidates who are most
loyal to protecting their profit margins.

That means whether we win this fight comes down to people like you.

Later this month, we’re facing our last Federal Election Commission (FEC)
fundraising deadline of the year. Everything we’ve raised this past
quarter will be made public for pundits, our opponents, and everyone to
see.

This is our moment to show the old guard politicians and Big Pharma that
the energy in this race is with the candidate who will actually deliver
Medicare for All, not protect the status quo.

If you believe no one should need a GoFundMe to survive...
If you believe medical debt is evil...
If you believe we deserve a healthcare system that actually cares for
people...

Then I’m asking you to fuel this movement.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251215-1-ak.uv472h&amount=10&refcode=em20251215-1424&t=1004&akid=1431%2E251025%2ExudcWP ]Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can so we can build
a campaign strong enough to take on Big Pharma and finally pass Medicare
for All?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251215-1-ak.uv472h&amount=10&refcode=em20251215-1424&t=1023&akid=1431%2E251025%2ExudcWP ]Donate $10 ››

Your friend in the fight,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1431%2E251025%2ExudcWP
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=1431%2E251025%2ExudcWP

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Wes Moore
subject: An update for Peter
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1067%2E1086043%2EiU4-8M)
Hey Peter, it’s Wes. I just met with my team to go over our December fundraising, and I want to make sure grassroots supporters like you are updated.

* Seeks to challenge China's 53% monopoly on building ships
* Betting market odds soar for the new Fed Chair
* Space X valuation makes Google a fortune
* Bessent touts a $1-2000 per household retroactive tax return
* iRobot vacuum files for Chapter 11 Bankruptcy

# Trump vows shipbuilding revival against China's high seas dominance
President Donald Trump is pushing to revive America's long-dormant shipbuilding industry through a **["Make American Shipyards Great Again"](https://substack.com/redirect/cd160afb-3681-4554-88c0-79067faa00b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** initiative, relying heavily on foreign expertise to challenge China's overwhelming global dominance, which controls over half the market with massive subsidies.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd160afb-3681-4554-88c0-79067faa00b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **China 's Massive Dominance**: China boasts over 300 shipyards and 232 times the U.S. capacity, holding 53% of global market share and 75% of 2025 new orders, fueled by heavy government subsidies.
* **U.S. Industry Challenges** : America has just eight active shipyards, outdated infrastructure, severe workforce shortages, and minimal participation in key sectors like LNG tankers.
* **South Korean Partnership Key** : Hanwha Group's $350 billion deal includes acquiring and expanding Philly Shipyard, with plans for LNG carriers, tankers, and workforce training via rotations to Korea.
* **International Collaborations Growing** : Deals involving Italian-owned Fincantieri for naval vessels as well as Finnish partnerships for icebreakers are also planned to bolster U.S. capacity and security.

* * *
* * *

# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/308e55b7-e811-4648-852e-5152d852c9cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/308e55b7-e811-4648-852e-5152d852c9cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

* * *

# Kevin Warsh surges in betting odds to be new Fed Chair
Prediction markets are **[betting big on a tight race](https://substack.com/redirect/833cd8b5-95b8-445f-97de-f3101cc9c35c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for Federal Reserve chair, with Kevin Warsh's odds soaring 27 points to 42% on Kalshi this week, as President Trump narrows his top picks to Warsh and loyal adviser Kevin Hassett amid rising affordability pressures.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/833cd8b5-95b8-445f-97de-f3101cc9c35c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Hassett Leads Markets** : Kevin Hassett holds a 50% chance on Kalshi despite a recent 20-point drop, reflecting his role as Trump's top economic defender and National Economic Council director.
* **Trump Praises Duo** : President Trump added to the speculation between the contenders saying that "the two Kevins are great," confirming Hassett and Warsh as leading candidates to replace Jerome Powell in May 2026.
* **Warsh 's Credentials Shine**: Former Fed Governor Kevin Warsh, once the youngest board member and a past Trump contender, brings deep central banking experience from his Morgan Stanley background.
* **Market Volume Soars** : Over $10.2 million has been wagered on Kalshi's Fed chair market, underscoring intense trader interest in Trump's impending decision on the powerful central bank post.

* * *
* * *
# **SpaceX surge boosts Alphabet 's holdings by Billions**
Alphabet Inc. stands to book **[another multibillion-dollar unrealized gain](https://substack.com/redirect/747cdf9a-1c7b-45f5-835e-cdd45f8d2b62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after a new tender offer catapulted Elon Musk's SpaceX to an eye-popping $800 billion valuation -- more than doubling its worth from earlier this year and padding the Google parent's books.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/747cdf9a-1c7b-45f5-835e-cdd45f8d2b62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Historic 2015 Investment** : Alphabet invested in SpaceX alongside Fidelity in a $1 billion round, securing roughly a 10% combined stake that has appreciated dramatically over time.
* **Latest Valuation Jump** : The recent insider tender offer priced SpaceX shares at $421 each, pushing the company's overall valuation to approximately $800 billion.
* **Previous Paper Windfall** : Earlier in 2025, a prior tender valuing SpaceX at $350 billion triggered an $8 billion unrealized gain for Alphabet, helping beat Wall Street earnings estimates.
* **Earnings Impact Ahead** : Investors will watch Alphabet's next quarterly report for this new non-cash boost from revaluing non-marketable equity securities like its SpaceX holding.

* * *
* * *
# **Bessent hypes 2025 retroactive tax returns**
Treasury Secretary **[Scott Bessent announced Sunday](https://substack.com/redirect/09141666-7836-4a9a-b558-67dc9acf58ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that American taxpayers can expect "very large" refunds early next year -- potentially $1,000 to $2,000 per household -- thanks to retroactive tax cuts in the recently passed One Big Beautiful Bill Act.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09141666-7836-4a9a-b558-67dc9acf58ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Retroactive Cuts Drive Refunds** : The OBBBA's provisions apply back to 2025 earnings, but withholding tables remained unchanged after the bill's July passage, leading to over-withheld taxes totaling $100-150 billion.
* **Extends 2017 Tax Relief** : The act permanently extends lower rates and higher standard deductions from Trump's 2017 cuts, preventing a scheduled tax hike that would have hit in 2026.
* **Future Paycheck Boost Ahead** : Once taxpayers adjust withholding in 2026, Bessent predicts higher take-home pay and a "very good year" economically.
* **Trump 's Bold Promise Fulfilled**: President Trump has touted this as the "largest tax refund season ever," amid efforts to ease affordability concerns like rising costs for groceries and housing.

* * *
* * *
# **Roomba maker iROBOT goes bankrupt, to be bought by Chinese supplier**
iRobot, the pioneering U.S. company behind the iconic Roomba robotic vacuum cleaner,[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/4ad25794-3e5e-4172-98e9-e4d11d41f94b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection](https://substack.com/redirect/4ad25794-3e5e-4172-98e9-e4d11d41f94b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Sunday as fierce competition from low-cost Chinese rivals, crippling new tariffs, and the fallout from a collapsed Amazon acquisition deal pushed it to the brink, paving the way for its primary manufacturer to take full control.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4ad25794-3e5e-4172-98e9-e4d11d41f94b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Chinese Manufacturer Acquires Control** : Shenzhen-based Picea Robotics will own 100% of iRobot's equity post-restructuring, canceling over $260 million in debts while taking the company private.
* **Tariffs Hammer Costs** : New U.S. tariffs, including a 46% levy on imports from Vietnam, added $23 million in expenses this year alone, exacerbating planning challenges amid manufacturing reliance overseas.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/f6b0e85b-cf86-4f8b-b586-4d6581584816?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Amazon Deal Fallout Lingers** : The failed $1.7 billion acquisition by Amazon in 2024, blocked by regulators, left iRobot struggling with debt and delayed payments to suppliers like Picea.
* **Operations Remain Unaffected** : The pre-packaged bankruptcy ensures no disruptions to customer apps, product support, supply chains, or payments to most creditors and vendors, with 274 employees retained.

Latest Valuation Jump : The recent insider tender offer priced SpaceX shares at $421 each, pushing the company's overall valuation to approximately $800 billion. Previous Paper Windfall : Earlier in 2025, a prior tender valuing SpaceX at $350 billion triggered an $8 billion unrealized gain for Alphabet, helping beat Wall Street earnings estimates. Earnings Impact Ahead : Investors will watch Alphabet's next quarterly report for this new non-cash boost from revaluing non-marketable equity securities like its SpaceX holding. Bessent hypes 2025 retroactive tax returns Treasury Secretary that American taxpayers can expect "very large" refunds early next year -- potentially $1,000 to $2,000 per household -- thanks to retroactive tax cuts in the recently passed One Big Beautiful Bill Act. | | ---|---|--- Retroactive Cuts Drive Refunds : The OBBBA's provisions apply back to 2025 earnings, but withholding tables remained unchanged after the bill's July passage, leading to over-withheld taxes totaling $100-150 billion. Extends 2017 Tax Relief : The act permanently extends lower rates and higher standard deductions from Trump's 2017 cuts, preventing a scheduled tax hike that would have hit in 2026. Future Paycheck Boost Ahead : Once taxpayers adjust withholding in 2026, Bessent predicts higher take-home pay and a "very good year" economically. Trump 's Bold Promise Fulfilled: President Trump has touted this as the "largest tax refund season ever," amid efforts to ease affordability concerns like rising costs for groceries and housing. Roomba maker iROBOT goes bankrupt, to be bought by Chinese supplier iRobot, the pioneering U.S. company behind the iconic Roomba robotic vacuum cleaner, on Sunday as fierce competition from low-cost Chinese rivals, crippling new tariffs, and the fallout from a collapsed Amazon acquisition deal pushed it to the brink, paving the way for its primary manufacturer to take full control. | | ---|---|--- Chinese Manufacturer Acquires Control : Shenzhen-based Picea Robotics will own 100% of iRobot's equity post-restructuring, canceling over $260 million in debts while taking the company private. Tariffs Hammer Costs : New U.S. tariffs, including a 46% levy on imports from Vietnam, added $23 million in expenses this year alone, exacerbating planning challenges amid manufacturing reliance overseas. Amazon Deal Fallout Lingers : The failed $1.7 billion acquisition by Amazon in 2024, blocked by regulators, left iRobot struggling with debt and delayed payments to suppliers like Picea. Operations Remain Unaffected : The pre-packaged bankruptcy ensures no disruptions to customer apps, product support, supply chains, or payments to most creditors and vendors, with 274 employees retained. The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism * You're currently a free subscriber to . body:
It’s not hyperbole to say that Democratic majorities could be decided here. |
#

Team — In Michigan, we’re fighting like hell to make life easier for Michiganders in all 83 counties. We’re supporting the governor’s work to lower costs, fix the damn roads, and elect champions for working people across the country. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121331992/589108763/-1313101069?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20251215_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjZhMjcwMTUtZTRkOS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7vKc9LPZuHIzVofaiY5oapWtso5MB7NHNG4zYiVYXns=) But it’s not hyperbole to say that the future of our country depends on what we do here in Michigan. **With the GOP’s hold on the House of Representatives so narrow and another open U.S. Senate seat on the ballot in 2026, Michigan could truly help decide the House and Senate majority next year.** In other words, _a lot_ is riding on the work we do here in Michigan. name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: Serious mistakes, serious consequences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20251215-60995&t=1001&akid=60995%2E1407376%2E0z--_X ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20251215-60995&t=1002&akid=60995%2E1407376%2E0z--_X ]Demand Justice PAC

Federal judges are blowing the whistle on a Justice Department in chaos —
and it’s no accident.

Top DOJ officials, handpicked for loyalty to Trump rather than experience,
are bungling cases left and right. From failed indictments against former
FBI Director James Comey, to illegally pushing Texas to redraw
congressional maps, to botched prosecutions of protesters and immigration
enforcement missteps, the pattern is clear: partisan loyalty is destroying
competence.

One judge called the DOJ’s redistricting letter riddled with errors,
making it difficult to follow. Another identified 11 critical mistakes in
the Comey indictment process, including the shocking oversight of never
presenting the final indictment to a full grand jury. And across the
country, federal courts have found serious flaws in the government’s
representations in more than 60 cases this year, according to a study by
Just Security.

These aren’t mistakes. They are signs of a department under pressure to
achieve outcomes for the White House, even if it means ignoring facts or
bending the law. The result is a Justice Department that courts and the
American people can no longer rely on.

Demand Justice is fighting back. We’re holding lawmakers accountable,
advocating for court reforms, and pushing for qualified judges to have
seats on the bench — not cronies playing politics with the law.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20251215.p62Ob5&refcode=em20251215-60995&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=60995%2E1407376%2E0z--_X ]Stand with us. Every dollar you give helps us fight for a judiciary
that serves the people, not partisan interests.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20251215.p62Ob5&amount=5&refcode=em20251215-60995&t=1022&akid=60995%2E1407376%2E0z--_X ]Donate $5 ››

Thank you,

Demand Justice PAC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.demandjustice.org/survey/less-emails?t=1023&akid=60995%2E1407376%2E0z--_X

Email us: feedback@demandjustice.org

611 Pennsylvania Ave SE, #192, Washington DC 20003
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: BARA Endorses David Flippo for Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Bolivian Americans know David will fight the socialists in Congress! |
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=7c5faa830c&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Peter ,
I proudly announce that the **Bolivian American Republican Alliance (BARA)** has officially endorsed my campaign for Congress in **NV-04.** The Bolivian American Republican Alliance fights to protect the United States from the evils of socialism, with the unique insight of firsthand experience with its catastrophic outcomes. BARA stands for economic freedom, strong borders, strong families, and the Constitution! Here is what BARA had to say when they endorsed me:
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=fb9033925f&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| “As conservative Bolivian Americans who know the dangers of socialism and corruption, we support leaders who defend the Constitution, secure the border, and protect faith, family, and freedom. David Flippo is that leader—a decorated veteran with strong experience and a firm grasp of international relations at a time of global instability.”
---
| [DONATE TO STAND AGAINST THE SOCIALIST AMERICAN LEFT ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=f7201d98cb&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE TO STAND AGAINST THE SOCIALIST AMERICAN LEFT ")
---
| Republicans across the country, especially Bolivian Americans, are aware of how rapidly the Democratic Party has embraced socialism and its “Big Government” ideals like censorship and gun control. **I am grateful to have the support of an organization that is fully aware of what we are up against and is willing to stand with us in the fight against far-left Democrats.** In Congress, **I will fight socialists and defend the values of economic freedom, family values, and a secure southern border!**
We have a real opportunity to defeat the radical socialists in the Democratic Party, but it will take all of us working together. **I am matching every single dollar that is being donated, so your donation will have 2X the impact! Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?**
---
| [DONATE ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=5f3404b8f8&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE ")

**[www.Flippo4NV.com](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=2533d7bb80&e=273c9a71fb)**

name: Local Democracy Project
subject: Save your local grocery store - tell Congress to reverse SNAP cuts!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
**[🚨 Trump’s Gut Punch: Sign the Petition to Save SNAP and Our Local Economy! 🚨](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_5hbu1DV_K1a9EsXVVRCLGzNDN9RaChIjhs_BjC-rapuJ8xJOSNHWxgZz33uQNrri6fbPF5CfAUIzcoEm4eQw8cUk-uPFDyRs-2ExKnM-wXERiRJQfK-L7IhKFcHBjRCzY0i49smE7N4E5epts8Vm2LtSRbCF4Qaz6zxoZsShf2NkV2xewhW4_sJwhtqXtrEtFBb-EIlQHiHfpciS-1J071KAAh2WzHt6l6h27M2C_sMPu1VFam_oLlE6QVeoC6FTDu1Vawdeee1TeJYojyT53ZrJE9pZn36hqZidCFDz5Shu0YVuduRY_KIU9pmasJIpCuijH9wt5n-npx-EL7fkyxltf-rxnNZ4IVz80Gbths-qoU3zv0W7xhPxPXhRZ75V1jDJ-R7mjAA0Ar8gFD88tio9Ql4IPdGQVE-wlA3D2-9Fq7a5h131txSXJMAh0GNNSIrj3WfQohcrAYosVAtg6IzuDR_06zCCVE5CEoQdrIq3It0eVmhceuIf6t0Xv0ZQ5ewv9p-bM3OvsBoxjL8UA/4mg/8wrrioh7Qpu0tKYbbKCwyQ/h0/h001.ZmxiTSs6nSNaMmbxHZSNI2-MjIQpqUFluoHpV9TwCWk)**
* * *
Let's cut the BS. The big, ugly bill Trump and the Republicans rammed through slashed SNAP benefits delivering a sickening gut punch to millions of Americans. People are already paying the price. This isn't some abstract budget fight; this is about whether your neighbors eat and whether your local grocer survives. **We need to fight this disaster. These SNAP cuts aren't just an act of heartless cruelty; they're an economic wrecking ball.** _At the Local Democracy Project, we’re fighting to restore democracy in our communities and at every level, up and down the ballot._ **[Join us and add your name to the petition demanding Congress REVERSE their devastating SNAP cuts!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_5hbu1DV_K1a9EsXVVRCLGzNDN9RaChIjhs_BjC-rapuJ8xJOSNHWxgZz33uQNrri6fbPF5CfAUIzcoEm4eQw8cUk-uPFDyRs-2ExKnM-wXERiRJQfK-L7IhKFcHBjRCzY0i49smE7N4E5epts8Vm2LtSRbCF4Qaz6zxoZsShf2NkV2xewhW4_sJwhtqXtrEtFBb-EIlQHiHfpciS-1J071KAAh2WzHt6l6h27M2C_sMPu1VFam_oLlE6QVeoC6FTDu1Vawdeee1TeJYojyT53q59oYJvMi4Zetetnhe-rLFfbb_3BvNnBQKpRtzik_nS7GmPzYL03maImeiSdrH7ihMVRjFlH-WScrplUhaxcW9HXao_0SiCSl6Ad2My9w-t1JanzriACxXc8HxkFC7Q_ACQAryk_k_JqNZ2hQfZfgdOdGkdNvGOAu17DGrMbtp6Tr1RhvuNZ-pFA3n3pPdvOM3pltN5H1tQhxZcSn7oEW6e77YyYrO_zrxZc0UMisg5NBp3Jfjc2HDwdRyHdKd1G/4mg/8wrrioh7Qpu0tKYbbKCwyQ/h1/h001.StZGfGEPvZGhoKj78mrRxfFpwJHhTTs5GcSHqqXV0Y4)** [Sign](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_5hbu1DV_K1a9EsXVVRCLGzNDN9RaChIjhs_BjC-rapuJ8xJOSNHWxgZz33uQNrri6fbPF5CfAUIzcoEm4eQw8cUk-uPFDyRs-2ExKnM-wXERiRJQfK-L7IhKFcHBjRCzY0i49smE7N4E5epts8Vm2LtSRbCF4Qaz6zxoZsShf2NkV2xewhW4_sJwhtqXtrEtFBb-EIlQHiHfpciS-1J071KAAh2WzHt6l6h27M2C_sMPu1VFam_oLlE6QVeoC6FTDu1Vawdeee1TeJYojyT53Ev4DD00lnKVNyeK3qHdeEPEIRgLZ67YYlsw53lZWsTCjCsZ5K2308gmdQRNxgnZqPOlSwRNtk0JM3cQgiFNakQhlx85RQmZPBy6EsGUNXJcR9hrcnL8jWAbxIeCNDCIw0UAh5Le8J4x2iZGUnuiqF6tNKIk0s-m3EeutIxIW6EVeVvhAFVjeufkIY-J6b4ZTZU1QASaq0T9VeAoQ7MsajsLJXy3lAcgT_2neM1I7_HbPnfw1nDG9_8DZJP7EKoxG/4mg/8wrrioh7Qpu0tKYbbKCwyQ/h2/h001.rZcflUNBtoeqJFUJLkyQVKUSRJPKqN7o0Am9GMMSJHg)
Think about it: Small, local grocers rely on SNAP for up to 70% of their revenue. One grocer put it straight: these cuts "could literally wipe out" local stores.
* **The Squeeze:** When benefits are kneecapped, people are forced away from local shops and into the consolidated clutches of giants like Walmart, just to save pennies.
* **The Death Blow:** No SNAP revenue means no cash for payroll or inventory. Owners lay off workers and throw out fresh food.
* **The Result:** Your corner store closes. The neighborhood, SNAP recipient or not, gets turned into a food desert. _Simple and awful as that._

**They cut the lifeline, and now our local economies are bleeding out. We can't let this stand. We are demanding Congress reverse these devastating cuts NOW.** **[Join the Local Democracy Project in fighting back. Sign the petition. Tell Congress we see their big, ugly bill for what it is, and we won’t let them starve our communities or crush our local businesses.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_5hbu1DV_K1a9EsXVVRCLGzNDN9RaChIjhs_BjC-rapuJ8xJOSNHWxgZz33uQNrri6fbPF5CfAUIzcoEm4eQw8cUk-uPFDyRs-2ExKnM-wXERiRJQfK-L7IhKFcHBjRCzY0i49smE7N4E5epts8Vm2LtSRbCF4Qaz6zxoZsShf2NkV2xewhW4_sJwhtqXtrEtFBb-EIlQHiHfpciS-1J071KAAh2WzHt6l6h27M2C_sMPu1VFam_oLlE6QVeoC6FTDu1Vawdeee1TeJYojyT53iSCMG-ljq5CTdvuvzklvJWX5kkHcWgFiSkATSsvyzVnX5NazbOUPzvVCBsK4GeA9UaLv5R96IJFL_uhxwonskpWPsP0BJXRZ9CNCLL5zzp50cw9rIj_f0zc2MuNUljyd_se8LG3Or78NLPlC65Nz32z6UKDbCXShMFZN0hnr0POcCuKgBXnLWrfq6beHYHhxzzGpGhOZE8CspypovmGD3oRZHnMW_ZMCaOBK5g3iA736x8uRjGvrtNwRp40a8Qe_/4mg/8wrrioh7Qpu0tKYbbKCwyQ/h3/h001.achoaMpVDyXja0H5gvROeI3-QmYb6qSCDTfIzembD5U)** Thanks for your support,

[Local Democracy Project](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v92pwawuJ-Tgw-w_8VW1Eqj_E6gKejjkBbK1FhMj4e83tBGhz7daNN6ysq2ugn9vYjZTulKyiRVQI2YScmVhda0b62JFtyOHPT4Nc1KN557-5bofPx7A80D9xjJhdbJqUyQL1gxprgpwuHfDfS7ZaOqD0cxBhr6vA-JHCXkAoePWtCXnP9qN8FNmi__7a8N-APdv90kNPmAEGKGzT4vqvgC2mF5PAnCrwF4gUlKhEPL-Fcze0Qo1v45rbQ_Ac-bBnHUGo9uuzlDXIyTdx_JMSGqosjYC860my6If9KSJcfJi3_RTINlvnfEF6UAFtTzaU8ANfVkEIRfgLc5QuFd7U0CVGcHpZ2jIQwCR6bfNdEs/4mg/8wrrioh7Qpu0tKYbbKCwyQ/h5/h001.fMMUwgPLMrkMGPwnEOo71D6IUTRjUyAvlanFZjPf-XE) supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. body:

name: Voter Action Project Georgia
subject: Georgia's election board wants to end mail-in voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Georgia Recorder: State election panel recommends ending no-excuse absentee voting in Georgia [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121525_2&amount=25]
Team, right to the point: Georgia’s State Election Board recently approved a proposal to recommend that state lawmakers ban "no-excuse" mail-in voting. The board has now officially recommended that the Georgia state legislature change laws that were first adopted back in 2005. This would effectively end absentee voting in Georgia if the legislature passes a bill following the recommendation when they reconvene in January for their 2026 legislative session.
A record number of Georgians voted by mail-in ballot during the 2020 presidential election due to the COVID-19 pandemic. Georgia, however, became ground zero for the Big Lie after Trump lost the state in that election and blamed his loss on unfounded accusations of rampant voting fraud, particularly among mail-in ballots.
Even so: Multiple investigations have found no evidence of widespread voting fraud in the 2020 election in Georgia despite widespread use of absentee voting. That hasn't stopped Trump's efforts, however, because his MAGA Department of Justice recently sued Fulton County (home to Atlanta) for voting data related to that election.
When you put it all together, these are blatant attempts to skew the 2026 election before a vote is even cast by picking and choosing which Georgia votes get to count.
We're focused on defending our elections and making sure every eligible vote counts, not picking a winner ahead of time. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us fight back against this stealth voter suppression >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121525_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=121525_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=121525_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=121525_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=121525_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=121525_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121525_2&amount=35]
Severely limiting who can vote by mail isn't the only change these vengeful partisans are pursuing. The board also voted to recommend that the Legislature limit the amount of time overseas and military voters have to return absentee ballots. Currently, mail-in ballots cast by Georgia voters will be counted if they are received within three days of Election Day, so long as they are postmarked before the election. The new recommendation is that the legislature only count ballots from overseas voters that are received by 7 p.m. on election day.
You read that correctly -- the state Election Board is so against mail-in voting that they're willing to toss the legitimate ballots of our men and women in uniform for postal delays.
As for Fulton County? This is a clear partisan action by Trump's DOJ to disenfranchise and suppress voters who they don't think will cast a ballot for their candidates. Every eligible voter they wrongly kick off the rolls or find a way to invalidate their ballot is one less vote their chosen candidate needs to win.
We need to speak with one loud, clear voice and tell Georgia's and every state legislature: We won't stand for any of these suppressive policies. Not now, not ever.
Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to restrict voting until we make them stop. Fuel our efforts to protect the right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121525_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121525_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121525_2&amount=20]

name: Derek Tran
subject: Reaching out personally
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121335565/589116572/148511826?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmQxODhkMi1lOGQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3YtPDraAcdE9Hamkav2sELAwSsI5ibHaCBQTsHLz20=)
Peter,

If we haven't met yet, I’m Derek Tran. I’m a veteran, small business owner, and the newly-elected representative in California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive district in Southern California.

In 2024, I defied the odds and flipped this seat from red-to-blue in what became one of most competitive House races in the country. **We won by only 653 votes.** And in case there were any doubts, Republicans have already made it clear I’m their #1 target to defeat in 2026.

**[More in a moment, but my race is already heating up, and I’m hoping you can split a $10 donation between my campaign and George Whitesides today. Your grassroots support will be critical to keeping CA-45 blue and taking back the House majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121335566/589116573/-195268855?refcode=em-12.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmQxODhkMi1lOGQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3YtPDraAcdE9Hamkav2sELAwSsI5ibHaCBQTsHLz20=)**
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121335567/589116574/-195268855?refcode=em-12.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmQxODhkMi1lOGQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3YtPDraAcdE9Hamkav2sELAwSsI5ibHaCBQTsHLz20=)****
---

**I’m the proud son of Vietnamese refugees.** My parents fled the Communist regime and left everything behind to start over in the United States, in hopes of giving me a better life.

**Leaving behind their home was not easy, but my parents were able to survive on their work ethic and their belief in the American Dream.** That dream became a reality when they opened up a corner store in Southern California, where I spent my summers behind the register learning the value of hard work.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121335568/589116575/-195268855?refcode=em-12.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmQxODhkMi1lOGQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3YtPDraAcdE9Hamkav2sELAwSsI5ibHaCBQTsHLz20=)
**America gave my parents a chance so there was no question that I’d want to give back to the country that gave so much to me.** At the age of 18, I enlisted in the Army and proudly served my country. And now, I’m serving in Congress to ensure that every family can realize the same American Dream that mine did all those years ago.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121335569/589116576/-195268855?refcode=em-12.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmQxODhkMi1lOGQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3YtPDraAcdE9Hamkav2sELAwSsI5ibHaCBQTsHLz20=)
Listen, Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and extreme House Republicans have put that dream at risk. They’ve made it clear that they’re willing to do whatever it takes to line their own pockets, while you pay the price.

I’m working hard to stand up to corruption in Congress and fight for our community, but with Republicans fighting to flip this seat back, I’ll need your help to stay here.

**[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll consider pitching in $10 between my re-election campaign and George Whitesides today. Every dollar makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121335570/589116577/-195268855?refcode=em-12.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmQxODhkMi1lOGQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3YtPDraAcdE9Hamkav2sELAwSsI5ibHaCBQTsHLz20=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, If we haven't met yet, I’m Derek Tran. I’m a veteran, small business owner, and the newly-elected representative in California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive district in Southern California. In 2024, I defied the odds and flipped this seat from red-to-blue in what became one of most competitive House races in the country. We won by only 653 votes. And in case there were any doubts, Republicans have already made it clear I’m their #1 target to defeat in 2026. = | **= I’m the proud son of Vietnamese refugees. My parents fled the Communist regime and left everything behind to start over in the United States, in hopes of giving me a better life. Leaving behind their home was not easy, but my parents were able to survive on their work ethic and their belief in the American Dream. That dream became a reality when they opened up a corner store in Southern California, where I spent my summers behind the register learning the value of hard work. = America gave my parents a chance so there was no question that I’d want to give back to the country that gave so much to me. At the age of 18, I enlisted in the Army and proudly served my country. And now, I’m serving in Congress to ensure that every family can realize the same American Dream that mine did all those years ago. = Listen, Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and extreme House Republicans have put that dream at risk. They’ve made it clear that they’re willing to do whatever it takes to line their own pockets, while you pay the price. I’m working hard to stand up to corruption in Congress and fight for our community, but with Republicans fighting to flip this seat back, I’ll need your help to stay here. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Let’s do this together, Peter. Derek Tran | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

In 1985, 25 fearless women — the Founding Mothers of EMILYs List — gathered in Ellen R. Malcolm's basement armed with their rolodexes and an ambitious vision: to create a network of at least 1,000 members dedicated to electing Democratic pro-choice women to every level of office. Not only did they achieve this goal in just 10 months — they surpassed it.

Nearly 41 years later, our millions-strong community has made history time and time again. We have a big year ahead of us, Peter, with ambitious goals to flip the U.S. House and Senate and to win critical local elections! clean_body: 1️⃣ perfect way to secure your place on the list → | = Hey Peter — I'm thrilled to share some exciting news: Today marks the kickoff of our Early Bird 2026 Membership Drive! In 1985, 25 fearless women — the Founding Mothers of EMILYs List — gathered in Ellen R. Malcolm's basement armed with their rolodexes and an ambitious vision: to create a network of at least 1,000 members dedicated to electing Democratic pro-choice women to every level of office. Not only did they achieve this goal in just 10 months — they surpassed it. Nearly 41 years later, our millions-strong community has made history time and time again. = | = While EMILYs List looks a little different in 2025 than it did in 1985, our mission hasn't changed. We invest early and fight hard for Democratic pro-choice women running for office up and down the ballot, from coast to coast. We have a big year ahead of us, Peter, with ambitious goals to flip the U.S. House and Senate and to win critical local elections! By donating today, you'll secure your 2026 EMILYs List membership – which means you're on the ground floor of an incredible year of recruitment, endorsement, victories, and so much more. name: Laura Gillen
subject: Tired
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
I know there are days when it feels like the news never stops. The fundraising numbers, the attacks, the warnings about what 2026 could look like, it can all feel like too much. And if one more political email makes you want to close your inbox I truly understand. But I want to tell you why this one matters.

| Peter,

I know there are days when it feels like the news never stops. The fundraising numbers, the attacks, the warnings about what 2026 could look like, it can all feel like too much.

And if one more political email makes you want to close your inbox I truly understand.

But I want to tell you why this one matters.
---
| [GIVE NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121335923/589117125/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-12-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBlNzg4Ny1lOWQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=79j6C0gTX4uDFsbDPTZ_LUMBcoy9BplPBOYH8a3xe2o=)
---
Republicans are outraising Democrats for the first time in years and they are channeling that money directly into the most vulnerable districts in the country with our district at the top of that list. They see this seat as their fastest path to keeping the House and they are acting like it.

If they flip this district, Democrats lose one of our few chances to stop the chaos, expose their corruption and hold this Republican controlled government accountable. We can’t take back the House without holding this seat. It’s that simple.

This district was decided by just _two points_. My opponent from last cycle is weighing another run. And national Republicans are already working overtime to make sure they have the resources to win.

**That’s why I send these emails and that’s why I ask for your help.**

Without grassroots support, there is no path to protecting this seat and no path to ending the Republican trifecta.

[_**If you can chip in today, it would mean a lot. And if now isn’t the right time, thank you for being part of this team. Your support still matters.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121335924/589117127/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-12-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBlNzg4Ny1lOWQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=79j6C0gTX4uDFsbDPTZ_LUMBcoy9BplPBOYH8a3xe2o=)

Despite constant attacks from the right, she’s always reported the truth and honored her duty to inform the American people.

[**But listen, if we don’t prove massive support for Jen Psaki, her ratings could tank and _Fox News_ would win!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71035?t=8&akid=23733%2E4449941%2EhaEUJ7)

name: Maurice Mitchell, Working Families Party
subject: Our movement can and will defeat MAGA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
In the face of MAGA’s nonstop attacks, not one of you buckled under the pressure. We rose to the occasion and fought back. | | | Dear Peter, it’s Maurice Mitchell, National Director of the Working Families Party. 2025 has been one of our biggest tests ever. Immigrant communities are under constant attack by masked kidnappers. Our cities are being occupied by military personnel. And millions of families are facing food and health care crises more severe than any other time in modern US history. **But in the face of MAGA’s nonstop attacks, not one of you buckled under the pressure. We rose to the occasion and fought back.** We have taken to the streets, time and time again, to protect our neighbors. We have won _historic_ political victories all across the country, electing true working class champions like **Zohran Mamdani, Adelita Grijalva, Katie Wilson, Shenise Turner-Sloss, and more** to all kinds of offices. And support for the Working Families Party — and our vision for a new political party that doesn’t surrender to the GOP — is higher than it's ever been. **All of that, and more, is thanks to you. And you’ll be the key to our work in 2026, too.** Not only are we going to continue to fight Trump’s agenda with everything we’ve got, but we also have spring primary elections — including **WFP champions like Brad Lander, Nida Allam, and Randy Villegas** — fast-approaching, and the chance to kick MAGA out of power in the midterm elections in the fall. That’s why we’re setting an ambitious fundraising goal to close out the year strong, and be well-equipped to take on these challenges _and win_. **Between now and midnight on December 31st, we need to raise $100,000. And I sincerely hope you can help push us past that goal.** **[Please make a contribution today and help the Working Families Party reach our end-of-year fundraising goal. We’re building an alternative vision of how the government should work and _who_ it's supposed to serve, and your support gives us the resources we need to win.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9TYM2ujKOIJdCIDub-bHyeZ0r9V0YqSHsZ-a23c8_6RH5nXEfu7M22gFPZRPDaApeM_JOPnYDJ6u0m3qu5y-CKeJ5k5_KE7Zrgp1EOSiB80gVQYnJydLtPNXPOHG6Hbo3gUJsBhzMDxw1ZIcAkqEd17ZcWSd4in1vCjfk-7hjBPQlGLpoKXdBhFbJ7zZtB-AFP3DVnx0pSZhz4Yxykxs-2YbUqSuhWiYS3VlDemfoBtffgCAgmsn3hzy1vCmzX3uMZUWD2SldrWmvxo18Tef__f0kK1-yR9UmaVaVcGZy0GW4Sf5nTi-3HLCZ6U5HvdZ_M-ETB69GmKpafgjBo5Q29y2bujtc7CBW4D34PwcNhsLByYN2LFqmhoDNUUprkSuAQyZdDqDsSAb6Iuxzv1a7Ng/4mg/pluegrOLQnS2-P-jOLqcGA/h0/h001.a16IXe0v1M7BGq9D6ZO7oXunHMz3rmBaW-QNNatoz3Q)** **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9TYM2ujKOIJdCIDub-bHyeZ0r9V0YqSHsZ-a23c8_6RFhy852Sa8jw4jjr5BRHakzK-qPhofx2q1u0rGnl3Bn2MjLWgUEQb3ueiPpLpEd_Ut2dvCUCWQr8YfQc8KiWgkIz9utrr4sR5GdIemjBNqT9bjRwHjLIW_dPvTIz1fi85kxVp_ien9lX0eNc0X3Rg7XgW9z_1eU0DMFPvF1Im4UfhVTYYnSlIGIrpD_6xyXKzVEVrXbP2-oCiqzL3Hhp6v-RvmoWlzyORiW03WtTbYEzq3keuI9xQqsVrRxaFtXFCysj-fb7oQ9OcXVN6p4jm6jfZjb_1u1lgRETqJshsixPDMq4HV8_bi5AnVfmNRjQgM-9wqbdvXcxIVSZyT_AXe4jhrboq7hw24cD0uQ2ufeyQ/4mg/pluegrOLQnS2-P-jOLqcGA/h1/h001.9NHJimIKRgZICSE7WEXVWR-lJvG4P6JQliUNBzs6iLM)** A year ago, after Donald Trump’s victory left us all reeling, I wrote about the challenges we were facing, and the work we had in store for us:
> _Now more than ever, we must build community — to protect each other from harmful attacks, to fill the gaps where our government falls short, and to build lasting power for the future. Because the easy response to this is to point fingers and blame voters. Or simply retreat, shut down, and tune out. **But we can't wait around for the system to change on its own.** Both major parties have failed working people, and it's time to build independent political power — one that centers solidarity, and focuses on winning victories that families can see and feel. The bottom line is this: **having hope is a choice.** _
Despite how terrifying much of the last 12 months has been, I can’t express my love and gratitude enough for how you’ve shown up for your friends, your neighbors, and strangers alike. This movement that we’re building is proving, day in and day out, that solidarity is a verb, and it is a powerful one. We’re proving that when we stand shoulder to shoulder with one another, not only can we hold our ground against authoritarian bullies, **we can beat them.** So please, stay involved. Help keep your communities safe. **[If you can afford to, pitch in to support our work here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9TYM2ujKOIJdCIDub-bHyeZ0r9V0YqSHsZ-a23c8_6RH5nXEfu7M22gFPZRPDaApeBwUetnaW7DF2ymUioCX-AT_x6_ECndBBaOrDAiLhBBsC4-c7k4DKzi4cxiX4pftfWwbPx36dR-cRRqYot_hGC9c0-pfRGIOvbwDiW2X7LBL1QLsEUFM7Mp9XYbYzDtQ9ypKBVbzUklKWn02yzI_wMVGd13R1MOef9cuAiBrZwo0zvEDwy2Y62Z5o-jrZ95JZbLRVDKNS3LdAOJbZO3sHezLMvpvH53M-LYoWvLPz9B8_DlYRpLFPNhZmCaA_ki_IShifQT_wbFPTc3G2_O3s7ybjsvUdAYJ-yTUe_8fVRWWKz59pZqmUZkDlNk-fhXMlpZCCTAERSC5jVeO6VaEEQQ/4mg/pluegrOLQnS2-P-jOLqcGA/h2/h001.1YtP7-jLOkyQYs2UbW-iNTnv-wYIARtQcgSY4Z8vkck)** And above all else, continue to lend a hand to those around you. Both major parties have failed working people, and it's time to build independent political power — one that centers solidarity, and focuses on winning victories that families can see and feel. The bottom line is this: having hope is a choice. Despite how terrifying much of the last 12 months has been, I can’t express my love and gratitude enough for how you’ve shown up for your friends, your neighbors, and strangers alike. This movement that we’re building is proving, day in and day out, that solidarity is a verb, and it is a powerful one. We’re proving that when we stand shoulder to shoulder with one another, not only can we hold our ground against authoritarian bullies, we can beat them. So please, stay involved. Help keep your communities safe. And above all else, continue to lend a hand to those around you. Sincerely, Maurice Mitchell National Director Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families Party and Working Families Power, please .

name: Josh and Erin Hawley
subject: Introducing Love Life Initiative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
The next chapter of the pro-life movement| | |
---
| |
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/oA7Y4ZxwUmdO_hMi2rAvbON2EC2NWXb-rIo3t2fMR6IO-Ki_PIKPAX-coK4wX2Jg78hVH5smN4KcupRLi0GnIePQkZsJpiKQ4nuq2pdDNbbhuHiLbk29oQymQMFLqOHRt1Eq2bE-_fLMn0Kssx5Q3lb06Jp1Kiql9Hsfo3ai67ilKtvwN8DgDasi6GZoh78wtn_xeeSSKrg90xyjBnK83nl5Ooeph3vSrsA01V217AQfNRv9Amuv557XyyiToZkbu4eZAPWuQ0nhJsp2Ag1g6T-zPUbdxnY6oyXJfEiEX4yeEWLSZIEr30qEkDKhBe3jCtQIzPV6825PHaYW6hnZ_K5pCBMLJx0Nk3aj9S_ZwPBW7LMJJlF-Jh3joE8uzHYycRd6tbrRNv_Sae4A14ZsaR4NbDwZ_xuLVCFgtbanmLhzyovyUas_9GOjYCjglbB0cWHsc_wnIQ/Ib9A0nV_hxgr67EMCusQJD0_d2e-VlzB/15)
---
| | Peter, it's Josh and Erin Hawley, with a message about the next chapter of the pro-life movement— _The_ _Love Life Initiative_. The heart of the _Love Life Initiative_ is a burning desire to restore a conviction that life is sacred, life is good, and life is worth protecting. Scoring pro-life victories in the courtroom is important, but if we as a nation fail to see the inherent value of each and every life, we will lose the argument on abortion and the very soul of our nation. The Supreme Court’s landmark Dobbs decision to overturn Roe v. Wade presents a wonderful opportunity— it makes the case for life, not to the courts, but to people: husbands and wives, women and men, young and old. As states craft their own legislation and policies regarding life, we want the value and dignity of life to be at the forefront of the conversation.
---
We live in a world that doesn’t prioritize or see the God-given value of life. Suicide rates are sky high, euthanasia is gaining traction worldwide, and people are losing their lives to overdose like never before—it’s no wonder the precious lives of the unborn are so trivialized. We want to change that. The Love Life Initiative team is passionate, gifted, battle-tested, and carrying a mandate to restore love for every life across the nation. There’s no limit to what we can accomplish, but we can’t accomplish anything alone. The Love Life Initiative needs your support to execute our nationwide campaign. Please consider contributing today to help remind Americans that life is sacred, good, and worth protecting. Thank you for your heart for saving innocent unborn life and building a culture of life in America.
---
[ **SUPPORT _LOVE LIFE INITIATIVE_** ](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/WVZeBZpcEYqd_nqr6T4U_U0bDmBJ0vTEvZGMK2ejwfKyE2TiM4j-alQbuUzRtnh5vLf6D2Kdv-iYJKPOLigD2qRo2-1HDec9GICNQDFMPllEKxmdteGygJAMNaboak5KAAYgWypM_-fTz7k0hoZNIGThXOaptnH5QukEZfJ-5ynQRx-MAIYUUpNSh-_aBaY0_PecITpZ_QJelrjrL9JgyAYtwy7Gm1qtgnnqsxGgkbkf-lNwh__Pn2YVVLf2wgO4qlKgnuNoe5X7JdKp_YNq8NG6smrlPR5PA14CAVYe71Dk47q4IXfefL61kGYsYP3OQjn7nbI4NYAvV_JOJf3-M7EHbcBtNCdOEmHDSFBoi9qB1MVOa3Q6fG_gFwIY8xXUInNFTZ55avkLahHpQlrfyQDFcze4aDWtGoPWe2vSLKOt-5PGKrmw37pcP8vWq5S_IKOx0N71pw/DZdCFBLk9dTNFAeCUS_TqVXZnCTl3mMT/15)
---
God Bless, Josh and Erin Hawley
---

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Boston Mayor for Details of Pro-Sanctuary Press Conference Featuring Mariachi Band
body:
Judicial Watch announced today it filed a Massachusetts Public Records Law lawsuit against the City of Boston for details about a press conference – opened by a mariachi band – held by Boston Mayor Michelle Wu on August 19, 2025, during which Wu publicly defied U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi’s demands that Boston comply with federal immigration law.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 15, 2025
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78332&L=36674&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYm9zdG9uLW1heW9yLXByby1zYW5jdHVhcnkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=7a5fc06b5a55d051bbfb068fda0821ae2d72eab9d606f42dbcda0fd06528999b) | **[Judicial Watch Sues Boston Mayor for Details of Pro-Sanctuary Press Conference Featuring Mariachi Band](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78332&L=36674&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYm9zdG9uLW1heW9yLXByby1zYW5jdHVhcnkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=7a5fc06b5a55d051bbfb068fda0821ae2d72eab9d606f42dbcda0fd06528999b)** Judicial Watch announced it filed a Massachusetts Public Records Law lawsuit against the City of Boston for details about a press conference – opened by a mariachi band – held by Boston Mayor Michelle Wu on August 19, 2025, during which Wu publicly defied U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi’s demands that Boston comply with federal immigration law (Judicial Watch v. City of Boston (No. 2584 cv 03395)). [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78332&L=36674&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYm9zdG9uLW1heW9yLXByby1zYW5jdHVhcnkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=7a5fc06b5a55d051bbfb068fda0821ae2d72eab9d606f42dbcda0fd06528999b)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78332&L=36675&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGVzLXJlbGVhc2UtOTAwMC1jcmltaW5hbC1hbGllbnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=de3edd0a1114bca98fdf5f09c74e29d975f0d8433dae3143e5e3d1fe655486b6) | **[Two Sanctuary States Release Nearly 9,000 Criminal Aliens with ICE Detainers Since January](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78332&L=36675&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGVzLXJlbGVhc2UtOTAwMC1jcmltaW5hbC1hbGllbnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=de3edd0a1114bca98fdf5f09c74e29d975f0d8433dae3143e5e3d1fe655486b6)** The Trump administration’s crackdown on illegal immigration has made great strides in a short time, but over a dozen states are making the effort more difficult by offering illegal aliens—even those convicted of serious crimes—sanctuary. Just two of those states, New York and Illinois, have released nearly 9,000 criminal aliens from jails and prisons since January 20, defying Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) detainers to deport them. Among the offenders protected by the sanctuary policies are murderers, terrorists, sexual predators and kidnappers, the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) confirms this month. | | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78332&L=36676&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVucy1pbmZhbW91cy1sYXB0b3AvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a2d4169112582d17f77a3b360b39de508c50e8506fcaa9ab6c26c2b47b4bb04e) | **[Judicial Watch Sues Justice Dept for FBI Records on Hunter Biden’s Infamous Laptop](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78332&L=36676&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVucy1pbmZhbW91cy1sYXB0b3AvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a2d4169112582d17f77a3b360b39de508c50e8506fcaa9ab6c26c2b47b4bb04e)** “The Justice Department’s refusal to release these basic investigative records raises serious questions about transparency and potential interference in one of the most consequential political stories in recent history,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “We will fight in court to get the public the answers it is entitled to under the law.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78332&L=36676&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVucy1pbmZhbW91cy1sYXB0b3AvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a2d4169112582d17f77a3b360b39de508c50e8506fcaa9ab6c26c2b47b4bb04e)

### [Illegal Alien Superintendent’s Voter Registration Docs Deepen Need For Better Vetting ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78332&L=36678&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsZWdhbC1hbGllbi1zdXBlcmludGVuZGVudHMtdm90ZXItcmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uLWRvY3MtZGVlcGVuLW5lZWQtZm9yLWJldHRlci12ZXR0aW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=76ffe2e245358eec194ba4086d1f0d923909812363ddf43b009f7825f403aaf8) The Federalist The illegal alien who ran Iowa’s largest public school district before being apprehended by ICE claimed to be a U.S. citizen on his Maryland voter registration forms, according to records obtained by the Public Interest Legal Foundation (PILF).

Earlier this year, a federal judge struck down a Board of Elections rule that “restricted and criminalized the use of voter registration lists for voter fraud and other ‘investigations,’” Judicial Watch reported. Maryland elections officials released Roberts’ records to PILF and other watchdogs in October, but the documents were heavily redacted — including the illegal immigrant’s response to the U.S. citizenship status question. ### [Socialist group ‘By Any Means Necessary’ escalates campaign to ‘stop’ Turning Point USA ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78332&L=36679&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc29jaWFsaXN0LWdyb3VwLXN0b3AtdHB1c2EvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=6aa86585c8b669b463bcfa23ba001008ba1a42a2801ed6035e88ea13aa0690e5) Fox News In a Sunday afternoon meeting called a “tribunal,” Yvette Felarca, a Berkeley, Calif., public school teacher and a local fixture among self-professed “anti-fascist” agitators, joyfully led about 40 members of the socialist organization By Any Means Necessary (BAMN) in an after-action report on the group’s “victory” last week in a bloody battle at the University of California, Berkeley against supporters of Turning Point USA.

In April 2019, a judge ordered Felarca to pay the organization, Judicial Watch, $20,000 in legal fees for challenging a public records request that Judicial Watch had filed in 2017 with Berkeley Unified School District, seeking all emails related to Felaraca and the words “antifa” and “BAMN,” the acronym for “By Any Means Necessary.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78332&L=36679&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc29jaWFsaXN0LWdyb3VwLXN0b3AtdHB1c2EvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=6aa86585c8b669b463bcfa23ba001008ba1a42a2801ed6035e88ea13aa0690e5)

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced today it filed a Massachusetts Public Records Law lawsuit against the City of Boston for details about a press conference – opened by a mariachi band – held by Boston Mayor Michelle Wu on August 19, 2025, during which Wu publicly defied U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi’s demands that Boston comply with federal immigration law. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 15, 2025 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced it filed a Massachusetts Public Records Law lawsuit against the City of Boston for details about a press conference – opened by a mariachi band – held by Boston Mayor Michelle Wu on August 19, 2025, during which Wu publicly defied U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi’s demands that Boston comply with federal immigration law (Judicial Watch v. City of Boston (No. 2584 cv 03395)). ---|--- | | | | | The Trump administration’s crackdown on illegal immigration has made great strides in a short time, but over a dozen states are making the effort more difficult by offering illegal aliens—even those convicted of serious crimes—sanctuary. Just two of those states, New York and Illinois, have released nearly 9,000 criminal aliens from jails and prisons since January 20, defying Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) detainers to deport them. Among the offenders protected by the sanctuary policies are murderers, terrorists, sexual predators and kidnappers, the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) confirms this month. ---|--- | | | | | “The Justice Department’s refusal to release these basic investigative records raises serious questions about transparency and potential interference in one of the most consequential political stories in recent history,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “We will fight in court to get the public the answers it is entitled to under the law.” ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for FBI records on Hillary Clinton’s deceased brother, Tony Rodham (Judicial Watch v U.S. Department of Justice (No.1:25-cv-04237)). ---|--- | | | The Federalist The illegal alien who ran Iowa’s largest public school district before being apprehended by ICE claimed to be a U.S. citizen on his Maryland voter registration forms, according to records obtained by the Public Interest Legal Foundation (PILF). Earlier this year, a federal judge struck down a Board of Elections rule that “restricted and criminalized the use of voter registration lists for voter fraud and other ‘investigations,’” Judicial Watch reported. Maryland elections officials released Roberts’ records to PILF and other watchdogs in October, but the documents were heavily redacted — including the illegal immigrant’s response to the U.S. citizenship status question. Fox News In a Sunday afternoon meeting called a “tribunal,” Yvette Felarca, a Berkeley, Calif., public school teacher and a local fixture among self-professed “anti-fascist” agitators, joyfully led about 40 members of the socialist organization By Any Means Necessary (BAMN) in an after-action report on the group’s “victory” last week in a bloody battle at the University of California, Berkeley against supporters of Turning Point USA. In April 2019, a judge ordered Felarca to pay the organization, Judicial Watch, $20,000 in legal fees for challenging a public records request that Judicial Watch had filed in 2017 with Berkeley Unified School District, seeking all emails related to Felaraca and the words “antifa” and “BAMN,” the acronym for “By Any Means Necessary.” Fox News A video of former President Barack Obama saying that the U.S. should experiment with new forms of journalism and government restraints on social media went viral on Wednesday, as critics blasted the former president’s remarks. Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton wrote that Obama was opposing the First Amendment and “wants to jail and fine Americans in an ‘experiment’ with government regulation of journalism.” | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

Hi Advocate for Life, Every day, women across America search online for answers. They are scared, uncertain, and convinced abortion is their only option. That's where **PreBorn!** steps in. Our Network Clinics across the nation provide **free ultrasounds** , **holistic** **compassionate care** , and the **gospel of Jesus Christ** to women in crisis. Because when a mother sees her baby for the first time, when she hears that heartbeat, everything changes. In fact, 81% of women who receive an ultrasound, can see their baby and hear the heartbeat, will choose life for their babies. And your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and gives her the chance to meet her baby and hear of God's love for her. As our thank-you, we'll send you PreBorn!'s [**_Tiny Miracles, Mighty Futures_ 2026**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/WimDTVeuC_PrGB6KZ68FT7nQAsxKhyqgi_60o2ARs0BOeF9KOGQMISI9bw2d7fHeXks035IVQTVFyjFj-W2WnLh2eqLhHodcdRH1efSxa6Ldhf8jCqVt8tXbsGNIviqWdreZO6KA3TCcOh7aOYmu_ZDv4K3ViR6Zu82HjRFegNpDUufEAaA6SdjpjkJHQM-_e0tvThzVbqYwf5nW_lZfa-nM7TdKkpwpXSXIAhM1SSj0oKR1bsfG8pOenlm8rc9o5qT0aJ2WHdHJwvLZA20bH0mwtNBjaS3CZ-o0ixS8cppdWXiigEfA1zIsyNuqrIX00-1jiYSC5-cCazlFRAYoiyyv9SnrOfXfUj7BVa57y-HmFCl69GxG1LFNUogNI2n0SLDbdvJ6oV_uBG7QFfkGCwJG0wc8emlGP8HENuUkndZZYPCTNJgUL91ryLbxtoh8lcWMW617uMmRNsZPtyW_eNlSAPLaumhe9LLTKds4XHR_F37nno3iZfCQc7wfNKmx3RD2MJ9hYKtoLKvGdHMhkTlADODi5G1qt-qSOitY3bUkmMIAq27rk9ar6YRKCkYx24cP0DUI8e8Cg4zh9Mepu80PPfL0onTt82cvHeI4NXPV8givlz5kKQ0L99Xl8rTNEqwbZ0Fd4Eo7FCXDgDZdL3HdmVr48gPp3NtwF8lUBFzgGFbHBw/SuBKr55fzDeRV3VspaAZS53cpUHYkeOc/15) Calendar -- a celebration of the lives your gift helps save and the futures your faith helps build. Inside, you'll also find a **monthly prayer guide** to keep you connected to this mission all year long.

Friend ,

Christmas is right around the corner and we hope that you and your family are preparing for a joyful and blessed Christmas holiday season. name: Team Bohannan
subject: Now is the time to weigh in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Making sure this campaign reflects your priorities, not a party agenda or special-interest talking points.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121339060/589126880/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQwZDRhMS1mMWQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qxco2ny21n2hk538nUIW2GO8tZaVG0UBks59mYp0x8M=)

Peter –

Christina isn't waiting for Election Day to start doing the work Iowans need. She believes our government can only succeed when leaders listen, not just after they win, but every step of the way.

Since launching this campaign, Christina has been out in the district talking with farmers, teachers, nurses, families, small business owners, and neighbors who are tired of being ignored by their representative in Washington. And as we move into the election year, she's making sure this campaign reflects your priorities, not a party agenda or special-interest talking points.

That starts with hearing directly from you. Before we close out the year, **[Christina wants your voice to help her shape the road ahead.
