Elaine secured millions of dollars in investment for Coastal Virginia, helped fuel economic growth and development, protected our ecosystems and waterways, defended affordable health care, fought for the health and well-being of our Armed Forces and veterans, and distinguished herself as an unapologetic defender of our Constitution.

**Not to mention, she’s running in a must-win district for Democrats.**

With so much on the line, we can’t leave this important race to chance. That’s why I’m personally asking 325 grassroots supporters to step up with a donation _today_ to put Elaine in the best possible position going into the critical end-of-year deadline.

[_**Will you step up today with a contribution split between my campaign and Elaine Luria’s?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121345110/589144415/-2010479286?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_LuriaSplit_251215_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTI4ZjM3Zi0wMWRhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CGDZqSZ5BVMzsDzTGl6yuavH31HhrxYKu4s-vmC_6c=)

clean_body: Elaine Luria won’t rest until Virginians are safe, secure, and free. | | | = Virginia means everything to me, Derek. It took me in, allowed me to call it home, and I’ve spent decades trying to give back as much as it’s given me, creating jobs, serving as Governor, and now, serving as Senator. Virginians are good, decent, patriotic people. I know they deserve leaders who reflect those qualities. I know my friend, Congresswoman Elaine Luria, is a leader of that caliber. The people of Hampton Roads and the Eastern Shore will have a true champion in Elaine Luria. We have so much left to accomplish together on Capitol Hill, but before we can get to work, she’s tasked with winning back one of the most competitive House districts in the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Elaine Luria and Mark Warner: **= = = = = = Elaine secured millions of dollars in investment for Coastal Virginia, helped fuel economic growth and development, protected our ecosystems and waterways, defended affordable health care, fought for the health and well-being of our Armed Forces and veterans, and distinguished herself as an unapologetic defender of our Constitution. Not to mention, she’s running in a must-win district for Democrats. With so much on the line, we can’t leave this important race to chance. That’s why I’m personally asking 325 grassroots supporters to step up with a donation today to put Elaine in the best possible position going into the critical end-of-year deadline. = Thank you, Mark Warner ****=**** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Peter Lumaj - Connecticut's Choice for Secretary of the State
body:
An accomplished Immigrant who appreciates what real Democracy looks like

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=a79ac974a8)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | **“A nation can survive disagreements, but it cannot survive doubt in its elections. When citizens trust the ballot, freedom endures. When they don’t, everything else begins to unravel.” - Dominic Rapini**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| [Donate to Peter](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=62b113254e&e=8763c56857)
---
| |
**My Endorsement of Peter Lumaj for Connecticut Secretary of the State**
_By Dominic Rapini - American Businessman, Political Commentator, and proud American of Italian Descent_

**I want to speak today about a man I’m proud to call a friend, and even prouder to endorse. His name is Peter Lumaj.**
Peter Lumaj’s story is not just an American story. It is the American story.
He was not born into freedom.**He fled tyranny to find it. Raised under a brutal communist regime in Albania, Peter learned early what happens when government controls speech, faith, and the ballot box.** His family practiced their religion in secret, knowing that discovery could mean prison or worse. That kind of upbringing does something to a man. It teaches him that liberty is not a slogan. It is a responsibility worth defending .
When Peter came to America, he did what generations of immigrants have done before him. He worked. He studied. He learned the language of freedom and the law. He became a lawyer, trained in political science and law on both sides of the Atlantic, and he went on to serve as a fraud investigator, fighting corruption and standing up for fairness under the law .
Today, Peter Lumaj is a family man, a successful attorney, a real estate developer, and a proud resident of Fairfield, Connecticut. But more than that, he is a man who understands something many career politicians never will: what it means to lose freedom, and what it takes to protect it.
**That is why Peter Lumaj is uniquely qualified to serve as Secretary of the State of Connecticut.**
This office is not ceremonial. It is the guardian of our elections and the steward of our statewide business processes. It demands integrity, legal judgment, and moral clarity. Peter has all three. He understands that democracy only works when elections are fair, transparent, and trusted. He understands that the rule of law must apply equally to everyone, without fear or favor.
Peter is not new to this fight. In 2014, he was the Republican nominee for Secretary of the State and ran one of the closest statewide races in recent history, winning multiple congressional districts and earning the trust of voters across Connecticut . He has spent decades supporting candidates, knocking on doors, and standing shoulder to shoulder with those who believe this state deserves better.
I’ll tell you something honestly**. I might almost regret not running for this office myself. But any regret disappears when I know a man like Peter Lumaj is stepping forward to carry this mantle.**
So today, I ask my friends, my supporters, and yes, even my detractors, to rally behind Peter Lumaj. Help him meet the financial goals he’ll need to fight this campaign. Spread the word. Shine a light into the darker corners of our state government and demand better.
Peter Lumaj is a warrior for election integrity. He is a defender of the rule of law. And he is living proof that America still rewards faith, hard work, and courage.
**I wholeheartedly endorse Peter Lumaj for Secretary of the State of Connecticut.** Let’s get Peter on the ticket. Let’s put him in the fight. And let’s remind Connecticut what freedom looks like when it’s protected by someone who knows its true value.

---
|
---
|
---

Dominic For CT 4 Mariners Way Branford, CT 06405-4481 USA

body:
Tomorrow night we’re gathering online for one of the most important Forward conversations of the year.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_email_blast_3&n=1)
---
| [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXR-11B7KZpevUULIwFXjp5Cup7NA8JtIlcAXjmsMJlkgnCYoy1CQigpgAxsimLwiz0vzI372hcI1beAm2dB-Xbq2BJuDAzqvIlPMhDGg1zcM&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_email_blast_3&n=2) Peter \-- We’re now just one day away from our December 16th virtual event at 7:00 PM ET — a deep dive into the candidates, strategy, and plan powering Forward’s path into 2026. If you haven’t registered yet, now’s the moment. Click [HERE](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXR-11B7KZpevUULIwFXjp5Cup7NA8JtIlcAXjmsMJlkgnCYoy1CQigpgAxsimLwiz0vzI372hcI1beAm2dB-Xbq2BJuDAzqvIlPMhDGg1zcM&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_email_blast_3&n=3). This will be our biggest online gathering since our 3rd Birthday Party! You’ll hear from Forward leaders, rising independent candidates, community organizers, and a couple of special guests we haven’t announced yet. We’ll reflect on how far we’ve come and lay out the roadmap for where we’re going in 2026. But before we get there, we need to close the loop on one last thing - to build the party America needs, we need the resources to meet the moment. A big thank you to everyone who contributed over the last few weeks. Because of you, we’re already nearly 30% of the way to our $30,000 goal. But to fully scale this momentum, we need to close the remaining gap! As a reminder, every dollar goes twice as far thanks to a generous $15,000 match. We know you’re bombarded by political fundraising emails this time of year. That’s exactly why we only ask when necessary — because our focus is (and always will be) solving real problems, listening to voters, and building a healthier political system. This is the last time we’ll ask this year - and it’s the most important one. **A donation today strengthens the movement we’re all building together.** Tomorrow night, we’ll talk about what comes next. Tonight, we need to make sure we’re ready for it. See you tomorrow at 7 PM.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Like mechanics examining an engine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
We’re rapidly approaching the **_most important_** deadline we’ve faced this cycle — but we’re still significantly behind where we need to be.

I’m going to explain to you why my FEC deadline on December 31st is so critical, but first, [**_can I please count on you to chip in a few dollars before midnight tonight to help us stay on track?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121345438/589145521/1734447991?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.15_FEC-Deadline_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTI1NGQ4OC0wMmRhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-D6hBeZkIWDn2efCY7YXeVk_SZe3CJYM6B6H_I3SC8=) | | [ RUSH A DONATION >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121345440/589145523/1734447991?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.15_FEC-Deadline_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTI1NGQ4OC0wMmRhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-D6hBeZkIWDn2efCY7YXeVk_SZe3CJYM6B6H_I3SC8=)
---
I know your inbox is probably overflowing with fundraising emails from Democrats across the country making the same appeal. It would be easy to scroll past this one thinking, "Someone else will handle it."

But when our FEC report goes public in January, _we don't get a do-over._

Everyone – the press, national Republicans, the dark money super PACs – will be poring over our numbers like mechanics examining an engine. They're looking for any sign that Democratic grassroots support is breaking down.

They only need to see one weak FEC report to think that Democratic candidates don’t have the resources needed to win. That's all the invitation Republicans need to launch their attacks against vulnerable candidates.

That’s why it’s crucial that Democrats like you _don’t_ ignore emails like this. We can’t afford to come up short and give national Republicans the opening they’re looking for.

[**_So please, rush $5 or whatever you can today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121345442/589145525/1734447991?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.15_FEC-Deadline_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTI1NGQ4OC0wMmRhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDVhZmUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-D6hBeZkIWDn2efCY7YXeVk_SZe3CJYM6B6H_I3SC8=)

clean_body: We’re rapidly approaching the most important deadline we’ve faced this cycle — but we’re still significantly behind where we need to be. I’m going to explain to you why my FEC deadline on December 31st is so critical, but first, = | | = I know your inbox is probably overflowing with fundraising emails from Democrats across the country making the same appeal. It would be easy to scroll past this one thinking, "Someone else will handle it." But when our FEC report goes public in January, we don't get a do-over. Everyone – the press, national Republicans, the dark money super PACs – will be poring over our numbers like mechanics examining an engine. They're looking for any sign that Democratic grassroots support is breaking down. They only need to see one weak FEC report to think that Democratic candidates don’t have the resources needed to win. That's all the invitation Republicans need to launch their attacks against vulnerable candidates. That’s why it’s crucial that Democrats like you don’t ignore emails like this. We can’t afford to come up short and give national Republicans the opening they’re looking for. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = With every good wish, – Maggie Hassan = If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. ## Commonsense Corner:
---
We are sending $40 million to the Taliban every single week.

If you’ve been here a while, you know Tim is relentlessly fighting to stop this insanity. But last week, Senate Democrats [blocked](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/2cSpg1riB8aOM9fgC9rfWJ_BXDQn5mxT6imO-ICfyS6_zo3SfitqbwKrQIEDIiNT8NVtIP9_6eocdo0r9Ipe6X-k_-085Il02cc-ss9LGXETmHTlW33SasR6FCy9pgcdVE06fnL_hKrb5tn-VxxAIYexRD_dgeE3vZxuVp1nE73QE_Dstx4gVDwAcoPDAvJpC3GOvZd88wQkg9h5ijfFkyhb3SRl3EEVBKrtkqKxzumwdST2h_rjxaNG0ewRz6gQ6CxSLmZ2t-WDE8LMKzMJegde669CIeuNMWI3Ik2K9N0Tk3FKJWr3nB4AmPHNTOaJ5sqfey-Mr2efQMvZ9vWYE8-zjvk_A9AIi9UmWHClUYdGbrqQ-sj4YsB1qiafZVC-hDXnaVmcJF9UN-uPP0PxQdEHEbl1g566iVZQ-ORrr766CbpYYYrIACU5Tebw24w/e0wPNRTws-rgcR8eTdKnxiiGAi-qGMGY/15) his bill.

Why? Great question. Chances are, this is just like stock trading nonsense. Some members of Congress are probably getting kickbacks from the non-governmental organizations who cut checks for terrorists—and the vicious cycle that enables them to get rich continues.

**As Tim put it: We’re $38 trillion in debt, and Congress doesn’t have the guts to stop sending money to people who will hate us for free? This is rotten-to-the-core corruption.** It’s time to call our senators and ask: Where in the world does your loyalty lie? Because it sure doesn’t look like it’s here on American soil.

## **Just For Kicks**

clean_body: Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | Commonsense Corner: We are sending $40 million to the Taliban every single week. If you’ve been here a while, you know Tim is relentlessly fighting to stop this insanity. But last week, Senate Democrats his bill. Why? Great question. Chances are, this is just like stock trading nonsense. Some members of Congress are probably getting kickbacks from the non-governmental organizations who cut checks for terrorists—and the vicious cycle that enables them to get rich continues. As Tim put it: We’re $38 trillion in debt, and Congress doesn’t have the guts to stop sending money to people who will hate us for free? This is rotten-to-the-core corruption. It’s time to call our senators and ask: Where in the world does your loyalty lie? Because it sure doesn’t look like it’s here on American soil. | Boots on the Ground Poll: Do you think members of Congress are quietly profiting off of the NGOs that fund the Taliban? Last Week’s Poll Results | This Week in Tim’s Feed | Just For Kicks Tim had the honor of attending President Trump’s Christmas party at the White House over the weekend—and he’s had this song on repeat ever since. Get yourself in the holiday spirit with this beautiful rendition of “Silent Night,” brought to you by the . | Sport Your Support: | | | | | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

subject: It’s done. I’m sworn in. We won.

We won. I was just sworn in.
My fellow Americans - this is Matt Van Epps coming to you for the first time as a CONGRESSMAN!
I wanted to personally reach out to say thank you.
Thank you to the President whose endorsement gave me the major boost I needed to win.
Thank you to Conservative leaders who campaigned alongside me while my opponent recruited Kamala Harris, Al Gore, and AOC.
And thank you to the MAGA movement - including good folks like you - who make victories like this possible.
You really are the lifeblood of everything we do and everything we've accomplished together.
Now that I'm officially sworn in, the stakes are too high to take a victory lap. We weathered over TWO MILLION DOLLARS in a few weeks to bury us once and for all. Luckily, our message and our movement overcame them.
Unfortunately, that's exactly what we're seeing in 35 other competitive districts. The Democrat Machine is hammering them RELENTLESSLY so they can win back the House and impeach your President.
That's why I'm teaming up with my new colleague - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to raise a million bucks before the end of the year so we can SAVE all 35 seats and block the Democrats from taking back full control.
As your newest MAGA fighter in Congress, I humbly ask you to kick in a few bucks here: [ PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE 100 BUCKS

clean_body: It's done. We won. I was just sworn in. My fellow Americans - this is Matt Van Epps coming to you for the first time as a CONGRESSMAN! I wanted to personally reach out to say thank you. Thank you to the President whose endorsement gave me the major boost I needed to win. Thank you to Conservative leaders who campaigned alongside me while my opponent recruited Kamala Harris, Al Gore, and AOC. And thank you to the MAGA movement - including good folks like you - who make victories like this possible. You really are the lifeblood of everything we do and everything we've accomplished together. Now that I'm officially sworn in, the stakes are too high to take a victory lap. We weathered over TWO MILLION DOLLARS in a few weeks to bury us once and for all. Luckily, our message and our movement overcame them. Unfortunately, that's exactly what we're seeing in 35 other competitive districts. The Democrat Machine is hammering them RELENTLESSLY so they can win back the House and impeach your President. That's why I'm teaming up with my new colleague - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to raise a million bucks before the end of the year so we can SAVE all 35 seats and block the Democrats from taking back full control. As your newest MAGA fighter in Congress, I humbly ask you to kick in a few bucks here: Let's be perfectly clear about this: The Democrat Machine spent a FORTUNE to defeat me - if I failed to raise the funds necessary to fight back, this seat would have flipped to the Democrats. They ran vicious and dishonest attack ads against me during every football game, every news segment, and across social media too. It was EXPENSIVE keeping up to get the truth out. Luckily, folks like you came through for me. The only way we hold the line and expand our Conservative Majority is with the help of our grassroots team. YOU made the difference in my Special Election - and YOU can make the difference to save our MAGA candidates in all of these 35 races. Will you rise to the occasion and save us? Your contribution will make a huge difference today. Thanks for all you do, Matt Van Epps Conservative Congressman, TN-07 * We have spent weeks vetting and verifying the most committed MAGA Patriots from every corner of America. The MAGA Roster is nearly full, don't miss your chance to have your name on it! In just 30 minutes, this portal will be locked and shared with President Trump's team. This roster is reserved for the fiercest defenders of the MAGA movement. body:
We're inviting some friends

|
###
### Join us Tonight, Monday December 15 at 8pm for a special Year End call. This will be a combined call with some of our neighboring states including Maryland and New Jersey to share the progress everyone is making.
## [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQURXQj7vXiSR9wiwr1VtBvhx5qQ6FWllk4LAtP7BaOzA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_december_call_remind&n=1)
What could be more appropriate for the holidays than get together with some friends from other states you don't see often enough? Please join in to catch up, share, and have a great time.
* * *
## Branching Out
There are 67 counties in PA. We're launching a new effort to have dedicated Volunteer Leads in each. This role can be what you make of it. Would you like to contact Forwardists in your area? Talk to new sign ups they come in? Talk to people in your area about running for office with Forward? Host occasional meetups or virtual calls? This could be the role for you. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u6u_UJMP7K7vsJ76YDOs-kzjQtrU51zJMjkgoh57kjDT&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_december_call_remind&n=2) \-- [Or fill out the interest form here](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=WArSXe-hufzYEjhaXmZeHWj-u36sV3JmN27GzLTXQHZHeuJj0oLTJJlgkM-zRTM7xtQ8XLMYLtz21rgH1NulnK5F2YX3x-JTwNydaoTIea67zeb33ZKiB34j3OpjRYgH4txVFDci3QILjdK6UbN-0g&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_december_call_remind&n=3) \--

name: Powered by People
subject: Mandela Barnes is running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240540%2E444211%2EzTDs-3)
Mandela Barnes is running to be the next governor of Wisconsin, and he’s running for all of us—not just the wealthy and well-connected.
Trump’s policies are hurting our fellow Americans—from rising costs to attacks on health care, small businesses, farmers, working families, and our communities. Mandela Barnes is fighting to reverse that damage, expand opportunity, and give people a fair shot at a better life.
**But winning change isn’t just about one candidate, it’s about building people-powered movements.**
That’s where Mandela’s work with his organization the Long Run PAC and Powered by People share a mission: we recruit candidates up and down the ballot, mobilize voters, get people registered, and fight for victories that change lives. Because real change comes from real people doing the work necessary to win.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251215-2-split.V4SOoQ&refcode=ema20251215-240540&t=3&akid=240540%2E444211%2EzTDs-3)
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251215-2-split.V4SOoQ&refcode=ema20251215-240540&t=4&akid=240540%2E444211%2EzTDs-3)
A few months ago, Mandela and Beto hosted a town hall together in Milwaukee, connecting directly with voters, taking questions about the path forward, and talking with Wisconsinites about the importance of participating in our democracy. That effort—lifting up communities, mobilizing voters, and empowering people to lead—mirrors exactly what we do at Powered by People every day.
[**So, will you split a $3 donation between Powered by People and Mandela Barnes’ campaign? Your support keeps this on-the-ground work going strong and will help push Mandela’s campaign to victory.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251215-2-split.V4SOoQ&refcode=ema20251215-240540&t=5&akid=240540%2E444211%2EzTDs-3)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251215-2-split.V4SOoQ&refcode=ema20251215-240540&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=240540%2E444211%2EzTDs-3)**
Together, we can back the leaders who fight for all of us, not just the powerful. Mandela Barnes is leading the way in Wisconsin, and we’re proud to fight alongside him.
Thank you,
Powered by People

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20251215-240540-footer&t=25&refcode2=240540_444211_zTDs-3&akid=240540%2E444211%2EzTDs-3)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

I know our team has been sending more emails than usual. That’s because we are rapidly approaching our first official filing deadline since we were outraised by our Republican opponent — and we need your help to hit our goals.
**After all, this race for governor is going to be CLOSE — and very expensive. Every dollar will help us get our winning message all across Michigan.**
Michigan is a battleground state, and candidates win or lose elections by the thinnest of margins. They are also among the most expensive. We’ve already seen dark money donors pour money into my opponents’ campaigns.
_I haven't accepted a cent of corporate PAC money — and I’m proud of it._ My opponents can't say the same. But that means I am counting on you to win this race.

— Jocelyn

name: Nellie Pou
subject: I need to share something with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress
body:
This is personal
Hi friend,
I want to speak to you directly because this moment matters. **Over the past few years, this district saw some of the biggest political swings in the country.** That means nothing here is guaranteed. We have to meet voters where they are, earn their trust, and fight for every single vote.
This is one of the hardest fundraising periods of the year. People are focused on the holidays, not politics. But our opponents and their special interest backers aren’t slowing down for even a second.
If we want to take back the House majority and protect New Jersey families, we have to meet this moment. If you are able, I would be deeply grateful for your support today. Please chip in $20 today to help us keep this campaign strong.

name: Tobias Read
subject: Add your name: Your voter data belongs to you — not President Trump
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251215em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251215em]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State Tobias Read.
I want you to know what’s happening — and why I need you to speak up. Last month, I joined nine other Secretaries of State from across the country to demand transparency from Attorney General Pam Bondi and Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem about how American voter data is being shared and stored.
We gave them a clear deadline to respond. They missed it.
So today, I’m asking you to join me in demanding transparency, accountability, and answers from President Donald Trump and his lawless administration. Can I count on you to add your name straight away? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Zxp2INlRCkGiRWxomyZ9uA2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/Zxp2INlRCkGiRWxomyZ9uA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Zxp2INlRCkGiRWxomyZ9uA2]
Their silence matters because earlier this year, the Department of Justice asked my office for deeply personal voter information, including dates of birth, partial Social Security numbers, and full driver’s license numbers.
Without legal authority and without transparency, I refused.
Then we learned that some states’ voter data had been shared with Homeland Security and entered into the SAVE program — a system already known to wrongly flag U.S. citizens as non-citizens.
That puts real people at real risk.
Trust in our elections depends on transparency and accountability at every level of government. When federal officials refuse to answer basic questions about how voter data is being used, that trust is undermined.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me in condemning the silence of Pam Bondi and Kristi Noem and demanding immediate answers. Your voter data belongs to you — not to a federal agency operating behind closed doors. Add your name today and help us send a clear message: when it comes to our elections and our rights, silence is not acceptable. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Zxp2INlRCkGiRWxomyZ9uA2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Zxp2INlRCkGiRWxomyZ9uA2]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251215em]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=LoaOFJDL5SZfKGac%2FhFAxsa9Q%2B0RZbDukuP946DCZuez%2FlV6LlnrUCEEe95wZqbvMz7876ph0x0BMMh%2FwL7YiPFDrwDADUMgA1ORJfzXDQiHMNtLN0HWk9nwdcJdesR9nE7iv2D7ywKXHVbFzkcGLGSNtM2dQTlAcwnHob1%2Fu%2B6z7jr%2B1CpgdkNj0mEmSwoE8nvJC6ifPMmz5Jyw2nbFINSCvkb8Y10zn%2BdMc79e8%2Bhm7UDVuCTJgy4%2FOkeHB%2Bt3sU6F1k9fOFtZb7pBpQwpbOdV7vUy9PlCO2%2FJVWYtpdcDuNz0cFld5rVUiirS6iU7nLupY8M5jUijNP7vrXTaao8EnjulqBO7o3JF0La53uQWnfcBcezzUUOcZAfciAYGc8VhLIxauAmgAVNH4DTTeUCf48IrIpQ4wg9N4fsDlV5plpiNl4Xb4urvkuLa%2FvYp .

| Hi Derek, The folks over at the Democratic Party of Wisconsin reached out to my team with some urgent news: **there’s still a long way to go to hit their December end-of-year fundraising goal.** Now, don’t get me wrong: Our state Democratic Party is the strongest grassroots operation in the country. I’ve seen firsthand how they organize people from all walks of life to build election-winning momentum that no amount of cash from billionaire donors can replicate. The WisDems team works year-round to connect with voters, uplift the work of Democrats like myself, and build a top-notch campaign operation. And they’re good at it. **But we’re going into uncharted terrain, Derek.** Wisconsin is up for grabs in 2026, and Republicans will take every opportunity to put a stop to our progress. They’re already preparing to do whatever it takes to maintain their majority in Congress and elect one of their pawns for Donald Trump to our Governor’s office. That is why I have started the battleground fund with WisDems. We want to ensure that whomever our nominee is has the support they need to win on day one of the General Election. clean_body: | | | | Hi Derek, The folks over at the Democratic Party of Wisconsin reached out to my team with some urgent news: there’s still a long way to go to hit their December end-of-year fundraising goal. Now, don’t get me wrong: Our state Democratic Party is the strongest grassroots operation in the country. I’ve seen firsthand how they organize people from all walks of life to build election-winning momentum that no amount of cash from billionaire donors can replicate. The WisDems team works year-round to connect with voters, uplift the work of Democrats like myself, and build a top-notch campaign operation. And they’re good at it. But we’re going into uncharted terrain, Derek. Wisconsin is up for grabs in 2026, and Republicans will take every opportunity to put a stop to our progress. They’re already preparing to do whatever it takes to maintain their majority in Congress and elect one of their pawns for Donald Trump to our Governor’s office. That is why I have started the battleground fund with WisDems. We want to ensure that whomever our nominee is has the support they need to win on day one of the General Election. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Battleground Wisconsin will process immediately: | | | | | | Thanks for being part of this work, Derek. Tony * | | | | ---|---|---|--- | AS GOES WISCONSIN, SO GOES THE NATION Our party is committed to advancing progressive values and ensuring Democratic victories up and down the ballot. subject: Solutions, not headlines

body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=P4SJyadhSB9kTfzV6wfFUHQ%2FFD9zhOl684hhCkyj%2BXkUB8nN3Pnho5SLnyfLTzlLWpS%2FXUd5gWheBoYl9h2r5jwOxhLFX9ZBJ4GdH%2FQ32vhAuthoqgy60%2F2tgEGRCOeGFHpN4tm%2FVEDQL7jFzKhaWZVO41YX3jyiAz%2FFHsUsXQIR%2BEZ2izG3350BwM4aqg%2FYcM7ltmghqB7jzS5J7CkBT84bxpn1ACNGCnEm3keul9SblBP1sqCTLEm8js7oOvOfaNaajsZzfUEqykW4B9ggfWOKYVNBGIniLufyTmWipqboLfPSFThPWB77EUj0bom56QFTQouV17D3E45HFDL7Zu0t0TWwP8eFi8lN9qIHghElS03Ter6PoitgLYDObfGXlDKD8H1xbSupSnd4VatwBrPH1qTVWeuLOkdxO6SLBaq8DO0uzeM66IyHOgYrb0Gd]

# [#]
Peter,Over the past few weeks, I’ve been talking to constituents, small business owners, and local leaders — and it’s clear that people want solutions, not headlines

They want leadership that shows up, gets things done, and fights for our community, not special interests and the ultra-wealthy — and that’s exactly what I’m focused on every day in Congress.

At the end of December, our fundraising numbers will go public, and right now, we’re behind our $5,000 mid-month goal.

This isn’t just about dollars — it’s about showing that we have a strong, organized campaign ready to stand up for our communities that won’t be slowed down by extremist rhetoric or political games.

So, if you can, will you please chip in $ or any amount before midnight?

Here's a link you can use: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-dec25?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-dec25?amount=]

Thank you for your time,

George

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23]
For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | A Massive Value Flow Finally Opens to Retail RWAs have been the breakout story of the year, the place where on-chain meets the real economy. Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9c392082228448c8bbaf0ef233e3da6e&_e=0fWF6iDhEee1U35PLCrDjxYIi2sJpLmfAfPh8D3RZiweaYHQ9v8z6oSmoeSss_j8lW_sNT0fW6ce3USRU1Zf_Dkj3SfxiCxwMrdNIKn83x0HeOxJEpzjNqpWtRVCLNie9GKbk83tf1ySxD1IJEX2O_-ZJgn1XiDKFpy0bklf4HsDs6_CTXc2e841IM5zTWmSOTSqrgAJYn0FAwSwnJ-WFiiiDk49NxIfFXcT6QNm4ZFUz5usj4oIKJ2P_BYlc_GzPueX86viQVz6oRrCSakH266CEoEAcysjBiZu41pwhaQjjUv8oDEiKQAKg2FNxIgiXQA7f-23R2-MH8XzVQ3St2ECvcMV2geNlUZSD5k74jOjOh19OcA_dG-xJD8wHX37acpUTwyqOOJBJq4QgmD4RB_wMXvoeq3vkhSSgfWHEeRzm4mRwj2RgHdqojK5wTH-5QGVxl9-0UXT9M_4P_UqMslsdfeWgtpDrt8lMVUwdAohpA-yZZg0zvF-cKQgCmRkE8FuAsOks_2jiRbEg5crT8huKPGXc1ZvulRli9B7_WGF8vj6bEjJhfVpmd0k81_M)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: At a time like this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| The last few days have brought unimaginable sorrow to so many across the world.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9298%2E5257348%2E36MnMQ)
Sometimes, it’s hard to know where to begin after a weekend like this.
The last few days have brought unimaginable sorrow to so many across the world. The acts of violence we witnessed in Rhode Island, in Sydney, and in California have left our communities reeling.
At Brown University, two students were killed, and nine others were injured in yet another unconscionable act of gun violence in the United States. For some, this was the second school shooting they’ve experienced.
In Sydney, Australia, at a time when Jewish communities around the world remember our long tradition of resilience in the face of oppressors and antisemitism, a pair of gunmen shot and killed at least 15 people during a Hanukkah celebration.
And here in California, we awoke this morning to the shocking news of the deaths of Rob and Michele Reiner, whose lasting impacts on all of California and the country will not be forgotten.
In the face of such heartbreak, as we mourn these senseless acts of violence, we are called to come together, to support one another, and to take action to forge a better world for all of us.
In this holiday season, amidst senseless violence like this, it can often be hard to find things that make us hopeful.
I’ll remember Rob and Michele’s work for children in California. I’ll think about the hero who helped save lives in Sydney. And I’ll take heart in a community in Providence coming together to mourn and support.
Hope can be hard to find, but it is what I take solace in, in moments like this.
We must also take bold action to make sure students feel safe and secure at their places of learning. Action to make sure Jewish people across the world can honor our faith with dignity and pride, without fear of violent retaliation. And action in which tragedies such as those that occurred this weekend galvanize us to choose unity over division at every turn.
As we grapple with these tragedies, let us be strong and strengthen one another.
Take care,
Adam
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=9298%2E5257348%2E36MnMQ) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=9298%2E5257348%2E36MnMQ)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
---

Text **JOIN** to **724433**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=9298%2E5257348%2E36MnMQ)

On the first day of Hanukkah, which is known as the festival of lights, the lights of 15 Jews who came to celebrate, were extinguished. **This included a holocaust survivor who died protecting his wife. 40 others were hospitalized.**
[ Pledge your support](https://substack..kHxANdqg4OiF8DkCOOw4exSkSYoxQF08Wq0hUs-Qisg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=181734655)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=181734655&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxNzM0NjU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU4Mzg3MTMsImV4cCI6MTc2ODQzMDcxMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gZEXNMXszG0FxLDMQhWHxfg_dEBSjCy_u0D83amfy7c)
Hanukkah is usually a festive holiday and these victims were murdered by a father and son terrorist team. These two individuals either believed that they could kill Australian Jews celebrating Hanukkah and get away unpunished, or they believed that they were martyrs carrying out a holy mission of terrorist murder.
This does not happen in a vacuum.**This was the direct consequence** **of the Australian government and its support for a Palestinian state as a reward for its Islamo-Fascist massacre of innocent Israeli civilians on October 7th.**
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu issued a message to Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese in the aftermath of the attack on Bondi Beach: "Your government did nothing to stop the spread of antisemitism in Australia. You did nothing to curb the cancer cells that were growing inside your country." Netanyahu also reminded Albanese that he had warned him months ago (on August 17, 2025) that Australia's policies would embolden the radical islamists to take that political weakness as an opportunity to strike.
**There are other countries following the same playbook including France, the UK and Canada. All of these countries are not taking on the antisemitic radical Muslim actors.**
Terrorists and bullies attack when they perceive weakness. This is what is happening in many countries. There are two solutions. The first being an aggressive crackdown on terrorism. This is the preferred solution. Jews are only their first target and these governments need to wake up.
_**The second solution, is for Jews to realize what Israel learned from its inception, self defense is the necessary response to terrorism. Jewish leaders need to encourage Jews to own and learn how to use firearms in self-defense. When the jihadists attack they need to be counter attacked by armed Jews defending themselves.**_
Globalize the intifada is not just a slogan but instead a call to action for Jihadist Muslims throughout the world to first kill Jews and then Christians.
_New York City even elected a mayor who believes in globalizing the intifada. If that is what is instore for the Jews of NYC, then they better wake up and be prepared to defend themselves._
Under Mamdani criminals will not be arrested.
We are entering a very dangerous period in Western Civilization where terrorist Jihadists are present in every European and Western Hemisphere country. It will take strong leaders to stop this.
Netanyahu in his press release further stated to Albanese:
"But it requires the action of your government, which you are not taking. And you have to because history will not forgive hesitation and weakness. It will honour action and strength.
"That's what Israel expects of each of your governments in the West and elsewhere. Because the disease spreads and it will consume you as well."
_**On a good note I attended the Chanukah Menorah lighting ceremony in Greenwich Connecticut. I was not afraid and was determined despite the cold weather to send the message that Jews stand in solidarity with their murdered and wounded brethren in Australia.**_
We are not afraid and we will defeat the terrorist.
There was a strong police presence. Despite the cold weather there was a good turnout. The Chabad Rabbi and a former October 7th hostage were the ones who lit the Menorah last night.
I urge all of you to stand up with your Jewish brothers to defeat hate in America.
Happy Holidays

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Our goal and a new poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
If we’re going to win, Katie needs a surge of grassroots support right now.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40572%2E3422442%2EXGCPuz)
Peter,
We set a mid-month goal of raising $10,000 because this race is getting extremely competitive, and we need the resources to stay on track. _**Especially when a recent poll shows us neck-and-neck with two MAGA Republicans.**_
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251215_1_ak.MMYL0F&refcode=em20251215-40572&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40572%2E3422442%2EXGCPuz)
Katie urgently needs support to make sure these extreme candidates don’t become California’s next governor. **[Chip in $5 today to help our campaign stop them.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251215_1_ak.MMYL0F&refcode=em20251215-40572&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40572%2E3422442%2EXGCPuz)**
This poll reflects the reality of this race. Katie has incredible grassroots support, but where we’re at isn’t enough to overcome the super PACs, billionaire self-funding, and corporate spending backing our opponents.
**If we’re going to win, Katie needs a surge of grassroots support _right now._**
$10,000 might seem like a lot to raise so quickly, but this team has always come through for Katie before. That’s how she went to Washington to hold Trump officials and corporate stooges like Jamie Dimon accountable—and it’s how she’ll do the same as California’s governor.
**[Peter, wwe’re counting on you to help us reach our $10,000 goal by midnight tonight. Can you help us win this race by chipping in $5 right now?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251215_1_ak.MMYL0F&refcode=em20251215-40572&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=40572%2E3422442%2EXGCPuz)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251215_1_ak.MMYL0F&refcode=em20251215-40572&t=24&akid=40572%2E3422442%2EXGCPuz)
Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251215-40572&amounts=&t=25&refcode2=40572_3422442_XGCPuz&akid=40572%2E3422442%2EXGCPuz)**
---

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Wes Moore
subject: Ambitious
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1068%2E1086043%2ENVpXRL)
**When our legislative session begins in exactly one month, I’ll be legally barred from fundraising for months._But our Republican opponents don’t have that restriction._**
They’ll be out there raising money like it’s their full-time job, lining up dark-money groups and preparing to pour millions into Maryland to try to flip this seat.
**[We need to build up our resources while we can. Will you chip in any amount — even just $5 — today?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251215-2.BM3FOC&refcode=em-20251215-2&t=2&akid=1068%2E1086043%2ENVpXRL)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251215-2.BM3FOC&amount=5&refcode=em-20251215-2&t=21&akid=1068%2E1086043%2ENVpXRL)**
Remember: 2026 is an election year in Maryland. I’ll be on the ballot — along with the entire Maryland Senate and Maryland House. Banner campaign years like next year are never cheap, but our race is going to be especially tough.
We are one of Republicans’ top targets in 2026 because this seat has flipped parties between every governor for the last twenty years. I flipped it from a Republican — _and now Donald Trump’s allies want to flip it right back._
Republicans are cashing in every favor they can to win in Maryland. They’re calling up old candidates, running focus groups, doing opposition research, and preparing to funnel millions into whoever they think has the best shot at flipping this seat back to red.
All of our progress is on the line in Maryland in 2026. And whether we have the resources to fight back depends on what we achieve before the deadline in just one month.
**[We can’t afford to play catch up while the Republicans are giving this race their all. Can I count on you to chip in $5 or anything you can today?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251215-2.BM3FOC&refcode=em-20251215-2&t=22&akid=1068%2E1086043%2ENVpXRL)**
Thank you, Peter.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251215-2.BM3FOC&refcode=em-20251215-2&t=23&akid=1068%2E1086043%2ENVpXRL)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251215-2&t=24&refcode2=1068_1086043_NVpXRL&akid=1068%2E1086043%2ENVpXRL)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=1068%2E1086043%2ENVpXRL)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1068%2E1086043%2ENVpXRL)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

We are one of Republicans’ top targets in 2026 because this seat has flipped parties between every governor for the last twenty years. I flipped it from a Republican — and now Donald Trump’s allies want to flip it right back. Republicans are cashing in every favor they can to win in Maryland. They’re calling up old candidates, running focus groups, doing opposition research, and preparing to funnel millions into whoever they think has the best shot at flipping this seat back to red. All of our progress is on the line in Maryland in 2026. And whether we have the resources to fight back depends on what we achieve before the deadline in just one month. Thank you, Peter. Elevate, Wes

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/loyalty-crisis-immigrants-undermining?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)

When the city of Chicago was actively and often violently resisting Operation Midway Blitz, the Trump administration attempted to deploy the National Guard to help protect federal agents and the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement building in nearby Broadview.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ac7799ac-3f28-4136-b9d8-46d8790740cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7-_Ia5525nic4Tc8EO9-R3vSTe5vrZVPfb_Spw7nLyg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=181709748)
The facility in Broadview was heavily targeted by anti-ICE protesters and rioters late into fall, which was helped by the warmer-than-usual weather. Crowds attacked federal agents trying to access the facility or threatened violence against agents. It was clear the Broadview Police Department was too small and too afraid to get involved with crowd control when things got heavy.
One thing was certain: the National Guard was a needed force to help protect the life and property of the federal government, bringing us to the topic of this column.
_**Piece continued below ...**_
* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/d7a40219-52cf-497e-997c-714acc8da50f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **" Too old to live"? Terrifying medical AI hits American doctor's offices**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d7a40219-52cf-497e-997c-714acc8da50f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **What happens when an AI computer thinks you 're "too old to save"?**
That's the terrifying reality happening in exam rooms across America...
**As machines (not doctors) are deciding who gets care ... and who doesn't.**
A new jaw-dropping video takes you behind the scenes and exposes EVERYTHING.
**[SENIORS: Here's the one thing you must know to protect yourself from medical AI.](https://substack.com/redirect/d7a40219-52cf-497e-997c-714acc8da50f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d7a40219-52cf-497e-997c-714acc8da50f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. **AI makes mistakes 45% of the time.** _And most of the time your doctor is NOT required to tell you he 's using AI._ Before your next exam, **[you must see this doctor's shocking warning.](https://substack.com/redirect/d7a40219-52cf-497e-997c-714acc8da50f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
_**Piece continued ...**_
A member of the Illinois National Guard made the decision to not only openly declare she would not deploy to Chicago if activated, but gave an interview to CNN and CBS News back in October **[to explain why.](https://substack.com/redirect/7ee20eb0-2140-40fa-8bb6-9688984a2efb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Staff Sergeant Demi Palecek said one of the reasons she was not comfortable with the prospect of being sent to Chicago was because, **["I am Mexican."](https://substack.com/redirect/a9e0c22e-f140-4060-8913-957c93123fea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0bd112f8-cf11-4a44-863f-154031647569?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"It's disheartening to be forced to go against your community members and your neighbors," she continued. "It feels illegal. This is not what we signed up to do."
It should be noted Palecek was a Democratic state legislative candidate from Illinois's 13th District, so that partially explains her asinine decision to go public with this statement.
What struck me the most about her comments was saying that she was "Mexican." Her biography on her campaign website does not say she was born in Mexico, but even if she was, all of that goes out the window when she became a U.S. citizen, and especially when you take the oath of enlistment.
I should know because I took the same oath when I went into the Marine Corps Reserves.
Palecek's "I am Mexican" comment undermines the Left's argument that mass migration from anywhere does not have problems when it comes to loyalty for the United States. Beyond Chicago, we see such problems with the recent Somalis in Minneapolis, and the Los Angeles during the height of the anti-ICE riots this past summer, with all the Mexican and Latin Americans flags being waved.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7-_Ia5525nic4Tc8EO9-R3vSTe5vrZVPfb_Spw7nLyg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=181709748)
The funny reality is actual Mexicans from Mexico would not consider Palecek to be "Mexican" because she does not live in Mexico. It is a cultural phenomenon that I am familiar with because I see it all the time on social media when Latinos in the United States proudly declare their identity as Mexican. Comments are rife with people calling them "no sabo" kids and "gringos" because they were born and raised in the United States. It doesn't matter if they speak Spanish because it's not Mexican Spanish. This doesn't apply to everyone in Latin America, but it is certainly a trend that can't be ignored if you're in the know.
Palecek also ignores why such a deployment was necessary during the height of the riots and protests. Her unit would not be needed if locals in the Chicago area did not react violently to federal immigration officials carrying out operations.
Thanks to winter, things have cooled down, but it can be sure the situation in Chicago and other cities will heat up once again come springtime.
Which is why Palecek's comment is such a slap to the face for Latinos who are proud to be from the United States, such as myself. Yes, you can appreciate culture from Latin America, but if you serve the U.S. in uniform, your loyalty is to the U.S.
* * *
| A guest post by| [Julio Rosas](https://substack.com/@julioarosas?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)Field Reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media. [
---
Friend: The auto factories of Detroit built more than cars, they built futures for families like mine. My mother worked in the auto industry for years. Like so many Detroiters, she played her part to help put the world on wheels. Her work wasn’t just a job. It was dignity, stability, and a chance to give her only child more than she had growing up. But today that promise – that hard work leads to a better life – is being ripped away by people who’ve never had to punch a clock. **Donald Trump is one of them.** He’s made it clear he doesn’t care if his policies drive up the cost of cars or groceries. And if helping billionaires means hurting working families, that’s a trade he’s willing to make every time. That’s not leadership. _That’s betrayal._ **I’m running for Governor because people like my mother deserve better. Because the folks who keep our economy running shouldn’t have to beg Donald Trump to be seen. Because we need a government that puts our workers first, not last.** **[I’m sick and tired of watching Trump, Musk, and their billionaire buddies fail working families. So I’m running to defend Michigan from their extremist agenda and fight for change. But it’s going to take the biggest grassroots movement Michigan has ever had to defend this “toss-up” seat, and I need you to be part of it Friend. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Ilhan Omar's to help us build a winning movement?**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25-gilchrist.c5Oi8e&refcode=em251215-1-90&t=3&akid=2001%2E791427%2EuVSWuI) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your split contribution to Ilhan Omar and Garlin Gilchrist will go through immediately:_ | | **[Donate $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-dec25-gilchrist.MLDC6C&refcode=em251215-1-90&t=22&akid=2001%2E791427%2EuVSWuI)**

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I can’t do this alone, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Normally when I write to you via email, I like them to be different from the other messages you get from most elected officials.
| | |
---
Friend —
Normally when you see my name in your inbox, I like the messages to be different from the other emails you get from most elected officials.
I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, along with other things I am seeing or working on in Washington, D.C. and at home in Georgia.
This message is different. It's more direct.
I am reaching out today with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close. Here's why:
This race will be one of the most competitive and expensive in the nation. I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024 and that makes me MAGA’s #1 target.
In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.
Now we must win again. And we will win again.

Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:

| | | Friend, **SOCIALISM IS ON THE MARCH, AND MICHIGAN IS IN ITS CROSSHAIRS.** Ilhan Omar, a leading voice in the radical Far-Left “Squad,” just endorsed one of my Democrat opponents. That’s not just a political favor. It’s a declaration of war on our values, our way of life, and the future of Michigan. I’ve fought for this country before: **_FIRST:_** As a combat Apache pilot in Operation Iraqi Freedom. _**THEN:**_ As a conservative Trump ally in Congress. _**NOW:**_ I’m fighting to STOP the socialist takeover of Michigan. The Left is FIRED UP. NYC has already fallen, and California too. Now they’re trying to turn Michigan into the next socialist stronghold, and I’m the last line of defense. _But I’m in a DEAD HEAT. Some polls have me leading by just 1 POINT AHEAD._ And now we’re hearing whispers that Far-Left billionaires from New York and California are preparing to flood my opponent with MILLIONS. _**We must act NOW.**_ If grassroots conservatives don’t rise TODAY, we risk handing Michigan over to Ilhan Omar and her woke, anti-American allies. name: Chris Pappas for Senate
subject: It’s an important day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Our mid-month deadline is today, will you lend a hand?
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=4039%2E582294%2ElprYtn)
Today is the day.
Today is our mid-month deadline. **[Rush a donation of any amount today so we can send Chris Pappas to the Senate.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251215_2_deadline.4Z-gVS&refcode=em20251215-2&t=2&akid=4039%2E582294%2ElprYtn)**
Here’s the deal: **Far-right billionaires and special interests are pouring cash into this race to flip this seat red. And now that John Sununu, the Republicans’ hand-picked candidate, is in the race, we can expect even more.**
They’re going to do everything they can to flip New Hampshire red, so our job is only going to get harder.
If we want to keep New Hampshire blue, we need all the grassroots support we can get.
**[Tonight is our mid-month deadline, and we’re still behind where we need to be. Please pitch in $5 or whatever makes sense to you today so we can hit our goal and defend the Granite State.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251215_2_deadline.4Z-gVS&refcode=em20251215-2&t=3&akid=4039%2E582294%2ElprYtn)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251215_2_deadline.4Z-gVS&amount=5&refcode=em20251215-2&t=22&akid=4039%2E582294%2ElprYtn)**
Thank you,

subject: 🪖 To ALL VoteVets supporters: We humbly ask for your support 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Peter — Please, don’t skip this 1 minute read.
#
Peter - please, don’t skip this 1 minute read.
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Peter.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there. It has helped us continue to be one of the most impactful and effective organizations in politics, even with all that Trump throws our way.
Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn’t even be competitive.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It has stopped more efforts to privatize the VA than we can count. It won things like the PACT Act, ensuring Veterans suffering from toxic exposures could get the treatment they need and deserve.
And just last month, it helped elect both Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill. Thank you.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $21. Some give more, many give less. But with Trump coming for everything we hold dear, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and fighting back against these liars and hypocrites, and defending our Constitution at a moment when it is in extreme peril.
[**If helping VoteVets lead this fight from the front seems worth an $5 donation to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation before midnight. We really need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec25.3jrL2s&refcode=em251215-1-9&t=1&akid=34822%2E3013755%2Ema8qT9)
