name: Haley Stevens
subject: Asking one more time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Coming up short isn't an option

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1644%2E49239%2EVFNV3P)
| Null, I promise I wouldn't follow up like this if it wasn't important.
---
Our crucial mid-month fundraising deadline is coming up at midnight, but we're still short of our $175,000 goal. Each and every dollar matters in this battleground Senate race, which experts say could decide Senate control. **With so much at stake, falling short tonight simply isn't an option, so I need your immediate help to close the gap.**
**[Please, can I count on you to donate $5 or more right away to help us reach our mid-month goal, win in Michigan, and flip the Senate blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10465?t=2&akid=1644%2E49239%2EVFNV3P)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10465?t=3&akid=1644%2E49239%2EVFNV3P)
---
Thank you so much,
Haley
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: Very straightforward question:
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10466?t=4&akid=1644%2E49239%2EVFNV3P)
---
Hi null, it's Haley writing to you with a very straightforward question:

**[Is there anything I can say to convince you to donate $5 – before my crucial mid-month fundraising deadline – to help me win Michigan's battleground Senate race?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10467?t=5&akid=1644%2E49239%2EVFNV3P)**
What if I told you that there is no path to flipping the Senate blue unless we protect Michigan's Senate seat?
What if I told you that I'm statistically tied with my Trump-backed opponent, Mike Rogers, among independent voters – and that your gift could help me surge ahead in the polls?

What if I told you I was born and raised in Michigan, and I’m in this fight for the Michiganders I know and love, not billionaire donors like the ones backing my GOP opponent?

What if I told you that national Republicans and their dark money super PACs have already started pouring money into Michigan, and that the worst is yet to come?

What if I told you Trump and his MAGA Republicans could eclipse $80 million in spending, which is what they spent last time trying to flip Michigan red?
Null, I can win this race. But only with committed grassroots supporters like you fighting alongside me. That's why hitting my $175,000 mid-month fundraising goal – one donation at a time – is absolutely crucial.

**[So will you please chip in $5 to help me win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's chaos agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10467?t=6&akid=1644%2E49239%2EVFNV3P)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10465?t=7&akid=1644%2E49239%2EVFNV3P)
---
With grit and gratitude,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10468?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1644%2E49239%2EVFNV3P) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10466?t=9&akid=1644%2E49239%2EVFNV3P)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

Peter, it’s been a big year.

In the Senate, we’ve delivered President Trump’s agenda, cut your taxes, and secured our border.

**I’ve officially filed to run for re-election and I’m proud to be endorsed by President Trump, Governor Sarah Sanders, and conservative leaders across the country. **

name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: It’s time to draw a clear line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress
body:
This is where leadership matters.
| | | | Peter,
Conservatives are done with ambiguity.
We believe in strength, accountability, and leaders who don’t flinch when it matters. And as we look ahead, it’s time to be crystal clear about where we draw the line and what we expect from the people we send to Washington.
That’s why I launched **[The Red Line Survey](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**._**[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**_
---
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---
This is about defining the kind of leadership that actually _holds the line_ , against runaway spending, radical pressure from the Left, and Washington insiders who hope voters aren’t paying attention.
The Left is organized. They’re funded. And they’re counting on conservatives to stay quiet and disengaged.
That’s not who we are.
Your response to this survey helps shape how we fight back, how we stay on offense, and how we build a House majority that stands firm instead of folding.
After you weigh in, you’ll also have the opportunity to **back this fight directly** and help ensure conservatives have the resources to win where it counts.
**[Take the survey and stand on the right side of the line.](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**

[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
This moment demands clarity and commitment.
Thank you for stepping up.
**Brett Lindstrom**

clean_body: I'm too busy to search far & wide for you AGAIN! | | | | I have ONE spot left on the official 2025 MAGA Honor Roll ... and I’m holding it for YOU. Your name has come across my desk over and over this year — more than once, more than twice — which is exactly why I told my team: “Save the final spot for Fellow American do NOT give it to anyone else.” I’m personally compiling the permanent 2025 MAGA Honor Roll , the exclusive list of my strongest, most loyal patriots from this historic year. This list is going straight to my desk in the Oval Office. I will be reviewing every single name myself tonight. Please don’t make me stay up all night wondering why you weren’t there when I looked for you. Thank you, President Donald J. Trump P.S. When I don’t see your name tonight, I’ll know you let the last spot go to someone else. Don’t do that to me. name: GOTV PAC
subject: A personal note from the person who writes these emails
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Last week, Senate Republicans blocked a straightforward extension of Affordable Care Act subsidies – subsidies that keep premiums affordable for more than 22 million Americans. Then they offered a hollow alternative: higher deductibles, skimpier plans, and a shrug that basically says good luck when you get sick.
This isn’t abstract. This is grocery money. Rent money. Prescription money.
And when we say we’re in this fight with you, we mean it literally. The person writing these emails on behalf of GOTV PAC is set to see her premiums rise 49.98% . Her brother’s situation is worse – his premiums are about to quadruple, forcing him onto a bare-bones plan and costing him access to his general practitioner.
We’re not sharing this for sympathy. We’re sharing it because this is the reality millions of families are facing – and why we KNOW simply “taking back the House” next year isn’t enough.
We don’t want a razor-thin majority that can be bullied, stalled, or paralyzed. We want a punishing majority.
If there are 30 real opportunities to flip House seats in 2026? Flip. Them. All.
Every seat Republicans lose is one less vote to rip healthcare away from families, spike premiums, and turn cruelty into policy.
If you can chip in today, you’ll help us build the overwhelming Democratic majority it will take to protect healthcare and finally end this cycle of manufactured suffering.
We’re not asking you to stand with us.
We’re telling you – we’re already standing with you.
Chip in now to help GOTV PAC flip every seat we can in 2026. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12152025]

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

clean_body: [] Peter , Last week, Senate Republicans blocked a straightforward extension of Affordable Care Act subsidies – subsidies that keep premiums affordable for more than 22 million Americans. Then they offered a hollow alternative: higher deductibles, skimpier plans, and a shrug that basically says good luck when you get sick. This isn’t abstract. This is grocery money. Rent money. Prescription money. And when we say we’re in this fight with you, we mean it literally. The person writing these emails on behalf of GOTV PAC is set to see her premiums rise 49.98% . Her brother’s situation is worse – his premiums are about to quadruple, forcing him onto a bare-bones plan and costing him access to his general practitioner. We’re not sharing this for sympathy. We’re sharing it because this is the reality millions of families are facing – and why we KNOW simply “taking back the House” next year isn’t enough. We don’t want a razor-thin majority that can be bullied, stalled, or paralyzed. We want a punishing majority. If there are 30 real opportunities to flip House seats in 2026? Flip. Them. All. Every seat Republicans lose is one less vote to rip healthcare away from families, spike premiums, and turn cruelty into policy. If you can chip in today, you’ll help us build the overwhelming Democratic majority it will take to protect healthcare and finally end this cycle of manufactured suffering. We’re not asking you to stand with us. We’re telling you – we’re already standing with you. Chip in now to help GOTV PAC flip every seat we can in 2026. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $25 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] DONATE $500 [] Custom Donation [] – GOTV PAC [] Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts. Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member. Learn more at: gotv.vote [] PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE GOTV PAC 712 H St NE PMB 96591 Washington, DC 20002 United States Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

-Team Binkley

Friend ,
Christmas is right around the corner and we hope that you and your family are preparing for a joyful and blessed Christmas holiday season.
Join us this Thursday, December 18th, at 6:00 PM, at our Binkley for Congress Christmas Party and Town Hall. We are excited about taking this district back from the Democratic Party! Come join as we share about creating jobs, economic freedom, and restoring capitalism in America.
We look forward to seeing you, sharing vision, and celebrating the holiday season with friends and fellow patriots in District 32.
Come ready to ring in the Christmas season, share fellowship, and talk about the issues facing Texas and our district next year. This event is free, but we do ask you to RSVP at the Eventbrite link below:
Date: Thursday, December 18th, 2025
Time: 6:00–7:00 PM

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: I’ll keep this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Aloha Peter, With our mid-month fundraising deadline just a few hours away, we’re just short of where we need to be to reach tonight’s goal. Unlike Republicans, I don’t cut taxes for billionaires just so they can bankroll my campaign during election season. My campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. subject: Mandela Barnes is stepping up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
I’m supporting Mandela Barnes for Governor
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121525_B1_Beto&t=2&akid=5714%2E196590%2EsB64ad) Hi friend, it’s Beto O’Rourke. I’m reaching out because my friend Mandela Barnes is running for Governor of Wisconsin - and I couldn’t be more excited to support him. He’s prioritizing what matters most at this critical point: making life more affordable, expanding opportunities for our families, and ensuring that the majority of folks - not just the wealthy and well-connected - can build a good life in Wisconsin. Mandela knows that families are being squeezed by rising costs. He knows people are working harder than ever and still struggling to get ahead. **And he’s running to do something about it.** He’s laser-focused on expanding Badgercare, raising the minimum wage, and strengthening our public services. That’s why I’m proud to support Mandela. I hope you’ll join me. If you want to contribute to him, you can use this link to donate $15, $27, or whatever you can to his campaign. **[secure.actblue.com/donate/mb-em-fr-dec25/](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121525_B1_Beto&t=3&akid=5714%2E196590%2EsB64ad)** I hope you’ll join me,
Beto
---

| | [ CONTRIBUTE NOW » ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6525?source_code=&t=1&akid=5714%2E196590%2EsB64ad)
---

Milwaukee, WI 53209
---

subject: They’re building strength . . . we have to be stronger.
body:
Imagine standing in the shadows, heart pounding, as a brave undercover journalist risks everything to expose the truth. This is not just an abstract danger—it's a real person living on the edge to fight corruption.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17500113/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YveW0yWm52ODh0ZA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTU/LbmNsZ2tCU1F6Tg/qP2hpZHM9bmNwTEJTZ1lXVVF6TkVscw/gaUCfYQ/sci77ce26fd)

| | | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17500113/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1lb3ktMjUtbWItb20/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTU/LbmNsZ2tCU1F6Tg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWVveS0yNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwOTRfd3Ix/gaUCfYQ/s8s50935b8d)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17500113/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1lb3ktMjUtbWItb20/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTU/LbmNsZ2tCU1F6Tg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWVveS0yNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwOTRfd3Ix/gaUCfYQ/s8s50935b8d) Dear Patriot,

Imagine standing in the shadows, heart pounding, as a brave undercover journalist risks everything to expose the truth. This is not just an abstract danger—**it's a real person living on the edge to fight corruption.**

**Our fearless journalists at OMG do this everyday . . .[**and they deserve your support**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17500113/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1lb3ktMjUtbWItb20/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTU/LbmNsZ2tCU1F6Tg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWVveS0yNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwOTRfd3Ix/gaUCfYQ/s8s50935b8d).**

2026 is expected to be one of the most challenging years in decades, with the corrupt already regrouping and planning their attacks.

[**We need immediate funding to expose at least 10 more corrupt officials and reach 2 million viewers with our reports**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17500113/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1lb3ktMjUtbWItb20/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTU/LbmNsZ2tCU1F6Tg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWVveS0yNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwOTRfd3Ix/gaUCfYQ/s8s50935b8d).

**A longtime OMG Patriot is standing by with a $100,000 challenge match that expires at midnight on New Year’s Eve.**
That means every dollar you give [**becomes**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17500113/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1lb3ktMjUtbWItb20/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTU/LbmNsZ2tCU1F6Tg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWVveS0yNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwOTRfd3Ix/gaUCfYQ/s8s50935b8d)**[**two dollars of pure investigative firepower**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17500113/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1lb3ktMjUtbWItb20/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTU/LbmNsZ2tCU1F6Tg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWVveS0yNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwOTRfd3Ix/gaUCfYQ/s8s50935b8d)**.

**•** $25 → $50

**•** $100 → $200

**•** $500 → $1,000

**•** $5,000 → $10,000

When we unite and successfully raise $100,000 through the efforts of dedicated supporters like you, we'll step decisively into the new year with $200,000 at our command. You will lead the charge to:

→ Buy and arm the next fleet of journalists with hidden cameras.

→ Deploy three new undercover teams to the streets by January 15.

→ Offer protection to every whistleblower seeking justice.

→ Initiate the lawsuits that they hope to avoid.

By taking this stand, you join forces with us at the frontline. You’re the tip-of-the-spear to get us there.

I’m not asking you to 'support journalism.' **I’m inviting you to[**ignite the flame of truth**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17500113/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1lb3ktMjUtbWItb20/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTU/LbmNsZ2tCU1F6Tg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWVveS0yNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwOTRfd3Ix/gaUCfYQ/s8s50935b8d) for the challenges we know are coming**.

This match is your chance to kickstart a year of unprecedented exposure . . . **and we’ll need it more than ever.**

When the ball drops, [**your contributions transform our efforts**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17500113/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1lb3ktMjUtbWItb20/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTU/LbmNsZ2tCU1F6Tg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWVveS0yNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwOTRfd3Ix/gaUCfYQ/s8s50935b8d), turning every dollar into a powerful tool to expose the corrupt.

Join us in seizing this opportunity [**to equip our investigative force and make an impact they’ll never forget**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17500113/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1lb3ktMjUtbWItb20/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTU/LbmNsZ2tCU1F6Tg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWVveS0yNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwOTRfd3Ix/gaUCfYQ/s8s50935b8d).

You’ve never let me down when it counted most. Don’t start now.

In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. [**Whatever you can do right now — $35, $100, $1,000 — will be doubled instantly**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17500113/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1lb3ktMjUtbWItb20/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTU/LbmNsZ2tCU1F6Tg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWVveS0yNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwOTRfd3Ix/gaUCfYQ/s8s50935b8d) **and hurt them twice as hard**. Thank you for having my back one more time this year.

---
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17500113/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1lb3ktMjUtbWItb20/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTU/LbmNsZ2tCU1F6Tg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWVveS0yNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwOTRfd3Ix/gaUCfYQ/s8s50935b8d)

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Something EXCITING I Want To Share w/You
body:
Last spring, I released my first book "Chasing After The Wind" and so many of you encouraged me to keep writing. So I did... My 2nd book is now FINIS
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13797.1.639c44f00d84bcbb659db262c1332056) |
---
Last spring, I released my first book "[Chasing After The Wind](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13798.1.88466f01ccb4ebd22a2436c07b1476b9)" and so many of you encouraged me to keep writing. _So I did..._ My 2nd book is now **FINISHED**! It's entitled '[DIVIDED: BREAKING FREE FROM THE DOUBLE LIFE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13799.1.3b9fd3d4edf4bd9907481885304e171c).' **Pastor Paula White-Cain** wrote an _incredible_ Foreword and **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** gave an _amazing_ Endorsement. In this, I open up about _my own personal struggles_ as a follower of Jesus and a Pastor. I share things that I've never shared publicly in hopes that it will speak to people who might be ashamed with the different struggles they have even as Christians and how to have victory. There are two of us in all of us but we're not destined to live **DIVIDED** forever. As a thank you for your support, I've got a promo code (**SHERIDAN**) that you can use to save 30% off the pre-order at checkout. You can visit: [https://clr.cm/qPKQ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13800.1.52a6935bf2a009900305d298d39fa103)to get your SIGNED copy and start reading immediately with the **FREE e-book** that's included. I believe this book will help many people overcome the double life that far too many of us live. Thank you -Pastor JacksonLahmeyer
---
| | [ Click Here To Read "DIVIDED" Now ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13801.1.a896f61a662c90814f454b8b36b5313f)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13802.1.e0040c978d0caae4042787d9331dfd9c)
---
Every one of us lives with tension - the tug-of-war between the two of us living in all of us. In DIVIDED, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer gets real, raw, and deeply relatable as he opens up about his own struggles with pride, anger, and failure while chasing God's purpose. Through humor, honesty, and hard-learned wisdom, Lahmeyer invites readers to drop the mask, confront the "dark me" that keeps surfacing, and experience the transforming power of grace. This is not a polished preacher's pep talk-it's a gut-level, heart-to-heart conversation about what it means to follow Jesus when life gets messy. Drawing from the lives of biblical characters like Peter, Jacob and Paul, Lahmeyer shows that even the greatest heroes of faith had moments of weakness, doubt, and defeat. He unpacks the difference between remorse and repentance, explores how belief shapes behavior, and reveals how identity-not effort-is the key to lasting transformation. With vivid stories, relatable honesty, and the truth of Scripture, he reminds us that God isn't looking for the perfect version of you-He's after the real you. Because the moment you get real with God is the moment He starts making you new. If you've ever felt like you're living two lives-the public you that looks strong and the private you that's barely hanging on-this book is for you. DIVIDED will help you see that failure isn't final, temptation isn't sin, and your past doesn't disqualify your purpose. You'll laugh, you'll be challenged, and you'll find hope in the God who meets you where you are but never leaves you there. Honest, gritty, and full of grace, this book will inspire you to feed the right wolf, renew your mind, and finally live as the "you" God designed you to be.
---
---
|
---
Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13803.1.75f33237fc613d3595d3af272de22027) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13804.1.159378b692e2f0baa9261c89acd90c6d)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13805.1.d1b4fa95f4100659bcf59f4ccdb585c6)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13806.1.2cb7b948f49bda02e95cd139371bb1c6). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13807.1.3a1336557ffb848b3791f7d6e5c54d7d) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13808.1.842fddada2023600515ae05084bdcfcf) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13809.1.01e3ae11aff0c617391c24f01bf3c65b) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13810.1.02be371ac6e3add9c5cbe1723cb30a2e)
---
Get your [LIMITED EDITION SIGNED COPY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13811.1.8c599e3176426acdd7a6bbcf3d15c9fa) here: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26840535.13812.1.7d9f8aea6cd7979bfcbcb49cab964cd2) Thank you,

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23734%2E4449941%2EYKNYua) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23734%2E4449941%2EYKNYua) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71037?t=3&akid=23734%2E4449941%2EYKNYua) [ **So, Robert Reich is calling on Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to abolish the Electoral College! We need 50,000 signatures from EVERY STATE before midnight to prove the public is behind him!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71037?t=4&akid=23734%2E4449941%2EYKNYua) | [ADD MY NAME TO THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71037?t=5&akid=23734%2E4449941%2EYKNYua)
---
* * *
If you were thinking of ignoring our urgent petition, here’s why you SHOULDN’T:
[**→ Donald Trump only became President in 2016 because of the outdated Electoral College.

→→ Hillary Clinton won the popular vote by nearly 2.9 million.

→→→ But the Electoral College overruled her victory!! **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71037?t=6&akid=23734%2E4449941%2EYKNYua)
We can’t let something like that happen again! That’s why Robert Reich is SOUNDING THE ALARM:
[**“Twice in the last generation, the Electoral College has handed the presidency to someone who lost the popular vote.”** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71037?t=7&akid=23734%2E4449941%2EYKNYua) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71037?t=8&akid=23734%2E4449941%2EYKNYua)
---|---
The Electoral College is a BROKEN system, and that’s exactly why we need you to sign today, team.
[ **If every Democrat reading this signs our petition, we will reach our 125,OOO signature goal within minutes and gain traction for this urgent legislation in Congress. Please add your name immediately:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71037?t=9&akid=23734%2E4449941%2EYKNYua)
[ADD MY NAME TO THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71037?t=10&akid=23734%2E4449941%2EYKNYua)
---
Trump is going to hate this!
